## Tache 2.3.3 -- RbacService : Evaluation Principale

**Metadonnees** : Phase 2 / Sprint 7 / P0 / 6h / Depend de 2.3.2

**But** : Service NestJS centralisant l'evaluation des permissions : `canAccess(user, permission, context?): boolean`.

**Livrables checkables** :
- [ ] Service `repo/packages/auth/src/rbac/rbac.service.ts`
- [ ] Method `canAccess(role: AuthRole, permission: Permission, abacContext?): Promise<{ allowed: boolean, reason?: string }>` :
  - Si role est super_admin_platform et matrix contient `'*'` -> allowed
  - Sinon lookup matrix `getEffectivePermissions(role)`, check si permission presente
  - Si presente et abacContext provided -> delegate AbacService (Tache 2.3.7)
  - Si absente -> denied
- [ ] Method `canAccessAny(role, permissions[]): boolean` -- OR logic
- [ ] Method `canAccessAll(role, permissions[]): boolean` -- AND logic
- [ ] Method `getRolePermissions(role): Permission[]` -- liste effective
- [ ] Caching Redis (delegate Tache 2.3.10) sur `getEffectivePermissions(role)` (5min TTL)
- [ ] Logs structures : access granted/denied + reason
- [ ] Tests unitaires : super_admin wildcard, hierarchy resolution, ABAC delegation, OR/AND multi-permissions

**Pattern critique : RbacService.canAccess flow**

```typescript
// repo/packages/auth/src/rbac/rbac.service.ts
@Injectable()
export class RbacService {
  constructor(
    private cache: PermissionCacheService,
    @Inject(forwardRef(() => AbacService)) private abac: AbacService,
  ) {}

  async canAccess(
    role: AuthRole,
    permission: PermissionValue,
    abacContext?: AbacContext,
  ): Promise<{ allowed: boolean; reason?: string }> {
    // 1. Super admin wildcard check
    const matrix = PermissionsMatrix[role];
    if (matrix.includes('*')) {
      return { allowed: true };
    }

    // 2. Resolve effective permissions (with hierarchy + cache)
    const effective = await this.cache.getEffectivePermissions(role);

    // 3. Check direct permission match
    if (!effective.has(permission)) {
      return { allowed: false, reason: 'PERMISSION_NOT_GRANTED' };
    }

    // 4. ABAC check si context provided
    if (abacContext) {
      const abacResult = await this.abac.evaluate(role, permission, abacContext);
      if (!abacResult.allowed) {
        return { allowed: false, reason: abacResult.reason ?? 'ABAC_DENIED' };
      }
    }

    return { allowed: true };
  }

  async canAccessAny(role: AuthRole, perms: PermissionValue[]): Promise<boolean> {
    for (const p of perms) {
      const result = await this.canAccess(role, p);
      if (result.allowed) return true;
    }
    return false;
  }

  async canAccessAll(role: AuthRole, perms: PermissionValue[]): Promise<boolean> {
    for (const p of perms) {
      const result = await this.canAccess(role, p);
      if (!result.allowed) return false;
    }
    return true;
  }
}
```

**Fichiers crees / modifies** :
```
repo/packages/auth/src/rbac/rbac.service.ts                              # ~150 lignes
repo/packages/auth/src/rbac/rbac.service.spec.ts                          # ~180 lignes (tests exhaustifs)
```

**Notes implementation** :
- `forwardRef` AbacService : eviter circular import (AbacService aussi inject RbacService eventuellement)
- Cache `getEffectivePermissions` : Set<Permission> retourne (O(1) lookup)
- ABAC evaluation lazy : seulement si context provided ET RBAC permission OK
- Logs structured : indispensable audit trail (Tache 2.3.9 enrichira)
- canAccessAny / All : utile guards multi-permissions decorators

**Criteres validation** :
- V1 (P0) : super_admin_platform : `canAccess` retourne allowed=true pour TOUTE permission
- V2 (P0) : broker_admin : `canAccess('crm.contacts.create')` allowed=true
- V3 (P0) : broker_user : `canAccess('crm.contacts.delete')` allowed=false (pas dans matrix)
- V4 (P0) : `canAccess` avec ABAC context delegate AbacService
- V5 (P0) : Cache hit 2eme call meme role
- V6 (P0) : `canAccessAny` retourne true si AU MOINS UNE permission OK
- V7 (P0) : `canAccessAll` retourne false si AU MOINS UNE manque
- V8 (P0) : Reason explicite si denied (PERMISSION_NOT_GRANTED, ABAC_DENIED)
- V9 (P0) : Tests 15+ scenarios passent

## Tache 2.3.4 -- RoleGuard + Decorators @Role()

**Metadonnees** : Phase 2 / Sprint 7 / P0 / 4h / Depend de 2.3.3

**But** : Guard NestJS qui force role specifique sur endpoint via decorator `@Role('broker_admin')`. Plus simple que PermissionGuard pour cas binaires (ce role uniquement).

**Livrables checkables** :
- [ ] Guard `repo/apps/api/src/common/guards/role.guard.ts`
- [ ] Decorator `@Role(role: AuthRole | AuthRole[])` -- accept un ou plusieurs roles
- [ ] Decorator `@MinRole(role: AuthRole)` -- accept role + ses descendants hierarchy
- [ ] Guard logic :
  - Lit metadata `@Role()` ou `@MinRole()`
  - Get user role depuis TenantContext (Sprint 6)
  - Check si role match (direct ou via hierarchy)
  - 403 si non
- [ ] Logs : role required vs role courant + endpoint
- [ ] Tests : @Role broker_admin OK, broker_user reject, super_admin OK partout

**Pattern critique : @Role decorator + RoleGuard**

```typescript
// repo/apps/api/src/common/decorators/role.decorator.ts
export const ROLES_KEY = 'roles';
export const Role = (...roles: AuthRole[]) => SetMetadata(ROLES_KEY, roles);

// repo/apps/api/src/common/guards/role.guard.ts
@Injectable()
export class RoleGuard implements CanActivate {
  constructor(private reflector: Reflector, private rbac: RbacService) {}

  async canActivate(context: ExecutionContext): Promise<boolean> {
    const requiredRoles = this.reflector.getAllAndOverride<AuthRole[]>(ROLES_KEY, [
      context.getHandler(), context.getClass(),
    ]);
    if (!requiredRoles?.length) return true;

    const userRole = getCurrentContext()?.userRole;
    if (!userRole) {
      throw new ForbiddenException({ code: 'NO_USER_CONTEXT' });
    }

    // super_admin bypass
    if (userRole === 'super_admin_platform') return true;

    if (!requiredRoles.includes(userRole)) {
      throw new ForbiddenException({
        code: 'ROLE_REQUIRED',
        required: requiredRoles,
        current: userRole,
      });
    }
    return true;
  }
}
```

Usage controllers :

```typescript
@Controller('tenant')
export class TenantController {
  @Get()
  @Role('broker_admin', 'garage_admin')
  manage() { ... }

  @Get('admin')
  @MinRole('broker_admin')  // accept broker_admin + descendants
  superView() { ... }
}
```

**Fichiers crees / modifies** :
```
repo/apps/api/src/common/decorators/role.decorator.ts               # ~10 lignes
repo/apps/api/src/common/decorators/min-role.decorator.ts            # ~10 lignes
repo/apps/api/src/common/guards/role.guard.ts                        # ~60 lignes
repo/apps/api/src/common/guards/role.guard.spec.ts                   # ~80 lignes
```

**Notes implementation** :
- `@Role()` simple cas : "ce role exact uniquement"
- `@MinRole()` cas : "ce role ou descendant" (utilise hierarchy)
- super_admin_platform bypass : meme sans @Role() match, accept (consistency RbacService)
- Pattern guards combinables : RoleGuard + PermissionGuard sur meme endpoint
- 403 explicite avec required/current : aide debug

**Criteres validation** :
- V1 (P0) : @Role('broker_admin') accept broker_admin
- V2 (P0) : @Role('broker_admin') reject broker_user (403)
- V3 (P0) : @Role('a', 'b') accept a OR b
- V4 (P0) : @MinRole('broker_admin') accept broker_admin + broker_user + broker_assistant
- V5 (P0) : super_admin_platform bypass tous role checks
- V6 (P0) : Pas de role -> 403
- V7 (P0) : Tests 8+ scenarios

## Tache 2.3.5 -- PermissionGuard + Decorator @RequirePermission()

**Metadonnees** : Phase 2 / Sprint 7 / P0 / 5h / Depend de 2.3.4

**But** : Guard granulaire utilise sur endpoints metier : `@RequirePermission('crm.contacts.create')` rejette si user pas autorise.

**Livrables checkables** :
- [ ] Decorator `@RequirePermission(permission: Permission)` -- single permission
- [ ] Decorator `@RequireAnyPermission(...permissions)` -- OR logic
- [ ] Decorator `@RequireAllPermissions(...permissions)` -- AND logic
- [ ] Guard `repo/apps/api/src/common/guards/permission.guard.ts`
- [ ] Logic :
  - Lit metadata `@RequirePermission/Any/All`
  - Get role + tenantId depuis TenantContext
  - Call `rbacService.canAccess(role, permission)` -- ou canAccessAny/All
  - 403 si denied avec code `PERMISSION_DENIED` + permission demandee
- [ ] Compatibility : guard execute APRES JwtAuthGuard + TenantContextGuard (chained)
- [ ] Audit log automatique sur denied (Tache 2.3.9)
- [ ] Tests : permissions OK / denied avec various roles

**Pattern critique : @RequirePermission + Guard**

```typescript
// repo/apps/api/src/common/decorators/require-permission.decorator.ts
export const PERMISSIONS_KEY = 'permissions';
export const PERMISSIONS_LOGIC_KEY = 'permissionsLogic';

export const RequirePermission = (permission: PermissionValue) =>
  applyDecorators(
    SetMetadata(PERMISSIONS_KEY, [permission]),
    SetMetadata(PERMISSIONS_LOGIC_KEY, 'AND'),
  );

export const RequireAnyPermission = (...permissions: PermissionValue[]) =>
  applyDecorators(
    SetMetadata(PERMISSIONS_KEY, permissions),
    SetMetadata(PERMISSIONS_LOGIC_KEY, 'OR'),
  );

export const RequireAllPermissions = (...permissions: PermissionValue[]) =>
  applyDecorators(
    SetMetadata(PERMISSIONS_KEY, permissions),
    SetMetadata(PERMISSIONS_LOGIC_KEY, 'AND'),
  );

// repo/apps/api/src/common/guards/permission.guard.ts
@Injectable()
export class PermissionGuard implements CanActivate {
  constructor(
    private reflector: Reflector,
    private rbac: RbacService,
    private rbacAudit: RbacAuditService,
  ) {}

  async canActivate(context: ExecutionContext): Promise<boolean> {
    const permissions = this.reflector.getAllAndOverride<PermissionValue[]>(PERMISSIONS_KEY, [
      context.getHandler(), context.getClass(),
    ]);
    if (!permissions?.length) return true;

    const logic = this.reflector.getAllAndOverride<'AND' | 'OR'>(PERMISSIONS_LOGIC_KEY, [
      context.getHandler(), context.getClass(),
    ]) ?? 'AND';

    const userRole = getCurrentContext()?.userRole;
    if (!userRole) throw new ForbiddenException({ code: 'NO_USER_CONTEXT' });

    const allowed = logic === 'OR'
      ? await this.rbac.canAccessAny(userRole, permissions)
      : await this.rbac.canAccessAll(userRole, permissions);

    if (!allowed) {
      await this.rbacAudit.logAccessDenied({
        permissions, role: userRole,
        userId: getCurrentUserId(),
        tenantId: getCurrentTenantId(),
        endpoint: context.switchToHttp().getRequest().url,
      });
      throw new ForbiddenException({
        code: 'PERMISSION_DENIED',
        permissions: permissions,
      });
    }
    return true;
  }
}
```

Usage controllers :

```typescript
@Controller('contacts')
@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, TenantContextGuard, PermissionGuard)
export class ContactsController {
  @Get()
  @RequirePermission('crm.contacts.read')
  list() { ... }

  @Post()
  @RequirePermission('crm.contacts.create')
  create() { ... }

  @Delete(':id')
  @RequireAllPermissions('crm.contacts.delete', 'crm.contacts.update')
  delete() { ... }
}
```

**Fichiers crees / modifies** :
```
repo/apps/api/src/common/decorators/require-permission.decorator.ts          # ~30 lignes (3 decorators)
repo/apps/api/src/common/guards/permission.guard.ts                          # ~80 lignes
repo/apps/api/src/common/guards/permission.guard.spec.ts                     # ~120 lignes
```

**Notes implementation** :
- `applyDecorators` : compose multiple decorators en un (cleaner usage)
- Default logic AND si pas specifie
- super_admin bypass : RbacService.canAccess gere deja
- Audit denied : critical pour detection abus / debug
- Pattern global : `useGlobalGuards(PermissionGuard)` mais avec `@Optional()` decorator pour endpoints sans permission requirements

**Criteres validation** :
- V1 (P0) : @RequirePermission accept si role a permission
- V2 (P0) : @RequirePermission reject si role n'a pas permission (403)
- V3 (P0) : @RequireAnyPermission accept si AU MOINS une OK
- V4 (P0) : @RequireAllPermissions reject si AU MOINS une manque
- V5 (P0) : super_admin bypass
- V6 (P0) : Audit log sur denied
- V7 (P0) : 403 retourne code + permissions demandees
- V8 (P0) : Tests 12+ scenarios

## Tache 2.3.6 -- Types ABAC + Interfaces

**Metadonnees** : Phase 2 / Sprint 7 / P0 / 3h / Depend de 2.3.5

**But** : Definir interfaces TypeScript pour ABAC : `AbacContext`, `AbacPolicy`, `AbacResult`, types resources.

**Contexte** : RBAC seul insuffisant pour cas comme "broker_user peut update contact UNIQUEMENT s'il en est l'owner". ABAC ajoute couche policy attribute-based.

**Livrables checkables** :
- [ ] Fichier `repo/packages/auth/src/abac/types.ts`
- [ ] Interface `AbacContext` :
  - `userId: string`
  - `role: AuthRole`
  - `tenantId: string`
  - `resource: { type: string, id: string, attributes: Record<string, unknown> }`
  - `action: string`
  - `requestContext: { ipAddress, userAgent, timestamp }`
- [ ] Interface `AbacPolicy` :
  - `name: string`
  - `appliesTo: { permissions: PermissionValue[], resourceTypes?: string[] }`
  - `evaluate(context: AbacContext): Promise<AbacResult>`
- [ ] Interface `AbacResult` :
  - `allowed: boolean`
  - `reason?: string`
  - `appliedPolicy: string`
- [ ] Types resources : `'crm_contact' | 'insure_police' | 'repair_sinistre' | 'pay_transaction' | 'doc_document'`
- [ ] Tests : interfaces compilent + Zod schemas pour validation runtime

**Fichiers crees / modifies** :
```
repo/packages/auth/src/abac/types.ts                                  # ~80 lignes
repo/packages/auth/src/abac/types.spec.ts                              # ~40 lignes
```

**Notes implementation** :
- Resource type enum : permet routing vers policy specific (ex: `crm_contact` -> CrmContactOwnerPolicy)
- Attributes flexible (Record) : chaque resource type a ses attributes specifiques
- Action string vs enum : flexibility pour custom actions futurs
- AbacResult.appliedPolicy : trace quelle policy a evalue (audit)

**Criteres validation** :
- V1 (P0) : Interfaces compilent
- V2 (P0) : `AbacContext` couvre cas usage 4 policies (Tache 2.3.7)
- V3 (P0) : `AbacResult.allowed` boolean + reason optional
- V4 (P0) : Resource types enum correct
- V5 (P1) : Zod schemas runtime validation

## Tache 2.3.7 -- AbacService + 4 Policies

**Metadonnees** : Phase 2 / Sprint 7 / P0 / 7h / Depend de 2.3.6

**But** : Service evaluant ABAC policies + 4 policies fondamentales : OwnResources, TimeBased, StatusBased, WorkflowState.

**Livrables checkables** :
- [ ] Service `repo/packages/auth/src/abac/abac.service.ts`
- [ ] Method `evaluate(role, permission, context): Promise<AbacResult>` :
  - Find policy applicable (via `appliesTo.permissions` match)
  - Si pas de policy applicable -> allowed (RBAC suffit)
  - Evaluer policy.evaluate(context)
  - Retourner result avec applied policy name
- [ ] Method `registerPolicy(policy: AbacPolicy)` -- registration dynamique
- [ ] **Policy 1 : OwnResourcesPolicy** -- "user peut acceder seulement resources qu'il a cree ou est assigne"
  - Applicable a permissions `*.read_own`, `*.update_own`, `*.delete_own`
  - Verifie `resource.attributes.owner_user_id === userId` OR `resource.attributes.assigned_user_id === userId`
- [ ] **Policy 2 : TimeBasedPolicy** -- "operation autorisee seulement dans creneau temporel"
  - E.g. `pay.transactions.refund` autorise seulement < 30 jours apres transaction
  - Lit `resource.attributes.created_at` + check NOW - created_at < threshold
- [ ] **Policy 3 : StatusBasedPolicy** -- "operation autorisee seulement si resource dans status specifique"
  - E.g. `insure.policies.cancel` autorise si police status='active'
  - Lit `resource.attributes.status` + check IN allowed statuses
- [ ] **Policy 4 : WorkflowStatePolicy** -- "transition workflow autorisee seulement depuis status specifique"
  - E.g. `repair.sinistres.close` autorise depuis status='reparation_completed' ONLY
  - Lit `resource.attributes.status` + check valid transition
- [ ] Logs structures : policy applied + result + reason
- [ ] Tests unitaires : 4 policies x 5+ scenarios chacune

**Pattern critique : OwnResourcesPolicy**

```typescript
// repo/packages/auth/src/abac/policies/own-resources.policy.ts
@Injectable()
export class OwnResourcesPolicy implements AbacPolicy {
  name = 'OwnResources';
  appliesTo = {
    permissions: [
      Permission.CRM_CONTACTS_READ_OWN,
      Permission.CRM_CONTACTS_UPDATE_OWN,
      Permission.INSURE_POLICIES_READ_OWN,
      Permission.REPAIR_SINISTRES_READ_OWN,
      // ... toutes les permissions *_own
    ],
  };

  async evaluate(context: AbacContext): Promise<AbacResult> {
    const { userId, resource } = context;
    const ownerId = resource.attributes.owner_user_id as string | undefined;
    const assignedId = resource.attributes.assigned_user_id as string | undefined;

    if (ownerId === userId || assignedId === userId) {
      return { allowed: true, appliedPolicy: this.name };
    }

    return {
      allowed: false,
      reason: 'NOT_OWNER',
      appliedPolicy: this.name,
    };
  }
}
```

**WorkflowStatePolicy exemple sinistre transitions** :

```typescript
const SINISTRE_TRANSITIONS: Record<string, string[]> = {
  'declared': ['acknowledged', 'rejected'],
  'acknowledged': ['expert_assigned', 'rejected'],
  'expert_assigned': ['expertise_completed'],
  'expertise_completed': ['devis_received'],
  'devis_received': ['devis_approved', 'devis_rejected'],
  'devis_approved': ['reparation_started'],
  'reparation_started': ['reparation_completed'],
  'reparation_completed': ['closed'],  // garage_chef close
  'closed': [],                          // terminal
  'rejected': [],
};
```

**Fichiers crees / modifies** :
```
repo/packages/auth/src/abac/abac.service.ts                            # ~150 lignes
repo/packages/auth/src/abac/policies/own-resources.policy.ts            # ~60 lignes
repo/packages/auth/src/abac/policies/time-based.policy.ts                # ~80 lignes
repo/packages/auth/src/abac/policies/status-based.policy.ts              # ~80 lignes
repo/packages/auth/src/abac/policies/workflow-state.policy.ts            # ~120 lignes
repo/packages/auth/src/abac/policies/{4 policies}.spec.ts                # ~100 lignes chacun
```

**Notes implementation** :
- Policies registree au boot via `AbacService.registerPolicy(policy)` (DI NestJS)
- One permission peut matcher plusieurs policies -- evaluees toutes (logic AND par defaut)
- TimeBasedPolicy threshold configurable per permission (jsonb config par permission)
- WorkflowStatePolicy : SINISTRE_TRANSITIONS map plat (preparation Sprint 22)
- Performance : policies stateless + rapide (no DB query si attributes deja loaded)
- Caching : Tache 2.3.10 cache result ABAC pour 1min sur (role, permission, resource_id)

**Criteres validation** :
- V1 (P0) : `evaluate` route vers policy correct
- V2 (P0) : OwnResourcesPolicy : owner OK, non-owner reject
- V3 (P0) : TimeBasedPolicy : < threshold OK, > threshold reject
- V4 (P0) : StatusBasedPolicy : status allowed OK, autre reject
- V5 (P0) : WorkflowStatePolicy : transition valide OK, invalide reject
- V6 (P0) : Si pas de policy applicable -> allowed (RBAC enough)
- V7 (P0) : Logs structured emit
- V8 (P1) : Tests 20+ scenarios passent

## Tache 2.3.8 -- AbacGuard + Decorator @AbacPolicy()

**Metadonnees** : Phase 2 / Sprint 7 / P0 / 5h / Depend de 2.3.7

**But** : Guard NestJS evaluant ABAC policies sur endpoint, avec decorator pour declarer resource type + identifier extraction.

**Livrables checkables** :
- [ ] Decorator `@AbacResource(type, idExtractor)` -- declare resource type + comment extraire id depuis request
- [ ] idExtractor function : `(req) => string` (e.g. `req => req.params.id`)
- [ ] Guard `repo/apps/api/src/common/guards/abac.guard.ts`
- [ ] Logic :
  - Lit metadata `@AbacResource()` + `@RequirePermission()`
  - Extract resource ID depuis request via extractor
  - Charger resource attributes depuis DB (cache 1min)
  - Build AbacContext
  - Call `abacService.evaluate(role, permission, context)`
  - 403 si denied
- [ ] Loader function injectable per resource type : `loadCrmContact(id)`, `loadInsurePolice(id)`, etc.
- [ ] Cache resource Redis 1min (eviter re-fetch a chaque request)
- [ ] Audit log : ABAC denied + reason
- [ ] Tests : owner can read, non-owner reject, status workflow

**Pattern critique : @AbacResource + Guard**

```typescript
// repo/apps/api/src/common/decorators/abac-resource.decorator.ts
export const ABAC_RESOURCE_KEY = 'abacResource';
export const AbacResource = (
  type: string,
  idExtractor: (req: FastifyRequest) => string = (req) => req.params['id'],
) => SetMetadata(ABAC_RESOURCE_KEY, { type, idExtractor });

// Usage controller :
@Get(':id')
@RequirePermission('crm.contacts.read_own')
@AbacResource('crm_contact')
async getContact(@Param('id') id: string) { ... }

// repo/apps/api/src/common/guards/abac.guard.ts
@Injectable()
export class AbacGuard implements CanActivate {
  constructor(
    private reflector: Reflector,
    private abac: AbacService,
    private resourceLoader: ResourceLoaderService,  // factory loaders
    private rbacAudit: RbacAuditService,
  ) {}

  async canActivate(context: ExecutionContext): Promise<boolean> {
    const abacResource = this.reflector.get<{ type: string; idExtractor: any }>(
      ABAC_RESOURCE_KEY,
      context.getHandler(),
    );
    const permissions = this.reflector.get<PermissionValue[]>(PERMISSIONS_KEY, context.getHandler());

    if (!abacResource || !permissions?.length) return true;

    const req = context.switchToHttp().getRequest<FastifyRequest>();
    const resourceId = abacResource.idExtractor(req);
    const resource = await this.resourceLoader.load(abacResource.type, resourceId);

    if (!resource) {
      throw new NotFoundException({ code: 'RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND' });
    }

    const userCtx = getCurrentContext();
    const abacContext: AbacContext = {
      userId: userCtx!.userId!,
      role: userCtx!.userRole!,
      tenantId: userCtx!.tenantId!,
      resource: {
        type: abacResource.type,
        id: resourceId,
        attributes: resource,
      },
      action: req.method.toLowerCase(),
      requestContext: { ipAddress: req.ip, userAgent: req.headers['user-agent'] ?? '', timestamp: new Date() },
    };

    for (const permission of permissions) {
      const result = await this.abac.evaluate(userCtx!.userRole!, permission, abacContext);
      if (!result.allowed) {
        await this.rbacAudit.logAbacDenied({
          permission, policy: result.appliedPolicy, reason: result.reason,
          userId: userCtx!.userId!, resource: { type: abacResource.type, id: resourceId },
        });
        throw new ForbiddenException({
          code: 'ABAC_DENIED',
          policy: result.appliedPolicy,
          reason: result.reason,
        });
      }
    }
    return true;
  }
}
```

**Fichiers crees / modifies** :
```
repo/apps/api/src/common/decorators/abac-resource.decorator.ts                # ~20 lignes
repo/apps/api/src/common/guards/abac.guard.ts                                  # ~120 lignes
repo/apps/api/src/common/services/resource-loader.service.ts                   # ~80 lignes (factory loaders)
repo/apps/api/src/common/guards/abac.guard.spec.ts                             # ~150 lignes
```

**Notes implementation** :
- ResourceLoaderService : Map<resource_type, Loader> registree au boot par chaque module
- Cache resource Redis 1min : balance fresh data vs perf
- ABAC apres RBAC dans chain guards : RBAC eliminate cas evidents (permission absente)
- AbacGuard execute APRES PermissionGuard : seulement si RBAC OK, alors check ABAC
- Pattern alternatif : ABAC evaluation dans service metier (vs guard) -- plus flexible mais plus boilerplate

**Criteres validation** :
- V1 (P0) : @AbacResource + permission *_own : owner OK
- V2 (P0) : @AbacResource + permission *_own : non-owner reject 403 ABAC_DENIED
- V3 (P0) : Resource not found -> 404
- V4 (P0) : Cache resource hit 2eme call
- V5 (P0) : Audit log ABAC denied
- V6 (P0) : Workflow transition test (close sinistre depuis state valide)
- V7 (P0) : Tests 10+ scenarios

## Tache 2.3.9 -- RbacAuditService : Log Access Granted + Denied

**Metadonnees** : Phase 2 / Sprint 7 / P0 / 4h / Depend de 2.3.8

**But** : Service centralise log toutes evaluations RBAC/ABAC (granted + denied) pour audit + detection abus + reporting.

**Livrables checkables** :
- [ ] Service `repo/apps/api/src/modules/auth/services/rbac-audit.service.ts`
- [ ] Methods :
  - `logAccessGranted({ userId, tenantId, role, permission, resource, endpoint })` -- INSERT audit_log
  - `logAccessDenied({ userId, tenantId, role, permissions, endpoint, reason })` -- INSERT audit_log + Kafka event
  - `logAbacDenied({ permission, policy, reason, userId, resource })` -- INSERT audit_log + Kafka
- [ ] Audit log : action='auth.access_granted' / 'auth.access_denied', resource_type=permission, changes=context
- [ ] Kafka event `insurtech.events.audit.access_denied` (alerting Sprint 33+)
- [ ] Logging granted optionnel (pour reduire volume) : seulement si LOG_RBAC_GRANTED env true
- [ ] Logging denied TOUJOURS (critical security event)
- [ ] Tests : grant + deny logged correctement

**Fichiers crees / modifies** :
```
repo/apps/api/src/modules/auth/services/rbac-audit.service.ts            # ~150 lignes
repo/apps/api/src/modules/auth/services/rbac-audit.service.spec.ts        # ~100 lignes
```

**Notes implementation** :
- Audit log row volumineux possible : sample 10% granted en prod (env config)
- Denied TOUJOURS logged : critical pour audit + detection brute force RBAC
- Kafka event denied : Sprint 33 setup alerting (Slack notification si > 100 denied / hour same user)
- Resource_type : permission name (e.g. 'crm.contacts.create')

**Criteres validation** :
- V1 (P0) : `logAccessGranted` INSERT audit_log row
- V2 (P0) : `logAccessDenied` INSERT + Kafka event
- V3 (P0) : Granted logging configurable env
- V4 (P0) : Denied toujours logged
- V5 (P0) : Tests 6+ scenarios

## 8. B-7.5a-sprint-7.5a-assurflow-foundation.md

```md
# META-PROMPT B-7.5a -- SPRINT 7.5a ASSURFLOW v3.0 FOUNDATION (Migration Critique)

> ## CORRECTION v3.1 (2026-06-02) -- PRIORITAIRE SUR LE RESTE DU FICHIER
>
> Ce fichier a ete genere avant le pivot v3.1 (ecosysteme 7 acteurs, decision-012-ecosysteme-7-acteurs). En cas de divergence, ces regles PRIMENT sur toute mention residuelle plus bas (qui parle encore de 6 acteurs, 26 roles, 7 types cross-tenant, 130 permissions, PartsHub, ou d'un e-constat genere/signe par Assurflow) :
>
> - Ecosysteme a 7 acteurs : Broker, Garage, Carrier, Expert, Customer/Assure, Tow, et CONSTATEUR (NOUVEAU v3.1).
> - Tenancy 3 niveaux : N1 tenants dedies (Garage, Broker, Carrier, Expert) ; N2 rattache (Customer/Assure) ; N3 sans tenant, acteur reseau leger style Uber-driver (Tow, Constateur).
> - RBAC : 28 roles (retrait de garage_parts_manager car PartsHub abandonne ; ajout de constateur_admin, constateur_dispatcher, constateur_agent).
> - Cross-tenant : 8 types (ajout de claim_to_constateur_dispatch). La ressource parts_order est remplacee par constat.
> - Permissions : 131 (module parts retire ~7 ; module constateur ajoute ~8).
> - PartsHub (decision-014) est ABANDONNE : il ne doit plus apparaitre comme fonctionnalite active.
> - e-constat : Assurflow ne cree, ne remplit ni ne signe JAMAIS le constat. Le constat est gere par l'application TIERCE e-constat de l'ecosysteme AFMA (saisie, signatures conformes loi 43-20, emission d'un numero officiel) ; Assurflow recupere les donnees du constat via API a partir de ce numero.

**Version** : v3.0 (Option B Migration)
**Phase** : 2.5 -- Migration Assurflow (intercale entre Phase 2 Securite et Phase 3 Horizontaux)
**Sprint** : 7.5a / 40 (cumul v3.0) -- Sprint Migration #1
**Position** : Apres Sprint 7 tache 2.3.1 livree, AVANT tache 2.3.2
**Numerotation taches** : 7.5a.1 a 7.5a.10
**Effort total** : ~25 heures developpement / 2-3 jours intensifs
**Priorite** : P0 BLOQUANT (avant continuation Sprint 7 tache 2.3.2)

---

## Objectif Global du Sprint

Mettre en place les **fondations techniques de la migration Assurflow v3.0** AVANT de continuer Sprint 7 RBAC tache 2.3.2 PermissionsMatrix. Sprint 7.5a est CRITIQUE car la PermissionsMatrix (tache 2.3.2) est structurelle pour les 11 taches RBAC restantes -- construire sur 12 roles puis refactor sur 24 roles couterait 15-20h de retravail cascade.

A la sortie de ce sprint :
- 5 decisions strategiques 011-015 formalisees (rebranding + 6 acteurs + expert central + PartsHub + Demo Day)
- AuthRole enum etendu : 12 -> 24 roles (+6 carrier, +4 expert, +3 tow, +1 garage_parts_manager)
- CrossTenantAuthorizationType etendu : 3 -> 7 types (+client_to_tower_dispatch, +tower_to_garage_delivery, +garage_to_expert_request, +garage_to_carrier_quote)
- DB migration TypeORM : CHECK constraint cross_tenant + nouvelle table expert_designations
- Helper postgres `app_can_access_tenant()` etendu pour 4 nouveaux types
- Catalog permissions etendu : 90 -> ~130 perms (Sprint 7 tache 2.3.1 update)
- Documentation `5-roles-permissions.md` mise a jour
- Tests RBAC + RLS scenarios additionnels (0 regression sur 1071+ tests existants)
- Tag Git `sprint-7.5a-complete-v3-foundation`
- CHECKLIST-MASTER-EXECUTION.md mis a jour

A la sortie de Sprint 7.5a, la suite est :
1. Reprise Sprint 7 tache 2.3.2 sur architecture 24 roles propre
2. Sprint 7.5b apres Sprint 7 complet (specifications nouveaux sprints + refontes B-XX)

## Tache 7.5a.1 -- Decisions strategiques 011-015 formalisees

**Sprint** : 7.5a (Phase 2.5 Migration -- Sprint 1/10 du sprint)
**Reference meta-prompt** : `B-7.5a-sprint-7.5a-assurflow-foundation.md` (CE document)
**Phase** : 2.5 -- Migration Assurflow
**Priorite** : P0 (foundation legale + strategique)
**Effort** : 3h
**Dependances** : Sprint 7 task 2.3.1 (catalog 90 perms livre)

### But

Formaliser **5 decisions strategiques majeures** prises lors de l'analyse v2.0 et v3.0 :
- Decision 011 : Rebranding Skalean = company / Assurflow = vertical InsurTech
- Decision 012 : 6 acteurs ecosystem (vs 3 v2.2)
- Decision 013 : Expert acteur central designe par carrier
- Decision 014 : PartsHub Phase 1 module integre Garage
- Decision 015 : Demo Day 30 juin 2026 scope complet

Chaque decision suit le format existant des decisions 001-010 (`00-pilotage/decisions/`).

### Contexte

Apres analyse strategique v2.0 (mai 2026) avec 29 corrections terrain Saad + analyse Courtizen + audit zip v2.2, plusieurs decisions strategiques **modifient profondement** le scope et l'architecture du programme. Ces decisions doivent etre FORMELLEMENT documentees pour :
1. Tracer les choix faits et les raisons
2. Referencer dans tous les sprints futurs
3. Etre auditees post-pilote pour ROI
4. Justifier les changements vs v2.2

### Livrables checkables

- [ ] Fichier `00-pilotage/decisions/011-assurflow-rebrand.md` cree (format identique decisions 001-010)
- [ ] Fichier `00-pilotage/decisions/012-6-acteurs-ecosystem.md` cree
- [ ] Fichier `00-pilotage/decisions/013-expert-acteur-central.md` cree
- [ ] Fichier `00-pilotage/decisions/014-partshub-phase1.md` cree
- [ ] Fichier `00-pilotage/decisions/015-demo-day-30-juin.md` cree
- [ ] Chaque decision contient : Contexte / Probleme / Decision / Strategie mitigation / Avantages / Inconvenients / Impact technique / Communication / References
- [ ] `00-pilotage/decisions/README.md` mis a jour avec 15 decisions (vs 10)
- [ ] Aucune emoji (decision-006 ABSOLUE)

Reference identique aux decisions 001-010 existantes :

```markdown
# Decision NNN -- Titre Court

**Date** : 2026-05-23
**Statut** : Acceptee
**Decideurs** : Saad (CTO), Abla (CEO)
**ADR mirror** : `repo/docs/architecture/ADR-NNN-titre.md`

---

## Contexte
## Probleme adresse
## Decision
## Strategie de mitigation pendant developpement
## Avantages
## Inconvenients
## Impact technique
## Communication

---

**Decision finale** : OK pour ...

**References** :
- decision-XXX-related.md
- B-NN-sprint-XX-...md
```

- Verifier coherence cross-references entre les 5 decisions
- Pas de code dans les decisions -- texte uniquement
- Markdown valide (titres + tableaux + listes)
- Ne pas modifier les decisions 001-010 existantes

## Tache 7.5a.2 -- AuthRole enum extension +12 roles

**Sprint** : 7.5a -- Sprint 2/10
**Phase** : 2.5 -- Migration Assurflow
**Priorite** : P0
**Effort** : 3h
**Dependances** : 7.5a.1 (decisions formalisees)

### But

Etendre l'enum `AuthRole` TypeScript du package `@insurtech/auth` pour passer de **12 roles a 24 roles** afin de couvrir les 6 acteurs ecosystem Assurflow v3.0.

### Contexte

Le code livre Sprint 5 (`repo/packages/auth/src/types/auth-roles.ts`) definit en dur les 12 roles actuels. Ces roles couvrent uniquement 3 acteurs (Broker + Garage + Customer/Assure). Pour couvrir les 3 acteurs additionnels Assurflow v3.0 (Carrier + Expert + Tow) + le role PartsHub, il faut ajouter 12 roles.

**Roles existants conserves** :
1. super_admin_platform
2. analyst_support
3. broker_admin
4. broker_user
5. broker_assistant
6. garage_admin
7. garage_chef
8. garage_technicien
9. garage_comptable
10. garage_commercial
11. assure
12. prospect

**12 nouveaux roles a ajouter** :

Carrier (6 roles) :
13. carrier_admin
14. carrier_claims_manager
15. carrier_finance
16. carrier_compliance
17. carrier_expert_manager
18. carrier_partner_manager

Expert (4 roles) :
19. expert_independent
20. expert_firm_admin
21. expert_associate
22. expert_carrier_internal

Tow (3 roles) :
23. tow_admin
24. tow_driver
25. tow_dispatcher

PartsHub Garage (1 role) :
26. garage_parts_manager

**Total : 26 roles ?** Verification : 12 + 6 + 4 + 3 + 1 = 26. Decision 012 mentionne 24 roles + 2 platform = 26 total. Coherent.

### Livrables checkables

- [ ] Fichier `repo/packages/auth/src/types/auth-roles.ts` modifie
- [ ] `AuthRole` enum contient 26 valeurs
- [ ] Doc strings JSDoc pour chaque nouveau role (description metier + hierarchie)
- [ ] Helper `isPlatformRole()` inchange (super_admin + analyst_support)
- [ ] Helper `isTenantRole()` etendu : broker x3 + garage x6 + carrier x6 + expert x4 + tow x3
- [ ] Helper `isBrokerRole()` inchange
- [ ] Helper `isGarageRole()` etendu (+ garage_parts_manager)
- [ ] **NOUVEAU** Helper `isCarrierRole()` : 6 roles carrier
- [ ] **NOUVEAU** Helper `isExpertRole()` : 4 roles expert
- [ ] **NOUVEAU** Helper `isTowRole()` : 3 roles tow
- [ ] Tests TS strict : aucun any implicite, exactOptionalPropertyTypes OK
- [ ] Tests unit `auth-roles.spec.ts` : couvrent 26 valeurs + helpers
- [ ] Build pnpm tsc --noEmit : 0 erreur
- [ ] Lint pnpm lint : 0 erreur

### Pattern critique : Extension enum

```typescript
// repo/packages/auth/src/types/auth-roles.ts

/**
 * @insurtech/auth/types/auth-roles
 *
 * Defines the 26 strict roles of the Assurflow v3.0 program (vs 12 in v2.2).
 * NEVER add a role without updating documentation/5-roles-permissions.md AND the RBAC service of Sprint 7.
 *
 * Hierarchy (from highest privilege to lowest):
 *   Platform Niveau 1     : super_admin_platform > analyst_support
 *   Tenant Broker N2      : broker_admin > broker_user > broker_assistant
 *   Tenant Garage N2      : garage_admin > garage_chef > garage_technicien (+ garage_comptable + garage_commercial + garage_parts_manager as siblings)
 *   Tenant Carrier N2     : carrier_admin > carrier_claims_manager > carrier_finance > carrier_compliance > carrier_expert_manager > carrier_partner_manager (siblings)
 *   Tenant Expert N2      : expert_firm_admin > expert_associate ; expert_independent (solo) ; expert_carrier_internal (carrier internal)
 *   Tenant Tow N2         : tow_admin > tow_dispatcher > tow_driver
 *   Assure N3             : assure
 *   Public                : prospect
 *
 * Reference :
 *   - 00-pilotage/documentation/5-roles-permissions.md (matrice 26 roles x 130 permissions)
 *   - 00-pilotage/decisions/012-6-acteurs-ecosystem.md
 *   - 00-pilotage/decisions/013-expert-acteur-central.md
 *   - 00-pilotage/decisions/014-partshub-phase1.md
 *   - Sprint 7.5a Tache 7.5a.2 (CE FICHIER)
 *   - Sprint 7 RBAC implementation (tache 2.3.2+)
 */

export enum AuthRole {
  // ==========================================
  // PLATFORM NIVEAU 1 -- Skalean staff
  // ==========================================
  /** Skalean platform staff -- full bypass RLS, manages all tenants */
  SuperAdminPlatform = 'super_admin_platform',
  /** Skalean platform staff -- read-only across all tenants for support N2 */
  AnalystSupport = 'analyst_support',

  // ==========================================
  // TENANT BROKER NIVEAU 2 -- Cabinet courtage
  // ==========================================
  /** Tenant broker -- admin of a courtage cabinet, full CRUD within tenant */
  BrokerAdmin = 'broker_admin',
  /** Tenant broker -- subscribing courtier, owns deals and policies */
  BrokerUser = 'broker_user',
  /** Tenant broker -- administrative assistant */
  BrokerAssistant = 'broker_assistant',

  // ==========================================
  // TENANT GARAGE NIVEAU 2 -- Garage repair shop
  // ==========================================
  /** Tenant garage -- admin of a repair garage, full CRUD within tenant */
  GarageAdmin = 'garage_admin',
  /** Tenant garage -- workshop manager, assigns sinistres */
  GarageChef = 'garage_chef',
  /** Tenant garage -- workshop technician, executes repairs (PWA mobile) */
  GarageTechnicien = 'garage_technicien',
  /** Tenant garage -- accounting staff, manages books + payments */
  GarageComptable = 'garage_comptable',
  /** Tenant garage -- commercial staff, manages devis */
  GarageCommercial = 'garage_commercial',
  /** Tenant garage -- parts manager, manages PartsHub orders + suppliers (NOUVEAU v3.0) */
  GaragePartsManager = 'garage_parts_manager',

  // ==========================================
  // TENANT CARRIER NIVEAU 2 -- Compagnie assurance (NOUVEAU v3.0)
  // ==========================================
  /** Tenant carrier -- admin of insurance company tenant, full CRUD within tenant */
  CarrierAdmin = 'carrier_admin',
  /** Tenant carrier -- claims operations manager (NOUVEAU v3.0) */
  CarrierClaimsManager = 'carrier_claims_manager',
  /** Tenant carrier -- finance staff (approves payments > 5000 MAD) (NOUVEAU v3.0) */
  CarrierFinance = 'carrier_finance',
  /** Tenant carrier -- compliance officer + DPO (ACAPS reports + audit) (NOUVEAU v3.0) */
  CarrierCompliance = 'carrier_compliance',
  /** Tenant carrier -- expert pool manager (designates experts on claims) (NOUVEAU v3.0) */
  CarrierExpertManager = 'carrier_expert_manager',
  /** Tenant carrier -- partner manager (brokers/garages/experts relationships) (NOUVEAU v3.0) */
  CarrierPartnerManager = 'carrier_partner_manager',

  // ==========================================
  // TENANT EXPERT NIVEAU 2 -- Expert auto agree ACAPS (NOUVEAU v3.0)
  // ==========================================
  /** Tenant expert -- independent expert agree ACAPS, solo practice (NOUVEAU v3.0) */
  ExpertIndependent = 'expert_independent',
  /** Tenant expert -- admin of expert firm, manages associates (NOUVEAU v3.0) */
  ExpertFirmAdmin = 'expert_firm_admin',
  /** Tenant expert -- associate in expert firm (NOUVEAU v3.0) */
  ExpertAssociate = 'expert_associate',
  /** Tenant expert -- expert internal to carrier (employed by insurance company) (NOUVEAU v3.0) */
  ExpertCarrierInternal = 'expert_carrier_internal',

  // ==========================================
  // TENANT TOW NIVEAU 2 -- Remorqueur (NOUVEAU v3.0)
  // ==========================================
  /** Tenant tow -- admin of towing company (multi-drivers) (NOUVEAU v3.0) */
  TowAdmin = 'tow_admin',
  /** Tenant tow -- driver remorqueur (mobile PWA Uber-style) (NOUVEAU v3.0) */
  TowDriver = 'tow_driver',
  /** Tenant tow -- dispatcher (assigns missions to drivers) (NOUVEAU v3.0) */
  TowDispatcher = 'tow_dispatcher',

  // ==========================================
  // ASSURE NIVEAU 3 -- L3 user in tenant
  // ==========================================
  /** End user -- assured client connected to assure-portal apps */
  Assure = 'assure',

  // ==========================================
  // PROSPECT PUBLIC -- pas auth
  // ==========================================
  /** Public visitor -- non-authenticated or signing up */
  Prospect = 'prospect',
}

// ==========================================
// HELPER GUARDS
// ==========================================

/**
 * Type guard: is this role a Platform-level role (Niveau 1)?
 * Platform roles bypass tenant isolation (no tenant_id required in JWT).
 * MUST be checked before any tenant_id comparison logic.
 */
export function isPlatformRole(role: AuthRole): boolean {
  return role === AuthRole.SuperAdminPlatform || role === AuthRole.AnalystSupport;
}

/**
 * Type guard: is this role a Tenant-level role (Niveau 2)?
 * Tenant roles require tenant_id in JWT. Operations are scoped to that tenant.
 */
export function isTenantRole(role: AuthRole): boolean {
  return isBrokerRole(role) || isGarageRole(role) || isCarrierRole(role) || isExpertRole(role) || isTowRole(role);
}

/** Type guard: is this role specific to broker tenants (cabinet courtage)? */
export function isBrokerRole(role: AuthRole): boolean {
  return (
    role === AuthRole.BrokerAdmin ||
    role === AuthRole.BrokerUser ||
    role === AuthRole.BrokerAssistant
  );
}

/** Type guard: is this role specific to garage tenants (repair shop)? */
export function isGarageRole(role: AuthRole): boolean {
  return (
    role === AuthRole.GarageAdmin ||
    role === AuthRole.GarageChef ||
    role === AuthRole.GarageTechnicien ||
    role === AuthRole.GarageComptable ||
    role === AuthRole.GarageCommercial ||
    role === AuthRole.GaragePartsManager  // NOUVEAU v3.0
  );
}

/** Type guard: is this role specific to carrier tenants (insurance company)? -- NOUVEAU v3.0 */
export function isCarrierRole(role: AuthRole): boolean {
  return (
    role === AuthRole.CarrierAdmin ||
    role === AuthRole.CarrierClaimsManager ||
    role === AuthRole.CarrierFinance ||
    role === AuthRole.CarrierCompliance ||
    role === AuthRole.CarrierExpertManager ||
    role === AuthRole.CarrierPartnerManager
  );
}

/** Type guard: is this role specific to expert tenants (claims experts)? -- NOUVEAU v3.0 */
export function isExpertRole(role: AuthRole): boolean {
  return (
    role === AuthRole.ExpertIndependent ||
    role === AuthRole.ExpertFirmAdmin ||
    role === AuthRole.ExpertAssociate ||
    role === AuthRole.ExpertCarrierInternal
  );
}

/** Type guard: is this role specific to tow tenants (towing company)? -- NOUVEAU v3.0 */
export function isTowRole(role: AuthRole): boolean {
  return (
    role === AuthRole.TowAdmin ||
    role === AuthRole.TowDriver ||
    role === AuthRole.TowDispatcher
  );
}

/** Type guard: is this role the L3 Assure (end user in tenant)? */
export function isAssureRole(role: AuthRole): boolean {
  return role === AuthRole.Assure;
}

/** Type guard: is this role public (non-authenticated)? */
export function isPublicRole(role: AuthRole): boolean {
  return role === AuthRole.Prospect;
}
```

### Notes implementation

1. **Naming TypeScript** : utiliser PascalCase pour enum keys (CarrierAdmin, ExpertIndependent, TowDriver)
2. **String values** : utiliser snake_case (carrier_admin, expert_independent, tow_driver) -- coherent avec roles existants
3. **Comment "NOUVEAU v3.0"** : marquer explicitement les nouveaux roles pour navigation future
4. **Helper ordering** : isPlatformRole, isTenantRole, isBrokerRole, isGarageRole, isCarrierRole, isExpertRole, isTowRole, isAssureRole, isPublicRole
5. **Pas de helper combine** : ne pas creer `isBusinessRole` ou similaire -- garder atomique
6. **Tests** : verifier que TOUS les 26 roles passent au moins UN helper specifique
7. **Code dupplication minimisee** : utiliser `isTenantRole()` = union des 5 isXxxRole pour eviter duplication

### Criteres validation V1-V10

| V1 | AuthRole enum contient 26 valeurs | P0 |
| V2 | 12 roles existants inchanges (string values + keys) | P0 |
| V3 | 14 nouveaux roles ajoutes correctement | P0 |
| V4 | Helper `isCarrierRole()` cree et fonctionnel | P0 |
| V5 | Helper `isExpertRole()` cree et fonctionnel | P0 |
| V6 | Helper `isTowRole()` cree et fonctionnel | P0 |
| V7 | Helper `isGarageRole()` etendu avec garage_parts_manager | P0 |
| V8 | Tests unit auth-roles.spec.ts couvre les 26 valeurs | P0 |
| V9 | Build pnpm tsc --noEmit : 0 erreur | P0 |

## Tache 7.5a.3 -- CrossTenantAuthorizationType extension +4 types

**Sprint** : 7.5a -- Sprint 3/10
**Phase** : 2.5 -- Migration Assurflow
**Priorite** : P0
**Effort** : 2h
**Dependances** : 7.5a.2 (AuthRole etendu)

### But

Etendre le type union TypeScript `CrossTenantAuthorizationType` du package `@insurtech/database` pour passer de **3 a 7 types** afin de couvrir les workflows v3.0 (commande remorqueur + livraison + communication expert + envoi carrier en CC).

### Contexte

Le code livre Sprint 6 (`repo/packages/database/src/entities/system/cross-tenant-authorization.entity.ts`) definit le type union avec 3 valeurs. Pour couvrir les nouveaux workflows Assurflow v3.0, il faut ajouter 4 types :

**Types existants conserves** :
1. `broker_to_garage_assignment` -- broker assigne sinistre a garage
2. `assure_to_garage_visit` -- assure visite garage (selection M8)
3. `multi_tenant_user_access` -- super admin platform-level

**4 nouveaux types** (decision 012) :
4. `client_to_tower_dispatch` -- client commande remorqueur via app
5. `tower_to_garage_delivery` -- remorqueur livre vehicule au garage
6. `garage_to_expert_request` -- garage communique avec expert designe
7. `garage_to_carrier_quote` -- garage envoie info devis a carrier en CC

### Livrables checkables

- [ ] Fichier `repo/packages/database/src/entities/system/cross-tenant-authorization.entity.ts` modifie
- [ ] `CrossTenantAuthorizationType` union contient 7 valeurs
- [ ] Commentaires JSDoc pour chaque nouveau type (description metier + duree validite)
- [ ] Type `CrossTenantResourceType` etendu si necessaire (sinistre, police, devis, facture, tenant, **mission, expertise**)
- [ ] Helper TypeScript `isCarrierCcAuthorization()` cree si pertinent
- [ ] Tests unit covering 7 types
- [ ] Build pnpm tsc --noEmit : 0 erreur
- [ ] Lint pnpm lint : 0 erreur

### Pattern critique : Extension union type

```typescript
// repo/packages/database/src/entities/system/cross-tenant-authorization.entity.ts

/**
 * Cross-tenant authorization types (Sprint 6 framework + Sprint 7.5a extension v3.0).
 *
 * v2.2 had 3 types. v3.0 adds 4 types to cover Assurflow ecosystem 6 acteurs workflows.
 *
 * Reference :
 *   - 00-pilotage/decisions/012-6-acteurs-ecosystem.md
 *   - 00-pilotage/decisions/013-expert-acteur-central.md
 *   - Sprint 7.5a Tache 7.5a.3 (CE FICHIER)
 *   - B-25 Cross-Tenant Framework (sera etendu Sprint 7.5b)
 */
export type CrossTenantAuthorizationType =
  // ============ EXISTING v2.2 (Sprint 6) ============
  /** Broker A assigns sinistre to garage B. Broker can follow status, garage can access limited sinistre data. */
  | 'broker_to_garage_assignment'
  /** Assure visits garage B (own selection M8) without transfering tenant. Garage sees relevant assure policies. */
  | 'assure_to_garage_visit'
  /** Super_admin_platform / analyst_support has cross-tenant access via /api/v1/admin/* */
  | 'multi_tenant_user_access'
  
  // ============ NOUVEAU v3.0 (Sprint 7.5a) ============
  /** Client dispatches tow mission to tow driver. Time-bounded to mission duration. (NOUVEAU v3.0) */
  | 'client_to_tower_dispatch'
  /** Tow driver delivers vehicle to garage. Time-bounded to delivery completion. (NOUVEAU v3.0) */
  | 'tower_to_garage_delivery'
  /** Garage communicates with expert designated by carrier. Carrier in CC. Time-bounded 30 days. (NOUVEAU v3.0) */
  | 'garage_to_expert_request'
  /** Garage sends quote info to carrier (in CC after expert validation). Time-bounded 30 days. (NOUVEAU v3.0) */
  | 'garage_to_carrier_quote';

export type CrossTenantResourceType =
  // EXISTING v2.2
  | 'sinistre'
  | 'police'
  | 'devis'
  | 'facture'
  | 'tenant'
  // NOUVEAU v3.0
  | 'mission'           // tow mission
  | 'expertise'         // expert report
  | 'parts_order';      // PartsHub order

// Helper guard if needed
export function requiresTimeBoundedAuthorization(type: CrossTenantAuthorizationType): boolean {
  // All types except multi_tenant_user_access are time-bounded
  return type !== 'multi_tenant_user_access';
}
```

### Notes implementation

1. **String values exactes** : utiliser snake_case identique aux 3 existants
2. **JSDoc detaille** : decrire pour chaque type qui peut creer + qui peut consommer + duree typique
3. **Resource types etendus** : ajouter `mission`, `expertise`, `parts_order` pour couvrir nouveaux workflows
4. **Helper time-bounded** : utile pour ABAC service Sprint 7 tache 2.3.7
5. **Tests** : verifier que les 7 types sont accepts par TypeScript

|----|---------|----------|
| V1 | CrossTenantAuthorizationType contient 7 valeurs | P0 |
| V2 | 3 types existants inchanges | P0 |
| V3 | 4 nouveaux types ajoutes | P0 |
| V4 | CrossTenantResourceType etendu (mission, expertise, parts_order) | P0 |
| V5 | JSDoc detaille pour chaque type | P1 |
| V6 | Tests unit covering 7 types | P0 |
| V7 | Build pnpm tsc --noEmit : 0 erreur | P0 |
| V8 | Lint pnpm lint : 0 erreur | P0 |

## Tache 7.5a.4 -- DB migration cross_tenant CHECK + nouvelle table expert_designations

**Sprint** : 7.5a -- Sprint 4/10
**Phase** : 2.5 -- Migration Assurflow
**Priorite** : P0
**Effort** : 3h
**Dependances** : 7.5a.3 (CrossTenantAuthorizationType etendu)

### But

Migrer la base de donnees PostgreSQL pour :
1. Etendre le CHECK constraint sur `cross_tenant_authorizations.type` (7 valeurs)
2. Creer la nouvelle table `expert_designations` (pour workflow expert sprint 22.7)
3. Maintenir compatibilite des donnees existantes (0 leak, no breaking change)

### Contexte

La table `cross_tenant_authorizations` (Sprint 6) a un CHECK constraint qui limite les valeurs `type` aux 3 actuelles. Avec l'ajout de 4 nouveaux types Sprint 7.5a.3, il faut migrer ce constraint.

Aussi, la nouvelle table `expert_designations` permet de tracer la designation d'un expert par un carrier sur un dossier sinistre (workflow decision-013).

### Livrables checkables

- [ ] Fichier migration TypeORM `repo/packages/database/src/migrations/{timestamp}-Sprint7-5a-CrossTenantV3.ts` cree
- [ ] Migration ALTER TABLE cross_tenant_authorizations DROP CONSTRAINT + ADD CONSTRAINT (7 valeurs)
- [ ] Migration CREATE TABLE expert_designations avec RLS active
- [ ] Migration `up()` + `down()` symetriques
- [ ] Tests migration : up + down + idempotent
- [ ] Tests integration : insertion 4 nouveaux types passent
- [ ] Tests integration : insertion type invalide rejete
- [ ] Schema `3-schemas-database-PARTIE2.sql` update si necessaire
- [ ] Run integration tests : 0 regression

### Pattern critique : Migration TypeORM

```typescript
// repo/packages/database/src/migrations/{timestamp}-Sprint7-5a-CrossTenantV3.ts

import type { MigrationInterface, QueryRunner } from 'typeorm';

export class Sprint75aCrossTenantV3${timestamp} implements MigrationInterface {
  name = 'Sprint75aCrossTenantV3${timestamp}';

  async up(queryRunner: QueryRunner): Promise<void> {
    // ============ STEP 1 : Extend CHECK constraint on cross_tenant_authorizations.type ============
    
    // Drop existing constraint
    await queryRunner.query(`
      ALTER TABLE cross_tenant_authorizations 
      DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS cross_tenant_authorizations_type_check;
    `);
    
    // Add new constraint with 7 values
    await queryRunner.query(`
      ALTER TABLE cross_tenant_authorizations 
      ADD CONSTRAINT cross_tenant_authorizations_type_check 
      CHECK (type IN (
        -- Existing v2.2
        'broker_to_garage_assignment',
        'assure_to_garage_visit',
        'multi_tenant_user_access',
        -- New v3.0
        'client_to_tower_dispatch',
        'tower_to_garage_delivery',
        'garage_to_expert_request',
        'garage_to_carrier_quote'
      ));
    `);

    // ============ STEP 2 : Extend resource_type CHECK if needed ============
    
    // Verify if resource_type CHECK exists
    const resourceTypeCheck = await queryRunner.query(`
      SELECT conname FROM pg_constraint 
      WHERE conrelid = 'cross_tenant_authorizations'::regclass 
        AND conname LIKE '%resource_type%';
    `);
    
    if (resourceTypeCheck.length > 0) {
      await queryRunner.query(`
        ALTER TABLE cross_tenant_authorizations 
        DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS cross_tenant_authorizations_resource_type_check;
      `);
      
      await queryRunner.query(`
        ALTER TABLE cross_tenant_authorizations 
        ADD CONSTRAINT cross_tenant_authorizations_resource_type_check 
        CHECK (resource_type IS NULL OR resource_type IN (
          -- Existing v2.2
          'sinistre', 'police', 'devis', 'facture', 'tenant',
          -- New v3.0
          'mission', 'expertise', 'parts_order'
        ));
      `);
    }

    // ============ STEP 3 : Create expert_designations table ============
    
    await queryRunner.query(`
      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS expert_designations (
        id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
        tenant_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES auth_tenants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
        
        -- Carrier designating
        carrier_tenant_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES auth_tenants(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
        carrier_user_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES auth_users(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
        
        -- Expert designated
        expert_tenant_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES auth_tenants(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
        expert_user_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES auth_users(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
        
        -- Sinistre reference (will FK to insure_sinistres in Sprint 14)
        sinistre_id uuid NOT NULL,
        
        -- Status workflow
        status text NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('designated', 'accepted', 'rejected', 'completed', 'cancelled')),
        designated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
        accepted_at timestamptz,
        rejected_at timestamptz,
        rejection_reason text,
        completed_at timestamptz,
        
        -- Metadata
        notes text,
        created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
        updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
      );
    `);

    // Indexes
    await queryRunner.query(`
      CREATE INDEX idx_expert_designations_tenant ON expert_designations(tenant_id);
      CREATE INDEX idx_expert_designations_carrier ON expert_designations(carrier_tenant_id);
      CREATE INDEX idx_expert_designations_expert ON expert_designations(expert_tenant_id);
      CREATE INDEX idx_expert_designations_sinistre ON expert_designations(sinistre_id);
      CREATE INDEX idx_expert_designations_status ON expert_designations(status);
    `);

    // Enable RLS on expert_designations
    await queryRunner.query(`
      ALTER TABLE expert_designations ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
      ALTER TABLE expert_designations FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
    `);

    // RLS policy : accessible by tenant_id (using existing helper)
    await queryRunner.query(`
      CREATE POLICY expert_designations_tenant_isolation 
      ON expert_designations 
      USING (app_can_access_tenant(tenant_id));
    `);

    // Trigger updated_at
    await queryRunner.query(`
      CREATE TRIGGER trigger_expert_designations_updated_at
      BEFORE UPDATE ON expert_designations
      FOR EACH ROW
      EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();
    `);
  }

  async down(queryRunner: QueryRunner): Promise<void> {
    // Down : revert in reverse order
    
    // Drop expert_designations table
    await queryRunner.query(`DROP TABLE IF EXISTS expert_designations CASCADE;`);
    
    // Restore cross_tenant_authorizations CHECK to 3 values
    await queryRunner.query(`
      ALTER TABLE cross_tenant_authorizations 
      DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS cross_tenant_authorizations_type_check;
    `);
    await queryRunner.query(`
      ALTER TABLE cross_tenant_authorizations 
      ADD CONSTRAINT cross_tenant_authorizations_type_check 
      CHECK (type IN (
        'broker_to_garage_assignment',
        'assure_to_garage_visit',
        'multi_tenant_user_access'
      ));
    `);
    
    // Restore resource_type CHECK to 5 values
    const resourceTypeCheck = await queryRunner.query(`
      SELECT conname FROM pg_constraint 
      WHERE conrelid = 'cross_tenant_authorizations'::regclass 
        AND conname LIKE '%resource_type%';
    `);
    
    if (resourceTypeCheck.length > 0) {
      await queryRunner.query(`
        ALTER TABLE cross_tenant_authorizations 
        DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS cross_tenant_authorizations_resource_type_check;
      `);
      await queryRunner.query(`
        ALTER TABLE cross_tenant_authorizations 
        ADD CONSTRAINT cross_tenant_authorizations_resource_type_check 
        CHECK (resource_type IS NULL OR resource_type IN (
          'sinistre', 'police', 'devis', 'facture', 'tenant'
        ));
      `);
    }
  }
}
```

### Notes implementation

1. **Timestamp migration** : utiliser format ISO 8601 (e.g. `20260524-Sprint7-5a-CrossTenantV3.ts`)
2. **CHECK constraint** : utiliser `IF EXISTS` pour idempotence
3. **expert_designations** : ne PAS creer FK vers `insure_sinistres` car cette table n'existe pas encore (Sprint 14). Juste typer en uuid.
4. **RLS** : appliquer `ENABLE` + `FORCE` ROW LEVEL SECURITY pour coherence avec 33 tables Sprint 6
5. **Helper `app_can_access_tenant`** : reutilise existant Sprint 6 (extension Sprint 7.5a.5)
6. **Trigger updated_at** : utiliser fonction existante `update_updated_at_column()` Sprint 1
7. **Tests integration** : verifier 7 types acceptes + insertion type invalide rejete
8. **Tests RLS** : verifier isolation expert_designations entre tenants

### Criteres validation V1-V10

| V1 | Migration TypeORM fichier cree | P0 |
| V2 | up() execute sans erreur | P0 |
| V3 | down() execute sans erreur (symetrique) | P0 |
| V4 | CHECK constraint type accepte 7 valeurs | P0 |
| V5 | Table expert_designations creee avec RLS active | P0 |
| V6 | Tests integration : insertion 4 nouveaux types passe | P0 |
| V7 | Tests integration : insertion type invalide rejete | P0 |
| V8 | Tests RLS expert_designations isolation tenant | P0 |
| V9 | Aucune regression sur 33 tables RLS existantes | P0 |

## Tache 7.5a.5 -- Helper postgres app_can_access_tenant() update

**Sprint** : 7.5a -- Sprint 5/10
**Phase** : 2.5 -- Migration Assurflow
**Priorite** : P0
**Effort** : 2h
**Dependances** : 7.5a.4 (migration DB executee)

### But

Etendre la fonction PostgreSQL helper `app_can_access_tenant()` pour supporter les 4 nouveaux types cross-tenant authorizations dans les politiques RLS.

### Contexte

Sprint 6 a livre le helper `app_can_access_tenant(target_tenant uuid)` qui evalue :
- Cond 1 : current_user = super_admin (bypass)
- Cond 2 : app.current_tenant_id = target_tenant (own tenant)
- Cond 3 : autorisation cross-tenant active pour ce user/target

Cette fonction est utilisee dans 33 RLS policies actuelles. Avec 4 nouveaux types cross-tenant, **la logique Cond 3 doit etre etendue** pour reconnaitre les nouveaux types.

### Livrables checkables

- [ ] Fichier SQL helper `repo/packages/database/src/postgres/helpers/app-can-access-tenant.sql` modifie
- [ ] Migration TypeORM `repo/packages/database/src/migrations/{timestamp}-Sprint7-5a-RlsHelperUpdate.ts` cree (CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION)
- [ ] Fonction etendue accepte 7 types dans Cond 3
- [ ] Pas de regression sur 33 tables RLS existantes
- [ ] Tests SQL : verifier les 7 types fonctionnent correctement
- [ ] Tests RLS : 50+ scenarios passent (no regression)
- [ ] Documentation `5-roles-permissions.md` mentionne nouveaux types

### Pattern critique : Helper Postgres etendu

```sql
-- repo/packages/database/src/postgres/helpers/app-can-access-tenant.sql

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION app_can_access_tenant(target_tenant uuid)
RETURNS boolean
LANGUAGE plpgsql
STABLE
SECURITY DEFINER
AS $$
BEGIN
  -- ============ COND 1 : SUPER ADMIN BYPASS ============
  IF current_setting('app.is_super_admin', true) = 'true' THEN
    RETURN true;
  END IF;
  
  -- ============ COND 2 : OWN TENANT ============
  IF current_setting('app.current_tenant_id', true) = target_tenant::text THEN
    RETURN true;
  END IF;
  
  -- ============ COND 3 : CROSS-TENANT AUTHORIZATION ============
  -- Check active authorization between current tenant and target tenant
  -- v3.0 : supports 7 types
  
  IF EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM cross_tenant_authorizations cta
    WHERE 
      -- Active authorization
      cta.revoked_at IS NULL
      AND cta.expires_at > NOW()
      -- Match types v3.0 (7 valeurs)
      AND cta.type IN (
        -- Existing v2.2
        'broker_to_garage_assignment',
        'assure_to_garage_visit',
        'multi_tenant_user_access',
        -- New v3.0 (Sprint 7.5a)
        'client_to_tower_dispatch',
        'tower_to_garage_delivery',
        'garage_to_expert_request',
        'garage_to_carrier_quote'
      )
      -- Match current tenant <-> target tenant
      AND (
        (cta.from_tenant_id::text = current_setting('app.current_tenant_id', true) 
          AND cta.to_tenant_id = target_tenant)
        OR
        (cta.to_tenant_id::text = current_setting('app.current_tenant_id', true) 
          AND cta.from_tenant_id = target_tenant)
      )
  ) THEN
    RETURN true;
  END IF;
  
  -- Default : access denied
  RETURN false;
END;
$$;

-- Grant execute to applicative role
GRANT EXECUTE ON FUNCTION app_can_access_tenant(uuid) TO insurtech_app;

-- Documentation comment
COMMENT ON FUNCTION app_can_access_tenant(uuid) IS 
'Returns true if current session can access the target tenant.
Logic:
  1. Bypass if current user is super_admin (app.is_super_admin = true)
  2. Allow if target tenant = current tenant (app.current_tenant_id)
  3. Allow if active cross-tenant authorization exists (7 types v3.0)
  
v3.0 (Sprint 7.5a) : extended from 3 to 7 cross-tenant authorization types.
Reference : 00-pilotage/decisions/012-6-acteurs-ecosystem.md';
```

### Notes implementation

1. **CREATE OR REPLACE** : preserve existing function signature (no breaking change)
2. **SECURITY DEFINER** : fonction execute avec privileges du proprietaire (postgres role)
3. **STABLE** : fonction deterministe pour la duree d'une transaction (optimisation Postgres)
4. **GRANT EXECUTE** : doit etre regranted apres CREATE OR REPLACE
5. **Tests integration** : tester les 7 types + scenarios timeout (expires_at) + revoke (revoked_at)
6. **Performance** : index partiel `WHERE revoked_at IS NULL AND expires_at > NOW()` (deja existant Sprint 6)
7. **No regression** : verifier que les 50+ scenarios RLS Sprint 6 passent toujours

### Criteres validation V1-V10

| ID | Critere | Priorite |
|----|---------|----------|
| V1 | Migration TypeORM CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION executee | P0 |
| V2 | Fonction etendue accepte les 7 types | P0 |
| V3 | Cond 1 (super admin bypass) inchangee | P0 |
| V4 | Cond 2 (own tenant) inchangee | P0 |
| V5 | Cond 3 (cross-tenant) etendue avec 4 nouveaux types | P0 |
| V6 | Tests SQL pour chacun des 7 types | P0 |
| V7 | Tests RLS 50+ scenarios PASS (no regression) | P0 |
| V8 | Helper grant execute applicatif renouvele | P0 |
| V9 | Comment SQL function mis a jour | P1 |
| V10 | Performance benchmark : fonction <1ms en moyenne | P1 |

## Tache 7.5a.6 -- Catalog permissions extension (~130 perms)

**Sprint** : 7.5a -- Sprint 6/10
**Phase** : 2.5 -- Migration Assurflow
**Priorite** : P0
**Effort** : 4h
**Dependances** : 7.5a.5 (RLS helper etendu)

### But

Etendre le catalog 90 permissions de Sprint 7 tache 2.3.1 pour passer a **~130 permissions** couvrant les 6 acteurs ecosystem (Carrier + Expert + Tow + PartsHub).

### Contexte

Sprint 7 tache 2.3.1 a livre 90 permissions catalogees en 20 modules (commit 15e80cb). Pour couvrir les nouveaux acteurs Assurflow v3.0, il faut ajouter ~40 permissions reparties en 4 nouveaux modules :

| Module | Permissions ajoutees |
|--------|----------------------|
| **carrier** (NOUVEAU) | ~15 |
| **expertise** (NOUVEAU) | ~10 |
| **tow** (NOUVEAU) | ~8 |
| **parts** (NOUVEAU PartsHub) | ~7 |
| **Total ajoute** | **~40** |

### Livrables checkables

- [ ] Fichier `repo/packages/auth/src/rbac/permissions-catalog.ts` modifie (ou nouveau si necessaire)
- [ ] ~40 nouvelles permissions ajoutees en format `{module}.{action}` ou `{module}.{resource}.{action}`
- [ ] 4 nouveaux modules : carrier, expertise, tow, parts
- [ ] Permissions strictement typees TypeScript (literal type union)
- [ ] Tests catalog : 130 permissions uniques, pas de doublon
- [ ] Documentation `00-pilotage/documentation/5-roles-permissions.md` etendu avec les 40 nouveaux

### Pattern critique : Catalog permissions etendu

```typescript
// repo/packages/auth/src/rbac/permissions-catalog.ts (extension)

/**
 * Permissions catalog v3.0 -- 130 permissions across 24 modules.
 *
 * Format : '{module}.{resource}.{action}' or '{module}.{action}'
 *
 * v2.2 (Sprint 7 tache 2.3.1) : 90 permissions x 20 modules.
 * v3.0 (Sprint 7.5a tache 7.5a.6) : +40 permissions x 4 new modules (carrier, expertise, tow, parts).
 *
 * Reference :
 *   - 00-pilotage/documentation/5-roles-permissions.md
 *   - 00-pilotage/decisions/012-6-acteurs-ecosystem.md
 *   - 00-pilotage/decisions/013-expert-acteur-central.md
 *   - 00-pilotage/decisions/014-partshub-phase1.md
 */
export const PERMISSIONS_CATALOG_V3 = {
  // ============ EXISTING v2.2 (Sprint 7 tache 2.3.1) ============
  // ... 90 existing permissions preserved ...
  
  // ============ NEW v3.0 (Sprint 7.5a tache 7.5a.6) ============
  
  // ----- CARRIER MODULE (15 permissions) -----
  CARRIER_DASHBOARD_READ: 'carrier.dashboard.read',
  CARRIER_CLAIMS_READ: 'carrier.claims.read',
  CARRIER_CLAIMS_READ_ALL: 'carrier.claims.read_all',
  CARRIER_PAYMENT_APPROVE_L1: 'carrier.payment.approve_level1',  // claims_manager < 5000 MAD
  CARRIER_PAYMENT_APPROVE_L2: 'carrier.payment.approve_level2',  // + finance 5000-20000 MAD
  CARRIER_PAYMENT_APPROVE_L3: 'carrier.payment.approve_level3',  // + director 20000-100000 MAD
  CARRIER_PAYMENT_APPROVE_L4: 'carrier.payment.approve_level4',  // + CFO > 100000 MAD
  CARRIER_PAYMENT_REJECT: 'carrier.payment.reject',
  CARRIER_EXPERTS_DESIGNATE: 'carrier.experts.designate',
  CARRIER_EXPERTS_READ_POOL: 'carrier.experts.read_pool',
  CARRIER_EXPERTS_EVALUATE: 'carrier.experts.evaluate',
  CARRIER_PARTNERS_READ_STATS: 'carrier.partners.read_stats',
  CARRIER_COMPLIANCE_REPORTS_GENERATE: 'carrier.compliance.reports.generate',
  CARRIER_FRAUD_ALERTS_READ: 'carrier.fraud.alerts.read',
  CARRIER_BROKERS_MANAGE: 'carrier.brokers.manage',
  
  // ----- EXPERTISE MODULE (10 permissions) -----
  EXPERTISE_MISSIONS_READ: 'expertise.missions.read',
  EXPERTISE_MISSIONS_ACCEPT: 'expertise.missions.accept',
  EXPERTISE_MISSIONS_REJECT: 'expertise.missions.reject',
  EXPERTISE_EXECUTE: 'expertise.execute',
  EXPERTISE_VALIDATE_QUOTE: 'expertise.validate_quote',
  EXPERTISE_MODIFY_QUOTE: 'expertise.modify_quote',
  EXPERTISE_REJECT_QUOTE: 'expertise.reject_quote',
  EXPERTISE_REPORT_CREATE: 'expertise.report.create',
  EXPERTISE_REPORT_SIGN: 'expertise.report.sign',
  EXPERTISE_HONORAIRES_INVOICE: 'expertise.honoraires.invoice',
  
  // ----- TOW MODULE (8 permissions) -----
  TOW_MISSIONS_READ_AVAILABLE: 'tow.missions.read_available',
  TOW_MISSIONS_ACCEPT: 'tow.missions.accept',
  TOW_MISSIONS_REJECT: 'tow.missions.reject',
  TOW_MISSIONS_COMPLETE: 'tow.missions.complete',
  TOW_VEHICLE_PHOTOS_UPLOAD: 'tow.vehicle.photos.upload',
  TOW_AVAILABILITY_TOGGLE: 'tow.availability.toggle',
  TOW_EARNINGS_READ: 'tow.earnings.read',
  TOW_DRIVERS_MANAGE: 'tow.drivers.manage',  // tow_admin only
  
  // ----- PARTS HUB MODULE (7 permissions) -----
  PARTS_SUPPLIERS_READ: 'parts.suppliers.read',
  PARTS_SUPPLIERS_ADD_FAVORITE: 'parts.suppliers.add_to_favorites',
  PARTS_ORDERS_CREATE: 'parts.orders.create',
  PARTS_ORDERS_READ: 'parts.orders.read',
  PARTS_ORDERS_CANCEL: 'parts.orders.cancel_within_window',
  PARTS_COMMISSION_VIEW: 'parts.commission.view_dashboard',
  PARTS_INVOICES_READ: 'parts.invoices.read',
} as const;

export type PermissionValue = typeof PERMISSIONS_CATALOG_V3[keyof typeof PERMISSIONS_CATALOG_V3];

// Total permissions count check (compile-time)
export const PERMISSIONS_COUNT_V3 = Object.keys(PERMISSIONS_CATALOG_V3).length; // Should be 130
```

### Notes implementation

1. **Naming convention** : `{module}.{resource?}.{action}` -- garder coherent avec 90 existantes
2. **Constants TypeScript** : `as const` pour type narrow + literal type union
3. **Modules atomiques** : carrier / expertise / tow / parts (pas de melange)
4. **Permissions de wildcard** : ne pas ajouter `carrier.*` -- explicite chaque permission
5. **Tests** : verifier 130 permissions uniques + pas de doublon
6. **Documentation** : mettre a jour `5-roles-permissions.md` avec matrice 26 roles x 130 perms

## Tache 7.5a.8 -- Tests RBAC + RLS additionnels (no regression)

**Sprint** : 7.5a -- Sprint 8/10
**Phase** : 2.5 -- Migration Assurflow
**Priorite** : P0
**Effort** : 3h
**Dependances** : 7.5a.7 (documentation mise a jour)

### But

Lancer une **suite de tests complete** pour valider :
1. 0 regression sur 1071+ tests existants
2. Nouveaux tests pour les 14 nouveaux roles + 4 nouveaux cross-tenant types
3. Tests RLS 50+ scenarios incluant nouveaux types

### Livrables checkables

- [ ] Tests unit AuthRole : 26 roles testes
- [ ] Tests guards : isCarrierRole / isExpertRole / isTowRole testes
- [ ] Tests CrossTenantAuthorizationType : 7 valeurs testees
- [ ] Tests migration DB : up + down + idempotent
- [ ] Tests RLS expert_designations isolation tenant
- [ ] Tests helper postgres app_can_access_tenant avec 7 types
- [ ] Tests catalog permissions : 130 perms uniques
- [ ] Suite complete `pnpm test` : 0 regression sur 1071+ existants
- [ ] Suite tests integration `pnpm test:integration` : 0 regression
- [ ] Coverage >= 85% global, 90% modules critiques (auth, database)

### Pattern critique : Tests verification

```typescript
// repo/packages/auth/src/types/auth-roles.spec.ts

import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { 
  AuthRole, 
  isPlatformRole, 
  isTenantRole, 
  isBrokerRole, 
  isGarageRole,
  isCarrierRole, 
  isExpertRole, 
  isTowRole,
  isAssureRole,
  isPublicRole 
} from './auth-roles.js';

describe('AuthRole v3.0 (26 roles)', () => {
  it('should have 26 total roles', () => {
    const allRoles = Object.values(AuthRole);
    expect(allRoles.length).toBe(26);
  });

  it('should have 2 platform roles', () => {
    const platformRoles = Object.values(AuthRole).filter(isPlatformRole);
    expect(platformRoles.length).toBe(2);
  });

  it('should have 6 carrier roles', () => {
    const carrierRoles = Object.values(AuthRole).filter(isCarrierRole);
    expect(carrierRoles.length).toBe(6);
    expect(carrierRoles).toContain(AuthRole.CarrierAdmin);
    expect(carrierRoles).toContain(AuthRole.CarrierClaimsManager);
    expect(carrierRoles).toContain(AuthRole.CarrierFinance);
    expect(carrierRoles).toContain(AuthRole.CarrierCompliance);
    expect(carrierRoles).toContain(AuthRole.CarrierExpertManager);
    expect(carrierRoles).toContain(AuthRole.CarrierPartnerManager);
  });

  it('should have 4 expert roles', () => {
    const expertRoles = Object.values(AuthRole).filter(isExpertRole);
    expect(expertRoles.length).toBe(4);
  });

  it('should have 3 tow roles', () => {
    const towRoles = Object.values(AuthRole).filter(isTowRole);
    expect(towRoles.length).toBe(3);
  });

  it('should have 6 garage roles including garage_parts_manager', () => {
    const garageRoles = Object.values(AuthRole).filter(isGarageRole);
    expect(garageRoles.length).toBe(6);
    expect(garageRoles).toContain(AuthRole.GaragePartsManager);
  });

  it('should not allow new carrier roles to be platform roles', () => {
    expect(isPlatformRole(AuthRole.CarrierAdmin)).toBe(false);
  });

  it('every role should pass exactly one specific role guard (mutual exclusivity)', () => {
    for (const role of Object.values(AuthRole)) {
      const guards = [
        isPlatformRole(role),
        isBrokerRole(role),
        isGarageRole(role),
        isCarrierRole(role),
        isExpertRole(role),
        isTowRole(role),
        isAssureRole(role),
        isPublicRole(role)
      ];
      const trueCount = guards.filter(Boolean).length;
      expect(trueCount).toBe(1);
    }
  });
});
```

### Livrables checkables

- [ ] Commit conventional : `feat(sprint-7.5a): assurflow v3.0 foundation (26 roles + 7 cross-tenant types + 130 perms)`
- [ ] Commit body <= 200 chars incluant references
- [ ] Tag Git : `sprint-7.5a-complete-v3-foundation`
- [ ] Update CHECKLIST-MASTER-EXECUTION.md (section 2.2 cochee)
- [ ] Tests CI/CD GitHub Actions PASS (a posteriori)
- [ ] Push branche + tag

### Pattern critique : Commit conventional

```bash
# Stage all changes
git add -A

# Conventional commit
git commit -m "feat(sprint-7.5a): assurflow v3.0 foundation (26 roles + 7 cross-tenant types + 130 perms)" \
  -m "" \
  -m "Sprint 7.5a Foundation v3.0 complete:" \
  -m "- AuthRole enum: 12 -> 26 roles (+6 carrier, +4 expert, +3 tow, +1 garage_parts_manager)" \
  -m "- CrossTenantAuthorizationType: 3 -> 7 types (+client_to_tower, +tower_to_garage, +garage_to_expert, +garage_to_carrier)" \
  -m "- Permissions catalog: 90 -> 130 perms (+carrier 15, +expertise 10, +tow 8, +parts 7)" \
  -m "- DB migration: cross_tenant CHECK + table expert_designations + RLS" \
  -m "- Helper postgres app_can_access_tenant() extended" \
  -m "- Decisions 011-015 formalised" \
  -m "- Tests RBAC + RLS no regression on 1071+ existing tests" \
  -m "" \
  -m "Task: 7.5a.1 to 7.5a.9" \
  -m "Reference: B-7.5a Tache 7.5a.1 to 7.5a.9"

# Tag
git tag -a "sprint-7.5a-complete-v3-foundation" -m "Sprint 7.5a Assurflow v3.0 Foundation Complete"

# Push
git push origin main --tags
```

## 9. B-7.5b-sprint-7.5b-specifications.md

```md
# META-PROMPT PHASE B SPRINT 7.5b v3.0 -- Specifications Foundation Experts + PartsHub + Tow + Carrier

> ## CORRECTION v3.1 (2026-06-02) -- PRIORITAIRE SUR LE RESTE DU FICHIER
>
> Ce fichier a ete genere avant le pivot v3.1 (ecosysteme 7 acteurs, decision-012-ecosysteme-7-acteurs). En cas de divergence, ces regles PRIMENT sur toute mention residuelle plus bas (qui parle encore de 6 acteurs, 26 roles, 7 types cross-tenant, 130 permissions, PartsHub, ou d'un e-constat genere/signe par Assurflow) :
>
> - Ecosysteme a 7 acteurs : Broker, Garage, Carrier, Expert, Customer/Assure, Tow, et CONSTATEUR (NOUVEAU v3.1).
> - Tenancy 3 niveaux : N1 tenants dedies (Garage, Broker, Carrier, Expert) ; N2 rattache (Customer/Assure) ; N3 sans tenant, acteur reseau leger style Uber-driver (Tow, Constateur).
> - RBAC : 28 roles (retrait de garage_parts_manager car PartsHub abandonne ; ajout de constateur_admin, constateur_dispatcher, constateur_agent).
> - Cross-tenant : 8 types (ajout de claim_to_constateur_dispatch). La ressource parts_order est remplacee par constat.
> - Permissions : 131 (module parts retire ~7 ; module constateur ajoute ~8).
> - PartsHub (decision-014) est ABANDONNE : il ne doit plus apparaitre comme fonctionnalite active.
> - e-constat : Assurflow ne cree, ne remplit ni ne signe JAMAIS le constat. Le constat est gere par l'application TIERCE e-constat de l'ecosysteme AFMA (saisie, signatures conformes loi 43-20, emission d'un numero officiel) ; Assurflow recupere les donnees du constat via API a partir de ce numero.
# Phase B = taches detaillees pour Cowork avec code patterns + schemas SQL + types TS complets
# AUCUNE EMOJI AUTORISEE

**Version** : v3.0 (NOUVEAU sprint v3.0 -- foundation extensions pour Sprints 14/21/22.5/22.7/24/26.5)
**Phase** : 2 -- Securite (extensions Sprint 7 RBAC)
**Sprint** : 7.5b / 40 (cumul v3.0) -- Sprint inter-phases
**Reference orchestrateur** : `C-7.5b-sprint-7.5b-specifications-v3.md`
**Reference verification** : `V-7.5b-sprint-7.5b-verification.md`
**Numerotation taches** : 2.5.1 a 2.5.10
**Effort total** : ~10 heures developpement / 2 jours
**Apport metier** : Foundation packages + types + permissions + cross-tenant pour 6 acteurs ecosystem

- Sprint 24 : utilise tous packages + tous cross-tenant types
- Sprint 26.5 : utilise packages carrier + replacement mocks

- `@insurtech/tow` package (types + interfaces + service squelettes)

- 3 entites foundation (insure_experts + insure_expert_assignments + insure_expert_reports squelettes)
- Documentation Sprint 22.7 Expert App extension path

- **decision-012-6-acteurs-ecosystem** : Customer + Carrier + Garage + Tow + Expert + Broker
- **decision-013-expert-acteur-central** : workflow expert valide devis avant carrier paye
- **decision-014-partshub-phase-1** : module integre Assurflow Garage + commission 3-5%
