## 32. B-30-sprint-30-garage-inventory.md

```md
# B-30 -- META-PROMPT SPRINT 30 : GARAGE INVENTORY + MECHANIC TOOLS

**Version** : v3.0 (sprint nouveau Phase 7 Sprint 2)
**Phase** : 7 -- Garage Vertical (Sprints 29-33)
**Sprint** : 30 / 37 -- Phase 7 Sprint 2
**Position** : Apres Garage Vertical Foundation (Sprint 29), avant Sprint 31 Garage Accounting + Marketing
**Numerotation taches** : 8.2.1 a 8.2.12 (12 taches)
**Effort total** : ~78 heures developpement
**Priorite** : P0 GARAGE INTERNAL OPERATIONS (inventory + work orders + mechanics)
**AUCUNE EMOJI AUTORISEE** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## OBJECTIF GLOBAL DU SPRINT

Implementer le **Garage Inventory + Mechanic Tools** -- garage internal operations management complete : inventory parts/supplies tracking + work orders + mechanic assignments + suppliers management + materials usage billing. Le sprint construit la couche operationnelle interne garage qui permet aux garages de gerer leurs activites quotidiennes (inventaire de pieces detachees + suivi consommables + assignation taches mecaniciens + relations fournisseurs + facturation materiels utilises) directement via Skalean platform, eliminant ainsi la dependance aux outils tiers (Excel + WhatsApp + paper-based tracking) typiquement utilises par garages Morocco. Le sprint introduit **decision-031 ratification** garage internal management foundation + inventory tracking real-time + work orders unified depuis Sprint 22 sinistre work_submission ET Sprint 29 direct booking confirmed + mechanic workload distribution + suppliers + materials cost flow vers Sprint 22 sinistre breakdown OR Sprint 29 booking invoice.

A la sortie de ce sprint, Skalean dispose d'entites domain **`InventoryItem`** (id + garage_id + name + sku + category enum piece_detachee/consommable/outil + quantity_current + quantity_reorder_threshold + unit_cost_mad + unit_sale_price_mad + supplier_id nullable + last_restocked_at + active + photos_urls + created_at + audit_trail), **`InventoryMovement`** (id + item_id + type enum stock_in/stock_out/adjustment + quantity + reason_text + linked_work_order_id nullable + linked_booking_id nullable + linked_sinistre_id nullable + actor_user_id + occurred_at + audit_trail), **`WorkOrder`** (id + garage_id + linked_to enum direct_booking/sinistre + linked_id + status enum open/in_progress/blocked/completed/cancelled + assigned_mechanic_id + tasks JSONB array {task_id + title + description + estimated_duration_minutes + status + completed_at} + materials_used JSONB array {item_id + quantity + cost_at_use + sale_price_at_use} + actual_duration_minutes + opened_at + completed_at nullable + audit_trail), **`Mechanic`** (id + garage_id + name + phone + email nullable + specialties[] enum mecanique/electronique/carrosserie/peinture/diagnostic + work_hours_per_week_target + work_hours_current_period + active + created_at + audit_trail), **`Supplier`** (id + garage_id + name + contact_name + contact_phone + contact_email + categories[] + payment_terms_days + active + created_at + audit_trail), et **`PurchaseOrder`** (id + garage_id + supplier_id + items JSONB array {item_id + quantity + unit_cost_mad} + total_ht_mad + total_ttc_mad + status enum draft/sent/confirmed/partially_received/received/cancelled + ordered_at + expected_at + received_at nullable + audit_trail).

Un **package `@insurtech/garage-internal`** v1.0.0 NestJS module providing 5 services principaux + integrations, un **service `InventoryService`** CRUD items + movements tracking + low-stock alerts + stock real-time accuracy via optimistic locking + valuation calculations + photos S3 Sprint 10 + audit Sprint 7, un **service `WorkOrderService`** orchestration critique avec auto-creation depuis Sprint 22 event `sinistre.work_submitted` (work order auto-cree avec linked_to='sinistre' + linked_id=sinistre_id + tasks initialisees depuis garage_assigned context + materials_used a remplir au fil de l'execution) AND depuis Sprint 29 event `direct_booking.confirmed` (work order auto-cree avec linked_to='direct_booking' + linked_id=booking_id + tasks initialisees depuis service template), state machine transitions (open -> in_progress -> completed | blocked | cancelled), materials_used updates triggers automatic `InventoryService.recordMovement(item_id, 'stock_out', quantity, reason='work_order_consumption', linked_work_order_id)` pour reflect inventory accurate, assignation mecaniciens avec verification workload, completion triggers `MaterialsBillingService.flowToInvoice` vers Sprint 29 booking final invoice OR Sprint 22 sinistre work_submission breakdown, audit Sprint 7 + emit events Kafka Sprint 14, un **service `MechanicService`** mechanic profiles management + workload distribution + alerts overload via Sprint 9 si current_period_hours > work_hours_per_week_target * MECHANIC_WORKLOAD_ALERT_THRESHOLD_FACTOR (default 1.0 = 40h target par mecanicien) + analytics productivity, un **service `SupplierService`** + `PurchaseOrderService` foundation (CRUD suppliers + PO creation manual + items + status workflow draft -> sent -> received + receive triggers automatic `InventoryService.recordMovement(item_id, 'stock_in', quantity, reason='purchase_order_received', source_purchase_order_id)` + audit), un **service `MaterialsBillingService`** materials cost calculation par work order (sum cost_at_use + apply markup configurable garage default 20%) + flow to invoice integration vers Sprint 29 direct booking final invoice OR Sprint 22 sinistre work_submission breakdown materials section, des **integrations critiques** Sprint 22 sinistre (handler event `sinistre.work_submitted` -> auto-create work order + handler event `work_order.completed` -> trigger Sprint 22 work validation chaine), Sprint 29 direct booking (handler event `direct_booking.confirmed` -> auto-create work order + handler event `work_order.completed` -> trigger Sprint 29 booking completion chaine), Sprint 9 notifications (low-stock alerts garage owner + workload alerts mechanic + workload alerts garage owner si overload mechanic), Sprint 10 S3 storage (item photos + work order photos progress documentation), Sprint 13 ClickHouse analytics (inventory turnover + mechanic productivity + materials cost per booking + stock aging + supplier performance), des **integrations Sprint 24 garage-portal** screens dedicated (Inventory tab + Work Orders tab + Mechanics tab + Suppliers tab + Alerts tab + KPIs dashboard internal operations), des **endpoints REST garage internal operations** controller `garage-internal.controller.ts` ~14 endpoints garage_owner permissions Sprint 7.5a + rate limits + idempotency Sprint 15, et la suite de tests E2E **30+** scenarios couvrant inventory CRUD + movements + work orders Sprint 22+29 integration + mechanics workload + suppliers + materials billing + alerts + analytics + permissions + concurrent updates safety.

Le sprint constitue **garage operational integration complete** Skalean platform. Sans Sprint 30, garages utilisent platforms tiers (Google Sheets pour inventaire + WhatsApp groupes pour communication mecaniciens + paper-based work orders + appels telephoniques suppliers) ce qui = data fragmentation + erreurs accuracy + perte temps + retention faible Skalean platform. Avec Sprint 30, garages gerent operations internes 100% via Skalean = unified data + accuracy garantie via Sprint 22+29 integration triggers + retention boost + Skalean stickiness max + foundation Sprint 31 accounting (invoices generation depuis materials usage tracked) + Sprint 32 loyalty (mechanic incentives + customer loyalty).

---

## FRONTIERE DU SPRINT

### Inclus dans Sprint 30

Decision-031 ratifiee, 6 entites domain (InventoryItem + InventoryMovement + WorkOrder + Mechanic + Supplier + PurchaseOrder) + RLS strict garage_id + indexes performance + UNIQUE constraints (garage_id, sku) items + UNIQUE (garage_id, phone) mechanics + UNIQUE (garage_id, name) suppliers + seeds initial 3 garages demos avec inventory typique + mechanics + suppliers, package `@insurtech/garage-internal` v1.0.0 NestJS module,

**Services principaux** :

**InventoryService** :
- `createItem(garage_id, item_data, photos)` validate uniqueness sku + upload photos S3 + audit + emit `inventory.item_created`
- `updateItem(item_id, updates)` partial update + audit
- `deleteItem(item_id)` soft-delete via active=false + audit (no hard delete preserve history)
- `listItems(garage_id, filters)` browse + pagination + filters category + active
- `recordMovement(item_id, type, quantity, reason, linked_work_order_id?, linked_booking_id?, linked_sinistre_id?, actor_user_id)` atomic stock update via optimistic locking + verify stock >= quantity pour stock_out + create InventoryMovement + audit + emit `inventory.movement_recorded` + trigger low-stock check
- `getStockLevel(item_id)` current quantity
- `getMovementsHistory(item_id, period)` filtered history
- `getValueTotal(garage_id)` sum (quantity * unit_cost_mad) for inventory valuation
- `checkLowStockAlerts(garage_id)` cron daily compare quantity_current < quantity_reorder_threshold + Sprint 9 alert garage owner + dedup INVENTORY_LOW_STOCK_ALERT_DEDUP_HOURS=24

**WorkOrderService** (CRITIQUE Sprint 22+29 integration) :
- `createWorkOrder(garage_id, linked_to, linked_id, mechanic_id, tasks[])` create + assign mechanic + audit + emit `work_order.created`
- `assignMechanic(work_order_id, mechanic_id)` reassign + verify workload + audit + Sprint 9 notify mechanic
- `updateTasks(work_order_id, tasks_updates)` modify tasks (add + remove + complete + reorder) + audit
- `addMaterialUsage(work_order_id, item_id, quantity)` add material to materials_used + trigger `InventoryService.recordMovement(item_id, 'stock_out', quantity, 'work_order_consumption', work_order_id)` + audit
- `completeWorkOrder(work_order_id, actual_duration_minutes, completion_notes)` validate all tasks completed + status='completed' + completed_at + materials_cost calculated via `MaterialsBillingService` + flow to invoice + audit + emit `work_order.completed`
- `blockWorkOrder(work_order_id, reason)` status='blocked' + audit + Sprint 9 notify garage owner
- `cancelWorkOrder(work_order_id, reason)` status='cancelled' + reverse materials_used via `InventoryService.recordMovement(item_id, 'stock_in', quantity, 'work_order_cancelled', work_order_id)` + audit + emit
- **Event handler Sprint 22 `sinistre.work_submitted`** : auto-create work order avec linked_to='sinistre' + linked_id=sinistre_id + assigned_mechanic_id=garage_assigned_user_id Sprint 22 + tasks initialisees depuis garage_assigned context damages_repaired
- **Event handler Sprint 29 `direct_booking.confirmed`** : auto-create work order avec linked_to='direct_booking' + linked_id=booking_id + assigned_mechanic_id=auto_assign_least_loaded + tasks initialisees depuis service template

State machine transitions :
- open -> in_progress (manual OR auto on first task started)
- open -> cancelled (manual + reason)
- in_progress -> blocked (reason + Sprint 9 alert)
- in_progress -> completed (all tasks done + completion_notes)
- in_progress -> cancelled (reason + materials reversed)
- blocked -> in_progress (unblock + reason)
- blocked -> cancelled (reason + materials reversed)
- completed -> NO transition (final)

**MechanicService** :
- `createMechanic(garage_id, mechanic_data)` + audit
- `updateMechanic(mechanic_id, updates)`
- `deleteMechanic(mechanic_id)` soft-delete via active=false
- `listMechanics(garage_id, filters)` + filters specialty + active
- `getWorkload(mechanic_id, period)` current work orders open + estimated_remaining_hours
- `checkOverloadAlerts(garage_id)` cron weekly verify mechanic.work_hours_current_period > work_hours_per_week_target * MECHANIC_WORKLOAD_ALERT_THRESHOLD_FACTOR (default 1.0) + Sprint 9 alert garage owner + alert mechanic itself + dedup 24h
- `getProductivityStats(mechanic_id, period)` work orders completed count + average duration + materials cost average

**SupplierService + PurchaseOrderService** :
- `createSupplier(garage_id, supplier_data)` + audit
- `updateSupplier` + `deleteSupplier` soft + `listSuppliers`
- `createPurchaseOrder(garage_id, supplier_id, items[])` create draft + total_ht calculated + audit
- `sendPurchaseOrder(po_id)` status='sent' + Sprint 9 notify supplier via email (foundation only no EDI Phase 8+) + audit
- `receivePurchaseOrder(po_id, received_items[])` validate items vs ordered + status='received' OR 'partially_received' + trigger `InventoryService.recordMovement` for each received item type='stock_in' + audit
- `cancelPurchaseOrder(po_id, reason)` if status='draft' OR 'sent' + audit

**MaterialsBillingService** :
- `calculateMaterialsCost(work_order_id)` sum (quantity * cost_at_use) for all materials_used
- `calculateMaterialsSalePrice(work_order_id, markup_percent)` sum (quantity * sale_price_at_use) OR apply markup configurable garage default MECHANIC_COMPENSATION_COMMISSION_PERCENT_DEFAULT context
- `flowToInvoice(work_order_id)` :
  - Si linked_to='direct_booking' : update Sprint 29 booking.amount_final_mad += materials_sale_price + breakdown materials in invoice
  - Si linked_to='sinistre' : update Sprint 22 work_submission.materials_breakdown + add to total_amount
- Audit comprehensive

**Integrations Sprint 24 garage-portal** :
- Nouvelles routes dedicated tabs :
  - `/inventory/*` (list + add/edit forms + movements history + stock value dashboard + low-stock alerts)
  - `/work-orders/*` (dashboard + list + detail + assign mechanic + materials usage tracking + complete workflow + filter by status/mechanic/linked_type)
  - `/mechanics/*` (list + detail + workload dashboard + productivity stats + add/edit)
  - `/suppliers/*` (list + detail + purchase orders list + create PO + receive PO)
  - `/alerts/*` (low-stock + workload overload + suppliers PO pending receive)
- KPIs dashboard internal operations (inventory value + work orders open count + mechanics overloaded count + materials cost current month)

**Integrations Sprint 22 sinistre** :
- Event subscriber `sinistre.work_submitted` -> WorkOrderService.handleSinistreWorkSubmitted
- Event publisher `work_order.completed` linked_to=sinistre -> Sprint 22 workflow continuation
- Materials_used flow Sprint 22 work_submission.materials_breakdown

**Integrations Sprint 29 direct booking** :
- Event subscriber `direct_booking.confirmed` -> WorkOrderService.handleDirectBookingConfirmed
- Event publisher `work_order.completed` linked_to=direct_booking -> Sprint 29 booking completion + invoice generation
- Materials_used flow Sprint 29 booking.amount_final_mad

**Endpoints REST** `garage-internal.controller.ts` 14 endpoints :
- `POST /api/v1/garage/inventory/items` create item
- `GET /api/v1/garage/inventory/items` list + filters
- `PUT /api/v1/garage/inventory/items/{id}` update
- `DELETE /api/v1/garage/inventory/items/{id}` soft-delete
- `POST /api/v1/garage/inventory/movements` record movement
- `GET /api/v1/garage/inventory/movements` history filters
- `GET /api/v1/garage/work-orders` list + filters
- `POST /api/v1/garage/work-orders/{id}/assign` assign mechanic
- `POST /api/v1/garage/work-orders/{id}/materials` add material usage
- `POST /api/v1/garage/work-orders/{id}/complete` complete work order
- `GET /api/v1/garage/mechanics` list + workload
- `POST /api/v1/garage/suppliers` create supplier
- `POST /api/v1/garage/purchase-orders` create PO
- `POST /api/v1/garage/purchase-orders/{id}/receive` receive PO

Permissions Sprint 7.5a granular (garage_owner + garage_manager roles) + rate limits + idempotency Sprint 15 for movements + work order completion, 30+ tests E2E,

**Rapport closure Sprint 30** :
- Inventory tracking real-time operational
- Work orders auto-creation Sprint 22+29 integration
- Mechanics workload distribution
- Suppliers + PO foundation
- Materials billing flow vers Sprint 22/29 invoices
- Sprint 24 garage-portal extensions 5 tabs
- Analytics vertical productivity
- Pre-requis Sprint 31 Garage Accounting + Marketing valides

### Exclus du Sprint 30 (defere)

POS integration physical store defers Phase 8+ (sale of accessoires walk-in customers Sprint 30 foundation only via direct booking flow), EDI suppliers automated integration (Procomm + automated quotes + automated PO submission) defers Phase 8+ (Sprint 30 manual PO foundation only), predictive inventory ML (forecast demand based historical) defers Phase 8+ Sprint 33 AI optimization, mechanic detailed time tracking (clock-in/clock-out per task) defers Phase 8+ (Sprint 30 aggregated weekly hours only), mechanic compensation full calculation (base + commission + bonuses + social security) defers Sprint 31 garage accounting, white-label garage app per-garage defers Phase 8+, mobile mechanic app native (separate app for mechanics on-the-go) defers Phase 8+ (Sprint 30 garage-portal mobile responsive only), barcodes scanning physical inventory defers Phase 8+ (Sprint 30 manual entry foundation), inventory transfers between garages multi-location defers Phase 8+, automated reorder workflow vendor APIs defers Phase 8+, et integration ERPs externes (SAP + Odoo) defers Phase 8+ enterprise.

---

## CONTEXTE STRATEGIQUE -- POURQUOI LE SPRINT EST CRITIQUE

Sprint 30 est **garage operational integration complete**. Trois dimensions strategiques.

Premierement, **garage retention via complete OS**. Garages currently fragment operations across 4-5 tools (Excel inventory + WhatsApp mechanic communication + paper work orders + phone suppliers + manual accounting). Skalean offering insurance dispatch + direct customer booking BUT NOT internal operations = garages still need other tools = friction + lower retention. Sprint 30 unifies all operations Skalean platform = single-pane-of-glass garage management = stickiness max + competitive moat.

Deuxiemement, **cost tracking accuracy + profitability transparency**. Without proper materials usage tracking per work order, garages don't know per-booking profitability accurately. Sprint 30 enables materials_used tracking automatic via inventory movements -> garages see real margin per booking/sinistre = better pricing decisions + commission accuracy mechanics = data-driven garage management.

Troisiemement, **Sprint 31 accounting foundation**. Sprint 31 garage accounting + marketing requires materials cost data tracked accurately. Sprint 30 establishes this foundation. Without Sprint 30 materials tracking, Sprint 31 invoicing would be approximations + Sprint 33 AI optimization would have insufficient training data.

---
```

```
### Decision-031 -- Garage Internal Operations Foundation

**Justification** :
- (a) Garage retention via complete OS unified operations
- (b) Cost tracking accuracy per work order materials_used
- (c) Sprint 31 accounting foundation data
- (d) Sprint 32 loyalty foundation (mechanic compensation accurate)
- (e) Sprint 33 AI optimization training data

**Architecture** :
- 6 entites domain + RLS strict garage_id + indexes performance
- 6 services + 2 event handlers Sprint 22/29
- Sprint 24 garage-portal extensions 5 tabs
- Sprint 9 alerts (low-stock + workload)
- Sprint 13 analytics vertical productivity
- Foundation Sprint 31+

## DECISIONS STRATEGIQUES REFERENCEES

Toutes decisions 001-030 + **decision-031** (NOUVELLE).

**Decision-022 dispatch-matching** : strict (Sprint 22 sinistre integration handlers).

**Decision-025 multi-app-architecture** : strict (Sprint 24 garage-portal extensions 5 tabs).

**Decision-030 garage-vertical-direct-customer** : strict (Sprint 29 direct booking integration handlers + materials billing flow).

**Decision-031 garage-internal-operations-foundation** (NOUVEAU - ratification 15 juin 2026) : adoption **garage internal operations management foundation + inventory tracking real-time + work orders unified Sprint 22+29 + mechanic workload + suppliers + materials billing**. Justification : (a) Garage retention via complete OS, (b) Cost tracking accuracy, (c) Sprint 31 foundation, (d) Sprint 32 foundation, (e) Sprint 33 AI training data. Architecture : 6 entites + 6 services + 2 event handlers Sprint 22/29 + Sprint 24 5 tabs.

---

## PIEGES TECHNIQUES GENERAUX

**Piege 1 : Concurrent inventory updates race conditions.** Two work orders consume same item simultaneously = stock incorrect OR over-consumption. Solution : optimistic locking (version column on inventory_items + UPDATE WHERE version=X + retry on conflict) + transactional movements + tests stress concurrent.

**Piege 2 : Materials cost vs sale price disconnect.** Garage internal cost = supplier price + markup garage = sale price customer. Confusion = wrong invoices OR wrong profitability. Solution : entites separer unit_cost_mad (purchase) + unit_sale_price_mad (sale) + materials_used JSONB snapshot cost_at_use + sale_price_at_use at time of consumption (price changes don't retroactively affect past work orders) + audit historical pricing.

**Piege 3 : Cross-vertical materials usage attribution.** Same item consumed for direct booking + insurance sinistre = need attribution clear. Solution : InventoryMovement.linked_work_order_id + linked_booking_id OR linked_sinistre_id mutually exclusive (NULL or one of them) + reports per linked_type breakdown.

**Piege 4 : Mechanic over-assignment.** Mechanic assigned too many work orders = quality drops + delays. Solution : workload threshold MECHANIC_WORKLOAD_ALERT_THRESHOLD_FACTOR default 1.0 (40h target) + alerts garage owner + UI dashboard color-coded workload (green < 0.8 + yellow 0.8-1.0 + red > 1.0) + suggest alternative mechanic on assign if overloaded.

**Piege 5 : Low-stock alerts spam.** Multiple items low-stock = multiple alerts per garage per cron run = noise. Solution : dedup 24h INVENTORY_LOW_STOCK_ALERT_DEDUP_HOURS + aggregate multiple low-stock items in single notification + tunable threshold per item.

**Piege 6 : Supplier data accuracy manual entry.** Garages create suppliers manually = typos + duplicates. Solution : validation Zod fields + suggest existing on creation (fuzzy match name) + periodic data quality reports + foundation only no automated supplier directory Phase 8+.

**Piege 7 : Purchase orders foundation premature complexity.** Implementing full PO workflow (multi-line + partial receipt + invoice matching + supplier reconciliation + EDI) Sprint 30 = scope creep. Solution : foundation only (CRUD + status workflow basic + manual receive + Sprint 9 email supplier) + EDI + advanced Phase 8+ documented decision-031.

**Piege 8 : Inventory adjustments shrinkage tracking.** Items lost/stolen/damaged = need explicit movement type. Solution : InventoryMovement.type='adjustment' + reason_text mandatory + audit comprehensive + reports adjustments per garage per period flag suspicious patterns.

**Piege 9 : Work order status complex transitions.** State machine many states + transitions = bugs invalid transitions. Solution : state machine documented + enforce via service methods (no direct status updates) + tests negative invalid transitions + audit transitions.

**Piege 10 : Sprint 22 sinistre integration timing.** Event `sinistre.work_submitted` Sprint 22.6 -> auto-create work order Sprint 30 timing matters. Solution : event publisher Sprint 22.6 fires AFTER work_submission saved + Sprint 30 handler subscribes + idempotency-key + tests integration end-to-end Sprint 22 + Sprint 30.

---

### Tache 8.2.2 -- Entites Garage Internal (6 tables)

**7h | P0 CRITIQUE | 140-180 KB**

6 entites + migrations + RLS strict garage_id + indexes performance + UNIQUE constraints + seeds initial demo data.

**Livrables** :
- Package `@insurtech/garage-internal` v1.0.0 NestJS module + package.json + tsconfig + structure folders
- 6 migrations TypeORM/Knex :
  - `001-create-inventory-items` (id UUID + garage_id UUID FK + name VARCHAR + sku VARCHAR + category enum + quantity_current INTEGER + quantity_reorder_threshold INTEGER + unit_cost_mad NUMERIC(10,2) + unit_sale_price_mad NUMERIC(10,2) + supplier_id UUID FK nullable + last_restocked_at TIMESTAMP nullable + active BOOLEAN + photos_urls TEXT[] + created_at + audit_trail JSONB + version INTEGER) + RLS garage_id + indexes (garage_id + sku + category + active partial) + UNIQUE (garage_id, sku)
  - `002-create-inventory-movements` (id + item_id FK + type enum + quantity + reason_text + linked_work_order_id FK nullable + linked_booking_id FK nullable + linked_sinistre_id FK nullable + actor_user_id FK + occurred_at + audit_trail) + indexes (item_id + occurred_at + type + linked_*)
  - `003-create-work-orders` (id + garage_id FK + linked_to enum + linked_id UUID + status enum + assigned_mechanic_id FK nullable + tasks JSONB + materials_used JSONB + actual_duration_minutes nullable + opened_at + completed_at nullable + audit_trail) + indexes (garage_id + status partial + assigned_mechanic_id + linked_to + linked_id)
  - `004-create-mechanics` (id + garage_id FK + name + phone + email + specialties TEXT[] + work_hours_per_week_target INTEGER + work_hours_current_period INTEGER + active BOOLEAN + created_at + audit_trail) + indexes (garage_id + active partial + specialties GIN) + UNIQUE (garage_id, phone)
  - `005-create-suppliers` (id + garage_id FK + name + contact_name + contact_phone + contact_email + categories TEXT[] + payment_terms_days INTEGER + active BOOLEAN + audit_trail) + indexes + UNIQUE (garage_id, name)
  - `006-create-purchase-orders` (id + garage_id FK + supplier_id FK + items JSONB + total_ht_mad + total_ttc_mad + status enum + ordered_at + expected_at + received_at nullable + audit_trail) + indexes (garage_id + supplier_id + status partial + ordered_at)
- RLS strict garage_id sur toutes tables (CREATE POLICY + ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY) + tests RLS positive + negative
- Enums TypeScript stricts (InventoryCategory + InventoryMovementType + WorkOrderLinkedTo + WorkOrderStatus + MechanicSpecialty + PurchaseOrderStatus)

  - 5 purchase orders historiques received
```

## 33. B-31-sprint-31-garage-accounting-marketing.md

```md
# B-31 -- META-PROMPT SPRINT 31 : GARAGE ACCOUNTING + MARKETING

**Version** : v3.0 (sprint nouveau Phase 7 Sprint 3)
**Phase** : 7 -- Garage Vertical (Sprints 29-33)
**Sprint** : 31 / 37 -- Phase 7 Sprint 3
**Position** : Apres Garage Inventory + Mechanic Tools (Sprint 30), avant Sprint 32 Garage Online + Loyalty
**Numerotation taches** : 8.3.1 a 8.3.12 (12 taches)
**Effort total** : ~78 heures developpement
**Priorite** : P0 GARAGE BUSINESS OPERATIONS COMPLETE (accounting + marketing + compensation)
**AUCUNE EMOJI AUTORISEE** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## OBJECTIF GLOBAL DU SPRINT

Implementer le **Garage Accounting + Marketing** -- garage business operations layer complete : invoicing module auto-generation depuis Sprint 22 sinistre work_submission completed ET Sprint 29 direct booking completed + tax compliance Morocco (TVA 20% standard + exemptions + tax IDs legal + foundation IS Phase 8+) + financial dashboards per-garage avec Sprint 13 ClickHouse analytics (revenue + costs + margins + cash flow + outstanding invoices aging) + promotions/coupons system apply at Sprint 29 booking + customer outreach campaigns email Sprint 9 + SMS via providers Brevo/Twilio MA + segmentation customers (new/returning/VIP/inactive) + mechanic compensation calculation monthly (base salary + commission percent per work orders Sprint 30 completed + bonuses configurable + total). Le sprint introduit **decision-032 ratification** garage accounting + marketing foundation + tax compliance MA + customer outreach + mechanic compensation transparency.

A la sortie de ce sprint, Skalean dispose d'entites domain **`Invoice`** (id + garage_id + linked_to enum direct_booking/sinistre + linked_id + invoice_number generated sequential per garage per year format `GAR-{garage_short}-{year}-{seq:6}` + issued_at + total_ht_mad NUMERIC(10,2) + tva_mad NUMERIC(10,2) + total_ttc_mad NUMERIC(10,2) + status enum draft/issued/paid/cancelled + payment_method enum mwallet/bank_transfer/cashplus/cash + due_at + paid_at nullable + pdf_url S3 + line_items JSONB + notes text + audit_trail), **`TaxConfiguration`** (id + garage_id + tva_rate_percent default 20 + tax_id_legal RC + IF + ICE + bank_account + active + audit_trail), **`Promotion`** (id + garage_id + name + description + discount_type enum percentage/fixed_mad + discount_value NUMERIC + applicable_services UUID[] + max_uses + uses_count + valid_from + valid_to + active + code optional VARCHAR uppercase unique per garage + audit_trail), **`Campaign`** (id + garage_id + name + type enum email/sms/push + segment enum new_customer/returning/vip/inactive_30days/inactive_60days/all + message_subject + message_template + recipients_count + scheduled_at + sent_at nullable + opens_count + clicks_count + status enum draft/scheduled/sending/completed/cancelled + audit_trail), et **`MechanicCompensation`** (id + mechanic_id + garage_id + period_month VARCHAR YYYY-MM + base_salary_mad + commission_percent + work_orders_completed_count + commission_mad calculated + bonus_mad + total_mad calculated + status enum pending/approved/paid + paid_at nullable + payment_reference + audit_trail).

Un **package `@insurtech/garage-accounting-marketing`** v1.0.0 NestJS module, **6 services principaux** :

**InvoicingService** generation auto depuis Sprint 22 event `sinistre.work_submitted_completed` AND Sprint 29 event `direct_booking.completed` event handlers (auto-create draft Invoice + populate line_items depuis work_submission breakdown OR booking services + materials cost from Sprint 30 MaterialsBillingService + auto-calculate TVA via TaxComplianceService + generate PDF via Sprint 10 Puppeteer + status='issued' + send to customer via Sprint 9 email avec PDF attachment + audit Sprint 7 + emit `invoice.issued`), invoice_number sequential per garage per year via atomic counter Redis SETNX + format `GAR-{garage_short_5_chars}-{year}-{seq:6}`,

**TaxComplianceService** Morocco compliance (TaxConfiguration per garage management + calculateTVA(amount_ht, garage_id) returns tva_mad + exemptions documented categories specifiques + verify tax_id_legal RC/IF/ICE valid formats + invoice display compliance Morocco standards + foundation IS Phase 8+),

**FinancialDashboardService** per-garage Sprint 13 ClickHouse aggregations (revenue split direct vs insurance + costs materials + costs mechanic compensation + margins gross calculation + cash flow projections + outstanding invoices aging 30/60/90 days + accounts receivable + monthly summary),

**PromotionService** CRUD promotions + apply at Sprint 29 booking flow (PromotionService.validateAndApply(promotion_code, garage_id, services[], total_amount) verify active + within valid_from/valid_to + max_uses not exceeded + applicable_services match + calculate discount + increment uses_count atomic + emit `promotion.applied`) + automatic application no-code (eligible customer segments) + tracking analytics,

**CampaignService** create + segment customers (query DirectCustomer Sprint 29 + apply segment criteria new/returning/vip/inactive thresholds tunable) + schedule send via Sprint 9 email AND/OR SMS providers (Brevo email + Twilio MA SMS configuration) + tracking opens via tracking pixels + tracking clicks via signed redirect URLs + CNDP compliance opt-out mandatory bottom each message + audit comprehensive,

**MechanicCompensationService** monthly calculation cron (cron schedule MECHANIC_COMPENSATION_CRON=0 1 1 * * first day month 01h00 MA) per garage per mechanic (query work orders Sprint 30 completed in period_month + sum count + calculate commission = work_orders_completed * average_per_wo * commission_percent + bonus from configurable rules + total = base + commission + bonus + create MechanicCompensation status='pending' + Sprint 9 notify mechanic + garage owner + audit),

Integration Sprint 24 garage-portal screens **3 tabs dedicated** (Accounting tab `/accounting/*` invoices list + detail + create draft manual + PDF preview + financial dashboard charts + tax configuration + Marketing tab `/marketing/*` promotions CRUD + campaigns CRUD + audience segments + sent campaigns analytics + Compensations tab `/compensations/*` monthly compensations list + detail + approve + mark paid + bulk approve), endpoints REST 14 + Sprint 7.5a permissions garage_owner/garage_manager + rate limits + idempotency Sprint 15, **30+ tests E2E** couvrant invoicing Sprint 22+29 integration + tax MA + financials Sprint 13 + promotions + campaigns + mechanic compensation + 3 tabs UI.

Le sprint constitue **garage business operations complete** + **stickiness max** + **Sprint 33 AI optimization training data foundation**. Sans Sprint 31, garages utilisent platforms tiers (Excel comptabilite + Mailchimp campaigns + paper compensation) = data fragmentation + erreurs + retention faible. Avec Sprint 31, garages operent 100% via Skalean (operations Sprint 30 + accounting Sprint 31 + marketing Sprint 31 + compensation Sprint 31) = single source of truth + retention boost + commercial differentiation enterprise vs competitors fixed tools.

## FRONTIERE DU SPRINT

### Inclus dans Sprint 31

Decision-032 ratifiee, **5 entites domain** (Invoice + TaxConfiguration + Promotion + Campaign + MechanicCompensation) + RLS strict garage_id + indexes performance + UNIQUE invoice_number per garage per year + UNIQUE (garage_id, code) promotions + indexes status partial + indexes period_month compensations + seeds initial 3 garages demos avec tax configs + sample invoices historiques + promotions exemples + campaigns drafts + compensations months precedents,

Package `@insurtech/garage-accounting-marketing` v1.0.0 NestJS module,

**Services principaux** :

**InvoicingService** :
- `createInvoice(garage_id, linked_to, linked_id, line_items, notes?)` manual creation + auto-calculate totals + audit
- `issueInvoice(invoice_id)` validate + sequential numbering atomic via Redis SETNX + generate PDF Sprint 10 Puppeteer + S3 upload + status='issued' + Sprint 9 send email + emit
- `markPaid(invoice_id, payment_reference)` status='paid' + paid_at + audit
- `cancelInvoice(invoice_id, reason)` if status in ['draft', 'issued'] + status='cancelled' + reason + audit + emit
- Event handler Sprint 22 `sinistre.work_submitted_completed` -> auto-create draft Invoice + populate from work_submission breakdown + Sprint 30 materials + auto-issue
- Event handler Sprint 29 `direct_booking.completed` -> auto-create draft Invoice + populate from booking services + Sprint 30 materials + auto-issue
- PDF generation includes tax_id_legal + invoice_number + breakdown line_items + TVA breakdown + total_ttc + payment instructions + branding optional Sprint 27

**TaxComplianceService** :
- `setTaxConfiguration(garage_id, config)` audit
- `calculateTVA(amount_ht_mad, garage_id)` apply tva_rate_percent + return tva_mad
- `getApplicableExemptions(service_category, garage_id)` query exemptions
- `verifyTaxIDLegal(tax_id_legal)` validate RC/IF/ICE format regex
- `getInvoiceComplianceFields(garage_id)` return required fields display MA standards

**FinancialDashboardService** :
- `getMonthlyRevenue(garage_id, period)` Sprint 13 ClickHouse query revenue direct + insurance breakdown
- `getMonthlyCosts(garage_id, period)` materials + compensation breakdown
- `getMonthlyMargins(garage_id, period)` gross margin = revenue - costs
- `getOutstandingInvoices(garage_id)` invoices status='issued' aging 30/60/90 days
- `getCashFlowProjection(garage_id, weeks_ahead)` foundation forecasts simples
- `getAccountsReceivable(garage_id)` sum outstanding + aging breakdown

**PromotionService** :
- `createPromotion(garage_id, promotion_data)` validate + audit
- `updatePromotion` + `deletePromotion` soft + `listPromotions` filters active/valid_in_period
- `validateAndApply(promotion_code, garage_id, services[], total_amount)` atomic transaction (verify active + within validity + max_uses not exceeded + applicable_services match) + calculate discount + increment uses_count + audit + emit
- `applyAutomaticEligible(customer_id, garage_id, services[], total_amount)` query promotions automatic (no code) eligible customer segment + best discount apply

**CampaignService** :
- `createCampaign(garage_id, campaign_data)` draft
- `getSegmentRecipients(garage_id, segment)` query DirectCustomer Sprint 29 + filter criteria (new = first_booking_at <= 90 days + returning = total_bookings 2-5 + vip = total_bookings > 5 OR total_spent > 10000 + inactive_30days = last_booking_at > 30 days + inactive_60days > 60 days)
- `scheduleCampaign(campaign_id, scheduled_at)` validate + status='scheduled'
- `sendCampaign(campaign_id)` cron worker process (load recipients + send Sprint 9 email AND/OR SMS Brevo/Twilio + rate limit CAMPAIGN_SMS_RATE_LIMIT_PER_HOUR=100 + tracking opens via pixel + tracking clicks via signed URLs + CNDP opt-out link + status='sending' -> 'completed' + audit)
- `cancelCampaign(campaign_id)` if status in ['draft', 'scheduled'] + audit

**MechanicCompensationService** :
- Cron monthly first day 01h00 MA `MECHANIC_COMPENSATION_CRON=0 1 1 * *`
- Per garage per mechanic active : query Sprint 30 work_orders WHERE assigned_mechanic_id = X AND status='completed' AND completed_at IN period_month
- Calculate : commission_mad = work_orders_count * average_per_wo * commission_percent
- Bonuses from configurable rules (per garage thresholds)
- Total = base_salary + commission + bonus
- Create MechanicCompensation status='pending' + Sprint 9 notify mechanic + garage owner
- `approveCompensation(compensation_id, garage_owner_id)` status='approved' + audit
- `markPaidCompensation(compensation_id, payment_reference)` status='paid' + paid_at + payment_reference + audit

**Integration Sprint 24 garage-portal 3 tabs** :

**Accounting tab** `/accounting/*` :
- `/accounting` overview KPIs (revenue current month + costs + margins + outstanding)
- `/accounting/invoices` list + filters status/period/payment_method + create draft manual + bulk actions
- `/accounting/invoices/[id]` detail + line_items edit if draft + issue + PDF preview + mark paid + cancel
- `/accounting/dashboard` financial dashboards Sprint 13 charts Recharts (revenue split + cost breakdown + margins trend + outstanding aging + cash flow)
- `/accounting/tax-configuration` TaxConfiguration management + RC/IF/ICE + bank account

**Marketing tab** `/marketing/*` :
- `/marketing` overview campaigns scheduled + promotions active
- `/marketing/promotions` CRUD + codes + applicable_services + validity periods
- `/marketing/campaigns` list + create + segment preview + schedule
- `/marketing/campaigns/[id]` detail + recipients preview + tracking opens/clicks + cancel
- `/marketing/audience-segments` insights customers segments

**Compensations tab** `/compensations/*` :
- `/compensations` monthly list + filters period/status/mechanic
- `/compensations/[id]` detail + work_orders linked + approve + mark paid
- Bulk approve + bulk mark paid actions

**Endpoints REST** `garage-accounting-marketing.controller.ts` 14 endpoints :
- `POST /api/v1/garage/invoices` create draft
- `POST /api/v1/garage/invoices/{id}/issue` issue + send
- `POST /api/v1/garage/invoices/{id}/pay` mark paid
- `GET /api/v1/garage/invoices` list + filters
- `GET /api/v1/garage/invoices/{id}/pdf` download PDF
- `POST /api/v1/garage/tax-configuration` set config
- `GET /api/v1/garage/financial-dashboard` KPIs
- `POST /api/v1/garage/promotions` create
- `GET /api/v1/garage/promotions` list
- `POST /api/v1/garage/promotions/validate` validate code (called by Sprint 29 booking flow)
- `POST /api/v1/garage/campaigns` create
- `POST /api/v1/garage/campaigns/{id}/schedule` schedule
- `GET /api/v1/garage/compensations` list + filters
- `POST /api/v1/garage/compensations/{id}/approve` approve

Permissions Sprint 7.5a (garage_owner full + garage_manager limited) + rate limits + idempotency Sprint 15 (invoice issue + promotion apply + compensation approve), 30+ tests E2E,

**Rapport closure Sprint 31** :
- Invoicing operational Sprint 22+29 integration auto
- Tax MA TVA 20% + exemptions + tax_id_legal validation
- Financial dashboards Sprint 13 ClickHouse
- Promotions Sprint 29 integration validateAndApply
- Campaigns email+SMS Sprint 9 + CNDP compliance opt-out
- Mechanic compensation monthly cron Sprint 30 integration
- Sprint 24 garage-portal 3 tabs
- Pre-requis Sprint 32 Garage Online + Loyalty valides

### Exclus du Sprint 31 (defere)

Tax compliance MA advanced (DGI electronic submission via SIMPL-IS + telepaiements + DSN format) defers Phase 8+ (Sprint 31 foundation invoices + TVA only), marketing automation advanced (multi-step funnels + A/B testing + segmentation ML + behavioral triggers) defers Phase 8+, accounting export comptable plan SYSCOA Morocco (general ledger + balance sheet + P&L automated) defers Phase 8+, mechanic payroll full (social security CNSS + cotisations IGR + payroll slips legal format) defers Phase 8+ (Sprint 31 compensation calculation only no payroll legal), loyalty programs points + tiers + rewards defers Sprint 32, customer 360 view + lifetime value + churn prediction defers Phase 8+, multi-currency invoicing (EUR + USD for export) defers Phase 8+, invoice approval workflows multi-level defers Phase 8+, accounts payable suppliers automated reconciliation defers Phase 8+ (Sprint 31 outstanding receivables only foundation), et integration ERPs externes (Sage + Odoo + SAP) defers Phase 8+ enterprise.

## CONTEXTE STRATEGIQUE -- POURQUOI LE SPRINT EST CRITIQUE

Sprint 31 est **garage business operations complete** + **Sprint 33 AI training data foundation**. Trois dimensions strategiques.

Premierement, **garage business operations integration complete**. Garages utilisent currently 4-5 outils separes (Excel comptabilite + Word factures manuelles + Mailchimp campaigns email + appels telephoniques mecanicien compensation + paper notes). Skalean offering Sprint 30 operations seules = garages still need autres tools = friction maximum + lower retention. Sprint 31 ferme la boucle : operations (Sprint 30) + accounting (Sprint 31 invoices + tax + financials) + marketing (Sprint 31 promotions + campaigns) + compensation (Sprint 31 mechanic) = garage 100% Skalean = stickiness max + competitive moat enterprise vs platforms fixed.

Deuxiemement, **commercial differentiation enterprise SaaS** vs competitors. Most Morocco insurtech platforms offer claims processing only. Skalean offering complete garage business OS = differentiated value proposition + premium pricing justified + harder to switch away (data lock-in + workflow lock-in + training lock-in). Sprint 31 transforms Skalean from "Morocco insurtech tool" to "Morocco garage operating system" market positioning.

Troisiemement, **Sprint 33 AI optimization training data**. Sprint 33 AI features (predictive maintenance + price optimization + customer churn prediction + mechanic productivity recommendations) require comprehensive data foundation. Sprint 31 establishes accounting + marketing + compensation data = comprehensive training data = Sprint 33 AI feature richness.

---
```

```
### Decision-032 -- Garage Accounting + Marketing Foundation

**Justification** :
- (a) Garage business operations complete (operations Sprint 30 + accounting + marketing + compensation)
- (b) Stickiness max + commercial differentiation enterprise SaaS
- (c) Sprint 33 AI training data foundation
- (d) Tax MA compliance foundation (TVA 20% + exemptions + tax_id_legal)
- (e) CNDP compliance customer outreach (opt-out mandatory campaigns)

**Architecture** :
- 5 entites domain + RLS strict garage_id
- 6 services + 2 event handlers Sprint 22/29 + 2 workers (campaign sender + compensation cron)
- Sprint 24 garage-portal 3 tabs (accounting + marketing + compensations)
- Sprint 13 ClickHouse financial dashboards
- Sprint 9 email + SMS providers (Brevo + Twilio MA)
- Foundation Sprint 32/33

## DECISIONS STRATEGIQUES REFERENCEES

Toutes decisions 001-031 + **decision-032** (NOUVELLE).

**Decision-009 comm-wa-email** : strict (Sprint 9 email + SMS providers reuse pour campaigns + invoice send).

**Decision-022 dispatch-matching** : strict (Sprint 22 sinistre integration event handler).

**Decision-025 multi-app-architecture** : strict (Sprint 24 garage-portal extensions 3 tabs).

**Decision-030 garage-vertical-direct-customer** : strict (Sprint 29 direct booking integration event handler).

**Decision-031 garage-internal-operations-foundation** : strict (Sprint 30 work_orders.completed + materials_cost integration).

**Decision-032 garage-accounting-marketing-foundation** (NOUVEAU - ratification 16 juin 2026) : adoption **garage accounting + marketing + compensation foundation comprehensive** + invoicing Sprint 22+29 integration + tax MA TVA 20% foundation + financial dashboards Sprint 13 + promotions + campaigns CNDP compliant + mechanic compensation Sprint 30 integration. Justification : (a) Garage business operations complete, (b) Stickiness max enterprise SaaS, (c) Sprint 33 AI foundation, (d) Tax MA compliance, (e) CNDP customer outreach. Architecture : 5 entites + 6 services + 2 handlers + 2 workers + Sprint 24 3 tabs.

---

## PIEGES TECHNIQUES GENERAUX

**Piege 1 : Invoice numbering sequence concurrent generation lock.** Two invoices generated simultaneously same garage = same invoice_number violation UNIQUE constraint. Solution : Redis atomic counter SETNX per (garage_id, year) + format `GAR-{garage_short}-{year}-{seq:6}` zero-padded + tests stress concurrent invoice issue 100 simultaneous.

**Piege 2 : TVA calculation Decimal precision rounding.** Floating-point arithmetic = errors centimes. Solution : NUMERIC(10,2) PostgreSQL + Decimal.js library frontend + tests precision toutes operations.

**Piege 3 : Tax MA TVA 20% but exemptions documented.** Some services categories TVA exempted (specific Morocco regulations). Solution : TaxConfiguration.exemptions JSONB array + documented + foundation only Sprint 31 (advanced tax MA Phase 8+).

**Piege 4 : Campaigns CNDP regulations compliance Morocco.** Customer outreach without opt-out = CNDP violation = legal risk. Solution : opt-out link mandatory bottom each message + tracking opt-outs + suppress list per garage + compliance docs ACAPS-grade.

**Piege 5 : Promotions abuse same code multiple use.** Customer use same code multiple times. Solution : max_uses enforce via atomic UPDATE WHERE uses_count < max_uses RETURNING + verify customer eligibility once per promotion if applicable.

**Piege 6 : Mechanic compensation fair calculation algorithm transparent.** Mechanic disputes compensation = trust issue. Solution : calculation algorithm documented + transparent breakdown (base + work_orders_count * X + bonuses + total) + mechanic notification with breakdown + appeals process foundation.

**Piege 7 : Invoices PDF generation performance large datasets.** PDF generation Puppeteer slow for many invoices. Solution : async queue Sprint 14 BullMQ + worker pool + caching templates + concurrent generation limit + bulk PDF generation flag warn user wait.

**Piege 8 : Email + SMS deliverability rates monitor Sprint 9.** Low deliverability = wasted campaigns. Solution : Sprint 9 providers monitoring + bounce rates tracking + suppress invalid + warm-up new senders + tests integration providers Brevo + Twilio MA sandbox.

**Piege 9 : Customer segments accuracy thresholds tunable.** Hardcoded thresholds (new < 90 days) miss garage-specific patterns. Solution : thresholds tunable per garage (garage_settings table) + foundation defaults + future ML segmentation Phase 8+.

**Piege 10 : Financial dashboards Sprint 13 ClickHouse refresh stale data.** Daily refresh = data 24h old = garage owner expects real-time. Solution : refresh daily 04h00 MA + show last refresh timestamp prominent UI + option manual refresh + future real-time Phase 8+ via streaming.

---

### Tache 8.3.2 -- Entites Garage Accounting Marketing (5 tables)

**6h | P0 CRITIQUE | 130-170 KB**

5 entites + migrations + RLS strict garage_id + indexes + UNIQUE constraints + seeds.

**Livrables** :
- Package `@insurtech/garage-accounting-marketing` v1.0.0
- 5 migrations TypeORM/Knex :
  - `invoices` (15 colonnes + RLS garage_id + indexes + UNIQUE (garage_id, invoice_number) + indexes status partial + period queries)
  - `tax_configurations` (8 colonnes + UNIQUE (garage_id) single per garage)
  - `promotions` (14 colonnes + UNIQUE (garage_id, code) WHERE code IS NOT NULL + indexes active + valid_from/valid_to)
  - `campaigns` (14 colonnes + indexes status partial + scheduled_at)
  - `mechanic_compensations` (15 colonnes + UNIQUE (mechanic_id, period_month) + indexes period_month + status)
- RLS strict toutes 5 tables (CREATE POLICY + ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY)
- Enums TypeScript stricts (InvoiceStatus + InvoicePaymentMethod + PromotionDiscountType + CampaignType + CampaignSegment + CampaignStatus + CompensationStatus)
- JSONB schemas Zod (line_items + applicable_services + message_template variables)
- Seeds 3 garages demos (tax configs + 5 sample invoices + 3 promotions + 2 campaigns drafts + 6 compensations historiques)
```

## 34. B-32-sprint-32-garage-online-loyalty.md

```md
# B-32 -- META-PROMPT SPRINT 32 : GARAGE ONLINE + LOYALTY

**Version** : v3.0 (sprint nouveau Phase 7 Sprint 4)
**Phase** : 7 -- Garage Vertical (Sprints 29-33)
**Sprint** : 32 / 37 -- Phase 7 Sprint 4
**Position** : Apres Garage Accounting + Marketing (Sprint 31), avant Sprint 33 Garage AI Optimization (DERNIER Phase 7)
**Numerotation taches** : 8.4.1 a 8.4.12 (12 taches)
**Effort total** : ~78 heures developpement
**Priorite** : P0 GARAGE CUSTOMER RETENTION + ONLINE PRESENCE ADVANCED
**AUCUNE EMOJI AUTORISEE** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## OBJECTIF GLOBAL DU SPRINT

Implementer le **Garage Online + Loyalty** -- garage customer retention layer + online presence advanced strategique. Le sprint construit deux couches complementaires : (1) **loyalty programs** complete avec points system (customers earn points sur direct bookings Sprint 29 + redeem points pour rewards catalog garage-specific + automatic tier-based bronze/silver/gold avec benefits configurables + referral programs friend-refer-friend avec dual reward referrer + referred) et (2) **online presence advanced** etendant Sprint 29 GaragePublicProfile foundation avec **sitemap.xml dynamic enrichi** (toutes routes garage indexed + lastmod + changefreq + priority + structured data per page), **content marketing** blog posts per-garage (CRUD posts + SEO meta + Schema.org BlogPosting + featured images S3 + author + published_at + tags) pour ameliorer organic traffic + thought leadership garage owner, **reviews showcase** featured testimonials (cherry-pick best reviews + display order configurable + homepage prominence + Schema.org Review integration), et **SEO advanced** (structured data enriched + Open Graph + Twitter Cards + canonical URLs + hreflang FR/AR optionnel + JSON-LD richer markup). Le sprint introduit **decision-033 ratification** garage online presence advanced + loyalty programs foundation + customer retention strategique + commercial differentiation premium tier garages enterprise.

A la sortie de ce sprint, Skalean dispose d'**entites domain Garage Online + Loyalty** :
- **`LoyaltyProgram`** (id + garage_id + name VARCHAR + active BOOLEAN + earn_rate_points_per_mad NUMERIC(5,2) default 1.0 (1 point par 10 MAD = 0.1) + tier_thresholds JSONB schema {bronze: 0, silver: 500, gold: 2000} + points_expiry_days INTEGER default 365 + program_terms_url + audit_trail)
- **`LoyaltyPoints`** (id + customer_id FK DirectCustomer Sprint 29 + garage_id FK + balance INTEGER + lifetime_earned INTEGER + lifetime_redeemed INTEGER + current_tier enum bronze/silver/gold computed + last_activity_at + audit_trail) avec UNIQUE (customer_id, garage_id)
- **`LoyaltyPointsTransaction`** (id + customer_id + garage_id + type enum earn/redeem/expire/adjust_credit/adjust_debit + points INTEGER + reason_text + linked_booking_id FK nullable + linked_reward_id FK nullable + occurred_at + audit_trail) append-only audit log
- **`LoyaltyTier`** (id + garage_id + name enum bronze/silver/gold + threshold_points INTEGER + threshold_lifetime_mad NUMERIC nullable + benefits JSONB {discount_percent_on_bookings + priority_booking + free_diagnostic + special_offers_access} + active + audit_trail) configuration per garage
- **`Reward`** (id + garage_id + name + description + photos TEXT[] + points_cost INTEGER + reward_type enum discount_percent/discount_fixed_mad/free_service/merchandise + reward_value NUMERIC + applicable_services UUID[] nullable + stock_remaining INTEGER nullable + valid_from + valid_to + active + audit_trail)
- **`Referral`** (id + referrer_customer_id FK + referred_customer_id FK + garage_id FK + referral_code VARCHAR + status enum pending/completed/cancelled + referrer_reward_points INTEGER default 100 + referred_discount_percent INTEGER default 10 + referred_first_booking_id FK nullable + completed_at + audit_trail) avec UNIQUE referral_code global
- **`BlogPost`** (id + garage_id FK + slug_seo VARCHAR + title + subtitle + content_html TEXT + excerpt + featured_image_url S3 + author_name + tags TEXT[] + published_at + status enum draft/published/archived + meta_description + read_time_minutes + audit_trail) avec UNIQUE (garage_id, slug_seo)
- **`Testimonial`** (id + garage_id FK + review_id FK Sprint 29 + featured BOOLEAN + display_order INTEGER + custom_caption nullable + active + audit_trail) curate Sprint 29 reviews for homepage showcase

Un **package `@insurtech/garage-online-loyalty`** v1.0.0 NestJS module, **6 services principaux** :

**LoyaltyProgramService** :
- `createOrUpdateProgram(garage_id, program_config)` upsert LoyaltyProgram + audit
- `getProgram(garage_id)` lookup + default if not configured
- `configureTierThresholds(garage_id, thresholds)` update bronze/silver/gold thresholds + recompute customer tiers
- `setEarnRate(garage_id, points_per_mad)` update earn rate + audit
- `getProgramTerms(garage_id)` HTML page program terms display

**LoyaltyPointsService** (CRITIQUE Sprint 29 integration) :
- Event handler Sprint 29 `direct_booking.completed` :
  1. Lookup or create LoyaltyPoints (customer_id, garage_id)
  2. Calculate points_earned = floor(booking.amount_final_mad * earn_rate_points_per_mad / 10) (default 1 point par 10 MAD = 100 MAD booking = 10 points)
  3. Create LoyaltyPointsTransaction type='earn' + linked_booking_id + occurred_at
  4. Atomic UPDATE balance += points_earned + lifetime_earned += points_earned + last_activity_at
  5. Recompute current_tier based new lifetime_earned vs tier_thresholds
  6. If tier upgraded : Sprint 9 notify customer "Vous avez atteint tier {new_tier}" + benefits explanation
  7. Audit + emit `loyalty_points.earned`
- `redeemPoints(customer_id, garage_id, reward_id)` atomic transaction :
  1. Verify Reward.active + stock_remaining > 0 if applicable
  2. Verify LoyaltyPoints.balance >= reward.points_cost
  3. Atomic UPDATE balance -= reward.points_cost + lifetime_redeemed += reward.points_cost
  4. Create LoyaltyPointsTransaction type='redeem' + linked_reward_id
  5. Decrement reward.stock_remaining if applicable
  6. Generate redemption code (if discount type for next booking)
  7. Sprint 9 notify customer "Recompense reservee : {reward.name}"
  8. Audit + emit `loyalty_points.redeemed`
- `expirePoints()` cron daily (LOYALTY_POINTS_EXPIRY_CHECK_CRON=0 5 * * *) :
  - Iterate LoyaltyPoints WHERE last_activity_at < now - points_expiry_days
  - Identify expired points subset (FIFO oldest earned first)
  - Atomic UPDATE balance -= expired_points
  - Create LoyaltyPointsTransaction type='expire' + reason
  - Sprint 9 notify customer "Points expires"
  - Audit
- `adjustPoints(customer_id, garage_id, points_delta, reason, actor_user_id)` super_admin OR garage_owner manual correction + create transaction type='adjust_credit' OR 'adjust_debit' + audit
- `getBalance(customer_id, garage_id)` simple lookup
- `getTransactionsHistory(customer_id, garage_id, filters)` filtered history
- `getCurrentTier(customer_id, garage_id)` compute from lifetime_earned

**ReferralService** :
- `createReferral(referrer_customer_id, garage_id)` generate UNIQUE referral_code (8 chars alphanumeric uppercase) + create Referral status='pending' + return shareable link `https://{garage_slug}.skalean.com/?ref={referral_code}` + audit
- `applyReferralCode(referred_customer_id, referral_code, garage_id)` lookup pending Referral + verify same garage_id + verify referrer != referred + UPDATE Referral.referred_customer_id + audit
- Event handler Sprint 29 `direct_booking.completed` :
  - Check if customer.first_booking AND has Referral status='pending' with referred_customer_id=customer
  - If yes : UPDATE Referral status='completed' + referred_first_booking_id + completed_at
  - Award referrer : LoyaltyPointsService.earn(referrer_customer_id, garage_id, REFERRAL_REWARD_POINTS=100, reason='referral_completed')
  - Apply discount on first booking referred : already applied at booking creation via Sprint 31 promotion mechanism
  - Sprint 9 notify referrer "Votre filleul a effectue sa premiere reservation. 100 points credites" + notify referred "Bienvenue. Profitez d'une reduction de 10% sur votre premiere reservation"
  - Audit + emit `referral.completed`
- `listMyReferrals(referrer_customer_id, garage_id)` customer-side referrals tracking
- `cancelReferral(referral_id, reason)` if status='pending' only + audit

**BlogPostService** :
- `createBlogPost(garage_id, post_data, featured_image)` validate + upload featured_image S3 Sprint 10 + status='draft' + audit
- `publishBlogPost(post_id)` validate content + UPDATE status='published' + published_at + audit + invalidate sitemap cache
- `unpublishBlogPost(post_id)` status='draft' or 'archived' + audit
- `getBlogPostBySlug(garage_id, slug)` public lookup + cache 1h + SEO meta + Schema.org BlogPosting structured data
- `listBlogPosts(garage_id, filters)` browse + filters tags + status + pagination
- `getRelatedPosts(post_id, limit=3)` similar tags suggestion

**TestimonialsShowcaseService** :
- `featureReview(review_id, garage_id, display_order, custom_caption?)` curate Sprint 29 review + create Testimonial featured=true + audit
- `unfeatureTestimonial(testimonial_id)` featured=false + audit
- `updateDisplayOrder(garage_id, ordered_testimonial_ids[])` reorder atomic
- `getFeaturedTestimonials(garage_id, limit=6)` public lookup featured + active + order ASC + include Sprint 29 review data
- `getTestimonialSchemaOrg(testimonial_id)` generate Schema.org Review structured data for SEO

**SEOAdvancedService** :
- `generateSitemap(garage_id?)` dynamic XML sitemap :
  - If garage_id : sitemap per-garage `/sitemap-garage-{slug}.xml` (profile + blog posts + reviews page)
  - If null : main sitemap index `/sitemap.xml` (all active garages + main pages)
  - Include `<lastmod>` last modified + `<changefreq>` + `<priority>`
  - Cache 24h Redis
- `getStructuredDataLocalBusiness(garage_id)` enhanced Schema.org with aggregateRating + acceptedPaymentMethods + areaServed + sameAs (social links) + brand foundation
- `getStructuredDataBlogPosting(post_id)` Schema.org BlogPosting (author + datePublished + image + headline + articleBody preview + publisher)
- `getStructuredDataReview(review_id)` Schema.org Review with author + reviewRating + datePublished + itemReviewed reference
- `getOpenGraphTags(page_type, entity_id)` Open Graph meta tags page-specific (og:title + og:description + og:image + og:type)
- `getTwitterCards(page_type, entity_id)` Twitter Cards meta tags
- `getCanonicalURL(garage_id, route_path)` canonical URL absolute

**Integration Sprint 29 GaragePublicProfile extension** : profile pages enriched with featured testimonials + blog posts list + loyalty program info (if customer logged) + referral link generator + Schema.org enriched markup,

**Integration Sprint 31 marketing campaigns** : LoyaltyPointsService earn event triggers eligibility for Sprint 31 segment "vip" (lifetime_earned > threshold) used by Sprint 31 CampaignService.getSegmentRecipients,

**Integration Sprint 24 garage-portal extensions** screens nouveaux **4 tabs** :
- `/loyalty/*` (program configuration + rewards catalog CRUD + customers points view + transactions history + tiers configuration)
- `/blog/*` (blog posts CRUD + featured image upload + preview + publish + analytics views)
- `/testimonials/*` (curate Sprint 29 reviews + featured toggle + display order drag-and-drop + preview)
- `/seo-settings/*` (sitemap preview + canonical URL config + Open Graph defaults + analytics Google Search Console foundation)

**Integration Sprint 18 customer-portal extensions** screens nouveaux **4 sections** :
- `/loyalty/my-points` (customer balance + current tier + tier progression + transactions history + tier benefits explanation)
- `/loyalty/rewards-catalog` (browse rewards available + filter category + points_cost + redeem button + redemption history)
- `/loyalty/refer-friend` (referral code generator + shareable link + social share + my referrals tracking + reward earned summary)
- `/blog/[garage-slug]/[post-slug]` (blog post reading + share + related posts + comment foundation Phase 8+)

**Integration Sprint 13 analytics loyalty + content marketing** materialized views (loyalty_engagement_mv + tier_distribution_mv + rewards_redemption_mv + referral_funnel_mv + blog_traffic_mv + testimonial_impressions_mv) + refresh daily 04h00 + dashboards,

Des **endpoints REST garage online + loyalty** controller `garage-online-loyalty.controller.ts` 14 endpoints + permissions Sprint 7.5a (garage_owner + customer access own data + super_admin) + rate limits + idempotency Sprint 15,

Et **30+ tests E2E** scenarios couvrant loyalty program configuration + Sprint 29 integration earn points + redeem rewards + referrals + blog SEO + testimonials showcase + extensions Sprint 18+24.

Le sprint constitue **customer retention layer strategique** + **online presence advanced** + **commercial differentiation premium tier**. Sans Sprint 32, garages on Skalean = transactions one-shot sans systeme retention = customer churn elevee + acquisition cost amortized faiblement. Avec Sprint 32, loyalty + content + SEO = customer LTV (Lifetime Value) max + organic traffic + premium positioning vs garages non-platform.

### Exclus du Sprint 32 (defere)

Loyalty points multi-garage redemption (points earned at garage A redeemable at garage B) defers Phase 8+ (Sprint 32 garage-specific points), partner rewards (third-party reward providers like Carrefour + restaurant chains) defers Phase 8+, gamification advanced (badges + achievements + leaderboards + challenges) defers Phase 8+ (Sprint 32 tiers basic only), loyalty mobile app native dedicated defers Phase 8+, automated tier benefits application (free diagnostic auto-applied at booking) defers Sprint 33 AI + advanced rules engine, blog comments + community features defers Phase 8+, blog post scheduling advanced (calendar editor + drafts collaboration) defers Phase 8+ (Sprint 32 simple draft/publish), blog post AI-assisted writing (Sprint 33 AI defer), social media auto-posting blog (Twitter + Facebook + LinkedIn) defers Phase 8+, blog post analytics individual (page views + time on page + bounce rate per post) defers Sprint 33 via Google Search Console integration, multilingual content FR + AR + EN auto-translation defers Phase 8+, virtual showroom + 360-degree garage tours defers Phase 8+, video testimonials defers Phase 8+, podcast publishing per garage defers Phase 8+, et CRM email automation advanced beyond Sprint 31 (drip campaigns + funnels + behavioral triggers) defers Phase 8+ Sprint 33 AI optimization.

---

## CONTEXTE STRATEGIQUE -- POURQUOI LE SPRINT EST CRITIQUE

Sprint 32 est **customer retention strategique** + **online presence advanced** + **commercial differentiation premium tier garages enterprise**. Quatre dimensions strategiques.

Premierement, **customer retention via loyalty programs**. Garage industry Morocco currently transactional one-shot (customer chooses garage per booking + no incentive return same garage). With Sprint 32 loyalty programs, garages on Skalean offer points + rewards + tiers + referrals = customer LTV (Lifetime Value) increases significantly (typical 3-5x for loyalty programs vs non-loyalty). Skalean enables this without garage owners needing to build custom loyalty infrastructure = competitive moat vs non-platform garages.

Deuxiemement, **online presence advanced SEO + content marketing**. Sprint 29 GaragePublicProfile foundation provides basic SEO + Schema.org LocalBusiness. Sprint 32 advances with sitemap dynamic enrichi + Schema.org BlogPosting + Schema.org Review + Open Graph + Twitter Cards + canonical URLs = enhanced Google ranking + social sharing optimized + featured snippets eligibility. Garages on Skalean platform benefit from professional SEO at zero additional cost = significant value proposition vs DIY garage websites + Google My Business only.

Troisiemement, **commercial differentiation premium tier garages enterprise**. Sprint 32 features (loyalty + content marketing + featured testimonials + SEO advanced) position Skalean as **enterprise-grade garage platform** vs basic competitors. Foundation for tiered Skalean pricing model Phase 8+ (Basic + Premium + Enterprise garage subscriptions) where Premium garages unlock additional features (advanced loyalty + AI Sprint 33 + custom branding extensions).

Quatriemement, **foundation Sprint 33 AI optimization training data**. Sprint 33 AI features (customer churn prediction + recommendation engine personalized rewards + predictive lifetime value scoring + content marketing AI suggestions) require comprehensive engagement data foundation. Sprint 32 establishes loyalty interactions + content engagement + referral patterns = rich training dataset for Sprint 33 AI = differentiated AI value proposition.

---
```

```
### Decision-033 -- Garage Online Presence Advanced + Loyalty Programs Foundation

**Justification** :
- (a) Customer retention via loyalty programs (LTV 3-5x increase typical)
- (b) Online presence advanced SEO + content marketing (organic traffic boost)
- (c) Commercial differentiation premium tier enterprise SaaS
- (d) Foundation Sprint 33 AI training data (engagement patterns)
- (e) Foundation Phase 8+ tiered pricing Skalean (Basic + Premium + Enterprise)

**Architecture** :
- 8 entites domain + RLS strict garage_id
- 6 services + 2 event handlers Sprint 29 + 1 worker
- Sprint 24 garage-portal extensions 4 tabs
- Sprint 18 customer-portal extensions 4 sections
- Sprint 13 analytics 6 materialized views

---

## DECISIONS STRATEGIQUES REFERENCEES

Toutes decisions 001-032 + **decision-033** (NOUVELLE).

**Decision-009 comm-wa-email** : strict (Sprint 9 notifications tier upgrade + points earn + referral completed).

**Decision-025 multi-app-architecture** : strict (Sprint 24 garage-portal extensions + Sprint 18 customer-portal extensions).

**Decision-030 garage-vertical-direct-customer** : strict (Sprint 29 direct_booking.completed event integration LoyaltyPointsService).

**Decision-032 garage-accounting-marketing** : strict (Sprint 31 CampaignService segmentation reuse LoyaltyPoints.lifetime_earned for vip segment).

**Decision-033 garage-online-presence-loyalty-foundation** (NOUVEAU - ratification 17 juin 2026) : adoption **garage online presence advanced (sitemap dynamic + content marketing blog posts + reviews showcase featured + SEO Schema.org enrichi) + loyalty programs foundation (points + tiers bronze/silver/gold + rewards catalog + referrals)**. Justification : (a) Customer retention LTV boost, (b) Online presence SEO organic traffic, (c) Commercial differentiation premium enterprise, (d) Sprint 33 AI training data foundation, (e) Phase 8+ tiered pricing. Architecture : 8 entites + 6 services + 2 handlers + 1 worker + Sprint 18+24 extensions.

---

## PIEGES TECHNIQUES GENERAUX

**Piege 1 : Loyalty points balance race conditions.** Two concurrent operations (earn + redeem same customer) corrupt balance. Solution : atomic UPDATE balance with optimistic locking version column LoyaltyPoints + transaction isolation level SERIALIZABLE for critical operations + retry on conflict + tests stress 100 concurrent earn/redeem.

**Piege 2 : Tier computation inconsistency.** Tier computed from lifetime_earned but thresholds change = customers tier inconsistent. Solution : tier recomputed real-time on each LoyaltyPoints update + tier transition events emit for notifications + historical tier achievement preserved in audit_trail.

**Piege 3 : Points expiry FIFO complexity.** Identify which points expire first (oldest earned) requires transaction history scan. Solution : LoyaltyPointsTransaction append-only + indexed (customer_id, garage_id, occurred_at) + FIFO algorithm document + tests with multi-year history accuracy.

**Piege 4 : Referral fraud (self-referral + multiple accounts).** Customer creates fake referred account to earn points. Solution : verify referrer != referred (phone + email check) + verify referred is genuine first_booking customer (no prior DirectCustomer) + fraud detection foundation Sprint 33 + manual moderation queue for suspicious patterns.

**Piege 5 : Referral code generation collisions.** Random short codes collide for active programs. Solution : 8-char alphanumeric uppercase generated via crypto.randomBytes + check UNIQUE constraint + retry max 5 times + monitor collision rate.

**Piege 6 : Reward stock_remaining race conditions.** Multiple customers redeem same limited reward concurrently. Solution : atomic UPDATE stock_remaining = stock_remaining - 1 WHERE stock_remaining > 0 RETURNING + tests stress + clear error message when out of stock.

**Piege 7 : Blog SEO indexing risk bad content.** Garage owner publishes spam/duplicate/low-quality content = SEO penalty platform. Solution : content guidelines documented + min word count enforced + duplicate detection foundation + featured_image required + admin review for first 3 posts per garage foundation moderation.

**Piege 8 : Sitemap dynamic generation performance large garages.** 1000+ garages * 50 blog posts each = sitemap generation slow. Solution : sitemap index pattern + per-garage sitemaps + Redis cache 24h + background generation worker + invalidation on publish.

**Piege 9 : Schema.org structured data validation.** Invalid JSON-LD = Google rejects rich snippets. Solution : jsonld-validator library + tests against Google Rich Results test API + monitoring Google Search Console post-deploy.

**Piege 10 : Customer-portal loyalty UX complexity.** Points + tiers + rewards + referrals overwhelm customers. Solution : progressive disclosure UI (current balance prominent + rewards browse easy + tier progression visual bar + referral hidden until customer reaches level 2 returning) + onboarding tour first-time + Sprint 9 notifications gamify earn moments.

---
```
