## PIEGES TECHNIQUES GENERAUX

**Piege 1 : Production region selection data residency.** Decision-008 Morocco data residency strict mais Morocco AWS datacenter pas encore disponible (foundation Phase 9+). Solution : eu-west-3 Paris foundation Sprint 36 + roadmap Phase 9+ Morocco region quand AWS Local Zones MA disponibles + CNDP compliance verification Sprint 35.

**Piege 2 : Terraform state file lock conflicts.** Concurrent Terraform apply causes state corruption + infrastructure drift. Solution : S3 backend with DynamoDB locking strict + CI/CD enforced single-applier + manual emergency unlock procedures documented + tests staging environment.

**Piege 3 : CI/CD secrets exposure GitHub Actions.** Production secrets in GitHub Actions = security breach risk. Solution : GitHub Secrets encrypted + minimal scope (no production credentials in code) + OIDC federation AWS (no long-lived credentials) + secrets injection runtime via Vault + audit logs comprehensive.

**Piege 4 : Canary deployment metrics false positives.** Aggressive automated rollback on noise metrics = unnecessary rollbacks + deployment velocity slow. Solution : SLO-based thresholds tunable per service + monitoring window 30 min minimum + manual override capability + tests staging environment + foundation Phase 9+ ML-based decision making.

**Piege 5 : Observability cost spike.** Datadog OR ELK cost scales with logs + metrics volume = surprise bills. Solution : log levels tunable INFO production (not DEBUG) + sampling traces (10% production + 100% errors) + metrics cardinality controlled + cost alerts setup + foundation Phase 9+ cost optimization regular reviews.

**Piege 6 : Multi-AZ database failover testing.** RDS Multi-AZ failover tested only when actual incident = unknown behavior production. Solution : DR testing Sprint 35 includes Multi-AZ failover quarterly + measure RTO actual + tests staging environment failover scenarios + runbooks documented.

**Piege 7 : Production secrets rotation breaking services.** Vault rotation breaks active database connections + JWT signing = production outage. Solution : Sprint 35 zero-downtime rotation patterns deployed Sprint 36 strict + connection pool refresh + grace periods JWT keys + tests staging rotation scenarios.

**Piege 8 : Capacity forecasting accuracy growth assumptions.** Linear regression projections inaccurate for non-linear growth (viral launch + seasonal spikes) = over-provisioning OR under-provisioning. Solution : multiple forecast models foundation Sprint 36 + manual review garage_owner growth signals + foundation Phase 9+ ML-based forecasting + buffer 30% capacity overhead.

**Piege 9 : Alert fatigue on-call team.** Too many alerts P1/P2 = team ignores critical = SLO breach not caught. Solution : alert rules tuning iterative + runbook-required all alerts + alerting only actionable issues + foundation Phase 9+ AI-based alert correlation + post-mortem review noise alerts.

**Piege 10 : DNS + TLS certificate management complexity.** Manual DNS + certificate renewal causes outages. Solution : Route53 automated + Let's Encrypt automated renewal cert-manager Kubernetes + monitoring expiration 30 days advance + foundation Phase 9+ AWS Certificate Manager full automation.

---

Un **package `@insurtech/go-live-execution`** v1.0.0 NestJS module + **5 services principaux** :

**GoLiveExecutionService** :
- `executeGoLive(service_name, version)` orchestrate :
  1. Sprint 36 DeploymentService.executeCanaryDeployment
  2. Smoke tests automated production environment
  3. Load tests baseline (1000 req/s sustained 10 min)
  4. Monitoring window 48h with hourly check-ins
  5. Sprint 9 notifications stakeholders hourly first 12h
  6. Update GoLiveExecution status + audit
- `runSmokeTests(service_name)` health checks + critical user journeys (auth + create booking + view dashboard) + Sprint 14 events emit verification + Sprint 13 ClickHouse ingestion verification + Sprint 28 admin-portal access
- `runLoadTests(service_name, scenario)` k6 OR Artillery load test scripts + 1000 req/s sustained 10 min + measure p95 latency + error rate + Sprint 13 metrics ingestion lag
- `monitorPostGoLive(service_name, hours)` continuous monitoring + Sprint 36 ServiceHealthService snapshots + Sprint 35 SecurityIncidentService alerts review + capacity utilization tracking
- Sprint 9 notifications matrix (deploy_admin + on_call + super_admin + Saad CTO + Abla CEO)

**DemoDayPreparationService** :
- `createMaterial(type, content_url)` register material + reviewers assignment
- `reviewMaterial(material_id, user_id, approved, notes)` review workflow
- `finalizeMaterial(material_id, user_id)` final approval + ready_for_demo
- `getReadinessStatus()` aggregations all materials status + completion percentage
- Final approval before Demo Day mandatory all materials = approved

**PostGoLiveOperationsService** :
- `trackPostGoLiveIncident(security_incident_id, impact_assessment)` link Sprint 35 incident + Demo Day proximity impact

- `generateProgramFinalReport()` comprehensive 37 sprints + 38 decisions + 9 phases + Demo Day + commercial launch + roadmap Phase 10+

## CONTEXTE STRATEGIQUE -- POURQUOI LE SPRINT EST CRITIQUE

Sprint 37 est **CULMINATION ABSOLUTE Programme Skalean Assurflow** + **Demo Day Marrakech 30 juin 2026 proof point ACAPS jury + investisseurs + Programme Emergence sign-off** + **commercial launch foundation Phase 10+ scaling**. Cinq dimensions strategiques absolues.

Premierement, **Demo Day 30 juin 2026 Marrakech execution flawless mandatory**. 12 mois preparation Programme converge vers Demo Day. ACAPS Programme Emergence jury attend demonstration end-to-end + technical depth + commercial readiness + production-grade execution. Sprint 37 delivers polished narrative + live demos scripted + Q&A preparation comprehensive + risk mitigation slides + roadmap Phase 10+ vision. Sans Sprint 37 preparation rigoureuse, Demo Day = improvisation = catastrophic risk reputation ACAPS + investisseurs.

Deuxiemement, **production Go-Live execution flawless impacts Demo Day live demos**. Live demos Demo Day reposent sur production environment fonctionnelle. Sprint 37 production Go-Live execution canary all services + smoke tests + monitoring 48h = stable foundation Demo Day. Sprint 37 backup demo environment + offline videos fallback = risk mitigation.

Troisiemement, **commercial launch foundation Phase 10+ scaling Maroc**. Sprint 37 etablit pricing tier model + onboarding workflows + early adopter program 10 garages Marrakech pilots + skalean.com/fr production push = foundation commercial momentum post-Demo Day capitalizing ACAPS sign-off + investisseurs visibility. Sans Sprint 37 commercial foundation, Demo Day proof point sans capitalization commerciale = opportunite manquee.

Quatriemement, **PROGRAMME GLOBAL CLOTURE comprehensive proof Programme Emergence completion**. 37 sprints livres + 38 decisions ratifiees + 9 phases completes + Demo Day execute + commercial launch foundation = comprehensive proof execution capability Skalean equipe (Saad CTO + Abla CEO) qualifie pour Programme Emergence sign-off ACAPS + foundation expansion Phase 10+ vision strategique founder (horizontal platform 4 modules + verticals InsurTech sante OBNL Immo Government Legal Construction HR + cross-country MA + Tunisie + Senegal + Cote d'Ivoire + Anthropic AI partnership).

Cinquiemement, **lessons learned + retrospective Phase 10+ continuous improvement foundation**. Sprint 37 capture lessons 12 mois Programme + retrospective team + roadmap Phase 10+ = continuous improvement culture foundation Skalean entreprise scaling.

## PIEGES TECHNIQUES GENERAUX

**Piege 1 : Demo Day live demos production environment failure.** Live demos fail Demo Day = catastrophic reputation. Solution : Sprint 37 backup demo environment isolated (staging-prod-like) + offline videos fallback all demos + dry runs 5+ rehearsals + Sprint 36 monitoring 48h pre-Demo Day + Sprint 35 incident response runbook accessible Demo Day team.

**Piege 2 : Demo Day timing overrun.** Demos overrun allocated time = Q&A truncated + jury impression negative. Solution : strict timing measured rehearsals + script tightly + cut sequences flexible + Saad + Abla coordination handoffs + slides count optimized + tests timing variance + buffer 5 min per demo.

**Piege 3 : ACAPS jury questions unanticipated.** Unprepared questions Demo Day = stumbling response = credibility damaged. Solution : Q&A preparation comprehensive 50+ anticipated questions ACAPS + investors + categorized (technical + commercial + regulatory + roadmap) + rehearsal Q&A sessions interne + concise responses prepared + escalation Saad CTO technical + Abla CEO commercial.

**Piege 4 : Production Go-Live first 48h incidents.** Go-Live always has incidents = monitoring critical + response fast. Solution : Sprint 37 monitoring 48h continuous + on-call rotation active Sprint 36 + Sprint 35 incident response operational + escalation matrix + Sprint 9 hourly stakeholder notifications first 12h + rollback ready Sprint 36 if catastrophic.

**Piege 5 : Commercial launch onboarding poor UX abandons.** Customers signup but abandon onboarding = wasted Demo Day capitalization. Solution : Sprint 37 onboarding workflows automated + minimal friction + KYC foundation simple + Sprint 9 email nurture + Sprint 32 progressive disclosure UX pattern + analytics funnel Sprint 13 + iterative improvements Phase 10+.

**Piege 6 : Skalean.com/fr production push performance issues.** Public website slow during Demo Day traffic spike = brand damage. Solution : CloudFront CDN Sprint 36 + edge caching aggressive + load testing pre-Demo Day + Sprint 36 capacity planning + monitoring real-time + backup static fallback.

**Piege 7 : Early adopter program 10 garages selection biased.** Wrong garages = wrong feedback = misleading Phase 10+ direction. Solution : Sprint 37 selection criteria documented (digitally ready + Marrakech proximity + diverse profiles + commitment confirmed) + interview process + signed pilot agreements + success metrics defined.

**Piege 8 : PROGRAMME GLOBAL CLOTURE rapport rushed superficial.** Rushed closure rapport miss lessons learned + retrospective value. Solution : Sprint 37 dedicated 12h closure + structured template comprehensive + team retrospective session + lessons categorized + Phase 10+ recommendations actionable + archival permanent.

**Piege 9 : Phase 10+ roadmap commercial unrealistic.** Unrealistic Phase 10+ roadmap Demo Day damage credibility post-Demo Day execution. Solution : Phase 10+ roadmap conservative + milestones realistic + dependencies documented + foundation Sprint 35 compliance + Sprint 36 infrastructure scalable + commercial validation post-Demo Day before Phase 11+ cross-country.

**Piege 10 : Team retrospective negative spiral.** Team fatigue 12 mois Programme can lead negative retrospective = morale damaged Phase 10+. Solution : Sprint 37 retrospective structured (start + stop + continue + appreciations) + celebrations Demo Day execute + thanks team contributions + foundation Phase 10+ vision energizing + work-life balance Phase 10+ kickoff staggered.

## 40. B-40-sprint-40-insurance-broker-foundation.md

```md
# B-40 -- META-PROMPT SPRINT 40 : INSURANCE BROKER FOUNDATION

**Version** : v3.0 (Phase 10 Sprint 1 -- Insurance Broker Vertical ouverture)
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprints 40-50)
**Sprint** : 40 / 50 -- Phase 10 Sprint 1
**Position** : Apres Sprint 37 PROGRAMME CLOTURE Phase 1-9 + Demo Day, ouverture Phase 10 Insurance Broker Vertical
**Numerotation taches** : 10.1.1 a 10.1.12 (12 taches)
**Effort total** : ~92 heures developpement
**Priorite** : P0 OUVERTURE PHASE 10 + FOUNDATION POLICY DOMAIN
**AUCUNE EMOJI AUTORISEE** (decision-006 absolu)

## OBJECTIF GLOBAL DU SPRINT

Implementer le **framework Insurance Broker Foundation** -- couche domain insurance strategique ouvrant Phase 10 Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprints 40-50) + foundation Policy lifecycle complete pour courtiers d'assurance Morocco + integration connecteurs compagnies Sprint 34 stubs + ACAPS compliance broker-side. Le sprint construit **8 categories foundation insurance** : (1) **Entites domain Policy** comprehensives (Policy + Quote + Subscription + Coverage + Premium + Beneficiary + PolicyDocument + PolicyEvent timeline) avec RLS strict multi-tenant Sprint 6 (chaque courtier voit ses polices uniquement, isolation absolute tenant_id) + indexes performance + UNIQUE constraints (policy_number per insurer + tenant) + audit_trail comprehensive Sprint 7, (2) **State machine policy lifecycle** rigoureuse (draft -> quote_generated -> quote_accepted -> subscribed -> activated -> active -> renewal_pending -> renewed OR modified OR cancelled OR expired -> archived) avec transitions validees + Sprint 14 events Kafka emission per transition + Sprint 15 idempotency keys + workers BullMQ Repeatable pour transitions automatiques (renewal_alerts J-30 + expiration_auto J+0 + archive J+365), (3) **PolicyService comprehensive** -- CRUD policies avec validations metier strictes (effective_date < expiry_date + premium_total > 0 + coverages sum = premium_total + tenant_id strict RLS) + state machine transitions controlled + Sprint 7 audit comprehensive + Sprint 9 notifications customers + brokers + Sprint 13 ClickHouse policy_metrics_mv (policies actives + renewal rate + churn + average premium) + Sprint 28 admin-portal policies dashboards, (4) **QuoteService intelligent foundation** -- generation devis avec parameters JSONB (vehicle data + driver profile + coverage selection + risk factors) + computation premium rule-based foundation (Sprint 33 garage AI patterns reuse mais insurance-specific) + valid_until 30 jours default + conversion automatique quote_accepted -> subscription_initiated + Sprint 14 events QuoteGenerated/QuoteAccepted, (5) **SubscriptionService workflow** -- orchestration souscription complete (quote_accepted -> KYC verification customer + Beneficiary capture + signature 43-20 Sprint 10 + initial payment Sprint 11 + Sprint 34 connecteur compagnie API call create policy in insurer system + PolicyDocument generation + activation final) + Sprint 9 notifications customer policy active + welcome documents + idempotency Sprint 15 strict (subscription_id idempotency_key) + saga pattern compensations sur failure, (6) **CoverageService + PremiumService** -- modeling coverages (responsabilite civile + dommages collision + vol incendie + bris glace + assistance + protection juridique foundation) + premium breakdown par coverage + frequency tracking (monthly + quarterly + semi-annual + annual) + Sprint 11 recurring payments Stripe Subscriptions + Sprint 9 payment reminders J-7 + J-3 + J-1 + late_payment workflow Sprint 35 dunning foundation, (7) **BeneficiaryService + KYC foundation** -- beneficiary capture + relationship types + percentage allocation + CNIE/passport verification foundation Sprint 34 (CNIE stub Phase 8) + AML (Anti-Money Laundering) basic checks foundation Phase 11+ + Sprint 7 audit comprehensive PII Sprint 27 masking strict, et (8) **PolicyLifecycleService + workers** -- cron jobs structures (renewal_alerts_cron daily 09h00 MA J-30 expirations + Sprint 9 notifications customers + brokers + expiration_processing_cron daily 00h05 MA transitions automatic active -> expired + archive_cron weekly Monday 02h00 MA transitions expired -> archived J+365) + Sprint 14 events PolicyExpiringSoon/PolicyExpired/PolicyArchived emission.

Le sprint produit **integration Sprint 34 connecteur AssurMaghreb stub activation** premier connecteur compagnie operational (subscription flow end-to-end avec mocked AssurMaghreb API responses Sprint 34 decision-027 fictional credible brand names) + foundation pattern replicable autres 5 connecteurs stubs (Atlas Insurance + MediAssur + Maghreb Mutuelle + Royale Assurance + Continental Insurance) Sprint 41+. Le sprint introduit **decision-039 ratification** Insurance Broker Vertical Foundation + Policy domain comprehensive + multi-compagnies integration framework + ACAPS compliance broker-side strict + foundation Phase 10 Sprints 41-50 progression.

A la sortie de ce sprint, Skalean dispose d'**entites domain Insurance Policy** :
- **`Policy`** (id + tenant_id UUID NOT NULL FK + customer_id UUID NOT NULL FK + insurer_id UUID NOT NULL FK Sprint 34 connecteur + product_type enum auto/health/home/life/professional + policy_number VARCHAR generated by insurer + status enum draft/quote_generated/quote_accepted/subscribed/activated/active/renewal_pending/renewed/modified/cancelled/expired/archived + effective_date DATE + expiry_date DATE + premium_total NUMERIC(10,2) + premium_currency VARCHAR default 'MAD' + broker_commission_percent NUMERIC(5,2) + acaps_reference VARCHAR Sprint 35 compliance + created_at + activated_at nullable + cancelled_at nullable + cancellation_reason + audit_trail) UNIQUE (insurer_id, policy_number) + indexes (tenant_id + status partial + effective_date + expiry_date) + RLS strict tenant_id
- **`Quote`** (id + tenant_id FK + customer_id FK + product_type enum + parameters JSONB validated Zod schema product-specific + premium_calculated NUMERIC(10,2) + premium_currency + coverages_breakdown JSONB + valid_until TIMESTAMP + status enum draft/generated/accepted/rejected/expired + converted_to_policy_id nullable FK + created_at + accepted_at nullable + audit_trail) indexes (tenant_id + customer_id + status + valid_until partial)
- **`Subscription`** (id + policy_id FK + quote_id FK + signed_at + signature_43_20_id Sprint 10 FK + initial_payment_id Sprint 11 FK + kyc_verified BOOLEAN + insurer_api_response JSONB Sprint 34 + status enum pending/in_progress/completed/failed/rolled_back + idempotency_key Sprint 15 UNIQUE + audit_trail) UNIQUE (idempotency_key)
- **`Coverage`** (id + policy_id FK + coverage_type enum responsabilite_civile/dommages_collision/vol_incendie/bris_glace/assistance/protection_juridique/individuel_accident + coverage_limit NUMERIC + deductible NUMERIC + premium_part NUMERIC + active BOOLEAN + audit_trail)
- **`Premium`** (id + policy_id FK + frequency enum monthly/quarterly/semi_annual/annual + amount NUMERIC + currency + next_due_date + payments JSONB array of payment_ids + status enum pending/paid/overdue/cancelled + audit_trail) indexes (policy_id + next_due_date partial + status partial)
- **`Beneficiary`** (id + policy_id FK + person_type enum primary_insured/spouse/child/parent/other + relationship VARCHAR + first_name + last_name + date_of_birth + cnie_or_passport + cnie_verified Sprint 34 CNIE stub + percentage NUMERIC(5,2) + audit_trail)
- **`PolicyDocument`** (id + policy_id FK + document_type enum policy_certificate/terms_conditions/welcome_pack/amendment/renewal_notice + s3_key Sprint 10 encrypted + signature_43_20_id nullable + generated_at + audit_trail)
- **`PolicyEvent`** (id + policy_id FK + event_type enum quote_generated/quote_accepted/subscribed/activated/renewal_alert_sent/renewed/modified/cancelled/expired/archived/payment_received/payment_overdue + event_data JSONB + occurred_at + actor_user_id nullable + audit_trail) **append-only** + indexes (policy_id + event_type + occurred_at)

Un **package `@insurtech/insurance-broker-foundation`** v1.0.0 NestJS module + **7 services principaux** :

**PolicyService** :
- `createPolicy(data)` validations + state machine initial state 'draft'
- `transitionPolicy(policy_id, target_state, context)` controlled transitions per state machine rules + Sprint 14 events emission per transition + Sprint 7 audit comprehensive
- `activatePolicy(policy_id)` transition from 'subscribed' -> 'activated' -> 'active' avec Sprint 9 customer welcome notifications + PolicyDocument welcome_pack generation
- `cancelPolicy(policy_id, reason)` transition active -> cancelled + refund prorate Sprint 11 + Sprint 9 customer notification + acaps_reference update Sprint 35
- `getPolicyHistory(policy_id)` PolicyEvent timeline + audit_trail
- Multi-tenant RLS strict Sprint 6 + permissions broker_admin/super_admin Sprint 7.5a

**QuoteService** :
- `generateQuote(data)` validations + parameters JSONB Zod schema + computation premium rule-based foundation (vehicle category + driver age + bonus_malus + coverage selection) + valid_until 30 jours
- `acceptQuote(quote_id)` transition draft -> accepted + create Subscription initial + Sprint 14 event QuoteAccepted
- `rejectQuote(quote_id, reason)` audit + analytics Sprint 13 conversion funnel
- `extendValidity(quote_id, days)` valid_until extension + audit
- Cron `QUOTE_EXPIRATION_CRON=0 1 * * *` daily 01h00 MA mark expired

**SubscriptionService** :
- `initiateSubscription(quote_id)` orchestration saga complete :
  1. KYC verification customer Sprint 34 CNIE stub
  2. Beneficiary capture + validation
  3. Signature 43-20 Sprint 10 trigger
  4. Initial payment Sprint 11 trigger
  5. Sprint 34 connecteur compagnie API call create policy
  6. PolicyDocument generation policy_certificate + welcome_pack
  7. Sprint 9 customer welcome notifications email + WhatsApp
  8. Policy state transition activated -> active
- Saga pattern compensations on failure (rollback signature + payment + insurer API)
- Idempotency Sprint 15 strict
- Sprint 14 events SubscriptionCompleted

**CoverageService** :
- `addCoverage(policy_id, coverage_data)` validations + premium recalculation
- `removeCoverage(policy_id, coverage_id)` validations + premium recalculation + customer notification Sprint 9
- `getCoveragesForPolicy(policy_id)` aggregations + breakdown
- Foundation Phase 10+ coverages catalog management

**PremiumService** :
- `computePremium(coverages, customer_profile)` rule-based foundation (Sprint 33 AI patterns reuse adapted insurance)
- `schedulePremiumPayments(policy_id, frequency)` Sprint 11 recurring Stripe Subscriptions setup
- `getNextDuePayments(date_range)` query upcoming payments
- Cron `PREMIUM_REMINDERS_CRON=0 8 * * *` daily 08h00 MA send Sprint 9 reminders J-7 + J-3 + J-1 before due
- Sprint 9 dunning workflow late payments foundation

**BeneficiaryService** :
- `addBeneficiary(policy_id, beneficiary_data)` validations + CNIE Sprint 34 verification stub
- `validatePercentageAllocation(policy_id)` sum percentages = 100% verification
- Sprint 27 PII masking strict (CNIE + date_of_birth + addresses)
- AML basic checks foundation Phase 11+

**PolicyLifecycleService** :
- Workers BullMQ Repeatable :
  - `renewal-alerts-cron.worker.ts` daily 09h00 MA J-30 expirations + Sprint 9 notifications
  - `expiration-processing-cron.worker.ts` daily 00h05 MA transitions active -> expired
  - `archive-cron.worker.ts` weekly Monday 02h00 MA transitions expired -> archived J+365
- Sprint 14 events emission per lifecycle transition

**Integration Sprint 34 connecteur AssurMaghreb stub** (premier connecteur compagnie active) :
- Subscription flow end-to-end avec mocked AssurMaghreb API responses
- Sprint 34 decision-035 connecteurs framework strict
- Pattern replicable autres 5 connecteurs (Atlas + MediAssur + Maghreb Mutuelle + Royale + Continental) Sprint 41+

**Integration Sprint 28 admin-portal extensions** **4 nouveaux tabs insurance** :
- `/insurance/policies/*` (policies browse + filter + drill-down + audit + state machine visualization)
- `/insurance/quotes/*` (quotes pipeline + conversion funnel Sprint 13 + analytics)
- `/insurance/subscriptions/*` (subscriptions in-flight + saga status + retry actions)
- `/insurance/premiums/*` (premiums schedule + overdue + Sprint 11 payments + Sprint 9 reminders)

**Integration Sprint 13 analytics** :
- `policy_metrics_mv` (policies actives + renewal_rate + churn + average_premium per insurer + per product_type) refresh daily 04h00
- `quote_conversion_funnel_mv` (generated -> accepted -> subscribed conversion rates) refresh daily 04h00

**Integration Sprint 35 ACAPS compliance broker-side** :
- acaps_reference field per Policy
- Audit comprehensive Sprint 7
- Reporting framework Sprint 35 ComplianceAuditService integration

**Integration Sprint 9 notifications** :
- Customer notifications (welcome + payment reminders + renewal alerts + cancellation confirmations)
- Broker notifications (new subscription + payment overdue + renewal due + customer cancellations)
- Sprint 34 events insurer API failures escalation broker_admin

Des **endpoints REST insurance** controller `insurance-broker.controller.ts` 24 endpoints + permissions broker_admin/super_admin Sprint 7.5a + rate limits + idempotency Sprint 15,

Et **35+ tests E2E** scenarios couvrant policy lifecycle complete + quote generation + subscription workflow saga + coverages management + premium scheduling + beneficiaries + renewal alerts + Sprint 34 AssurMaghreb integration test + Sprint 28 admin-portal extensions.

## CONTEXTE STRATEGIQUE -- POURQUOI LE SPRINT EST CRITIQUE

Sprint 40 est **OUVERTURE Phase 10 Insurance Broker Vertical** + **foundation Policy domain absolu** + **ACAPS Programme Emergence credibility broker-side** + **commercial proposition courtiers Morocco**. Cinq dimensions strategiques majeures.

Premierement, **Phase 10 Insurance Broker Vertical = vertical commercial principale**. Apres 37 sprints Phase 1-9 foundation + Sinistre + Garage + production deployment + Demo Day execute, Phase 10 lance le **vertical commercial premier** : Insurance Broker ERP pour courtiers d'assurance Morocco. Sans Sprint 40 foundation Policy domain, Sprints 41-50 impossibles. Capital efficient sequencing : foundation Sprint 40 -> lifecycle Sprint 41 -> souscription Sprint 42 -> features avancees Sprints 43-50.

Deuxiemement, **multi-compagnies integration framework strict mandatory**. Courtiers d'assurance Morocco travaillent avec multiples compagnies (AssurMaghreb + Atlas + MediAssur + Maghreb Mutuelle + Royale + Continental fictives Approche C decision-027). Sprint 40 active premier connecteur AssurMaghreb stub Sprint 34 + foundation pattern replicable. Architecture broker-side comparison multi-compagnies (Sprint 45) + portage portefeuille cross-broker (Sprint 44) impossible sans foundation Sprint 40 robust.

Troisiemement, **ACAPS compliance broker-side mandatory regulatory**. ACAPS Programme Emergence + regulatory framework Morocco insurance brokers stringent (audit + reporting + KYC + AML foundation + transparency). Sprint 40 entites + audit Sprint 7 comprehensive + Sprint 35 ACAPS ComplianceAuditService integration = foundation Phase 10+ official audits sign-off ACAPS commercial scaling.

Quatriemement, **commercial proposition courtiers digitalization Morocco**. Courtiers Morocco souffrent fragmentation digitalisation (excel + papers + manual processes + multiple insurer portals separate). Sprint 40 Skalean Broker ERP unifie = proposition forte commercial post-Demo Day execute. Sprint 40 = foundation features visibility courtiers (policy management unified + quote generation + customer portal + analytics) = compelling B2B SaaS.

Cinquiemement, **commercial launch Phase 10+ post-Demo Day momentum**. Sprint 37 Demo Day execute + commercial launch foundation (pricing + early adopters + skalean.com/fr push). Sprint 40 launches Phase 10 Insurance Broker actual product foundation enabling pilot brokers Marrakech early adopter program commercial commercial validation post-Demo Day capitalization.

## PIEGES TECHNIQUES GENERAUX

**Piege 1 : State machine transitions invalides race conditions.** Concurrent policy updates conduisent etats inconsistents (active + cancelled simultaneously). Solution : PostgreSQL SELECT FOR UPDATE + transaction isolation REPEATABLE READ + state machine validation strict (only valid transitions per state) + Sprint 14 events emit AFTER commit + Sprint 7 audit comprehensive + tests scenarios race conditions.

**Piege 2 : Subscription saga compensations partial failures.** Subscription saga failure middle (signature OK + payment OK + insurer API fail) requires compensations rollback (refund payment + invalidate signature + cleanup). Solution : saga pattern strict per-step compensations defined + Sprint 15 idempotency strict + Sprint 9 alerts broker_admin on failures + manual reconciliation runbook documented + tests staging compensations scenarios.

**Piege 3 : Premium calculation rule-based maintenance complexity.** Rule-based premium engine grows complex over time + maintenance hard + customer disputes. Solution : rules externalisees JSONB configurable + version tracked + audit trail comprehensive + tests scenarios extensive coverage + foundation Phase 11+ AI-based pricing Anthropic partnership.

**Piege 4 : Multi-tenant RLS leaks brokers see other brokers policies.** RLS misconfiguration = compliance breach catastrophic CNDP Morocco + Loi 09-08 sanctions. Solution : RLS Sprint 6 strict tenant_id all 8 tables + tests negative (broker A query broker B policy returns empty) + tenant_id NEVER nullable + Sprint 7 audit comprehensive + pentest Sprint 35 verification + monitoring Sprint 36 alerts on suspicious cross-tenant patterns.

**Piege 5 : Insurer API stub responses unrealistic Sprint 34.** AssurMaghreb stub responses too perfect = pas representative real API failures (latency + errors + rate limits + schema changes). Solution : Sprint 34 stubs simulate failures probabilistic (5% error + variable latency 200ms-3s + occasional schema variations) + Sprint 40 integration tests handle gracefully + Sprint 35 circuit breaker patterns + foundation Phase 11+ real API integration post-licensing.

**Piege 6 : Policy state transitions audit trail incomplet.** State transitions sans audit comprehensive = customer disputes impossible resolve + ACAPS regulatory non-compliance. Solution : PolicyEvent append-only timeline per transition + actor_user_id + event_data JSONB comprehensive + Sprint 7 audit_trail field per entity + Sprint 35 ACAPS audit reporting integration + retention permanente.

**Piege 7 : Quote -> Subscription conversion funnel analytics wrong.** Sprint 13 conversion funnel MV inaccurate due timing windows mal-defined = strategic decisions wrong. Solution : event-driven analytics Sprint 14 events strict + funnel windows configurable + Sprint 13 MV refresh daily + manual sanity checks first week + Sprint 28 admin-portal dashboards validation.

**Piege 8 : KYC verification CNIE stub Sprint 34 not real verification.** CNIE stub Sprint 34 returns success always = false sense security + AML risks Phase 10+ commercial. Solution : Sprint 40 KYC foundation patterns documented + Sprint 34 stub clear "TODO replace real CNDP/DGSN API Phase 11+" + manual review broker_admin workflow optional + foundation Phase 11+ real CNIE integration + AML comprehensive.

**Piege 9 : Beneficiary percentage allocation validation gaps.** Beneficiaries percentage sum != 100% = legal disputes claim payouts. Solution : validation strict sum percentages = 100.00 per Policy + tests edge cases (single + multiple + zero) + Sprint 7 audit beneficiary changes comprehensive + Sprint 9 customer notifications beneficiary updates.

**Piege 10 : Premium recurring payments Sprint 11 customer churn.** Payment failures (insufficient funds + card expired) without dunning = customer churn silent + lost revenue. Solution : Sprint 11 Stripe Subscriptions integration strict + Sprint 9 dunning workflow J-7 + J-3 + J-1 reminders + retry attempts 3 fois + Sprint 9 broker_admin notifications + foundation Phase 11+ AI churn prediction Sprint 33 reuse.

## OBJECTIF GLOBAL DU SPRINT

Implementer le **framework Insurance Policy Lifecycle Complete** -- couche workflows complex strategiques etendant Sprint 40 foundation (Policy + Quote + Subscription) vers lifecycle operations metier complete + activation 5 connecteurs compagnies restants + foundation Sprint 42 souscription intelligente. Le sprint construit **8 categories lifecycle** : (1) **Renewals workflows comprehensive** -- renewal manual (broker initiates 30 jours avant expiration + customer review + acceptance OR refusal + new policy creation linked original_policy_id + Sprint 11 recurring transition seamless) + renewal automatic (opt-in customer Sprint 40 subscription + automated 30 jours avant expiration + Sprint 9 customer notification J-30 cancellation window + auto-creation new policy if no opt-out + transition active -> renewal_pending -> renewed atomic), (2) **Modifications policy endorsements** -- endorsement types (coverage_addition + coverage_removal + sum_insured_change + deductible_change + beneficiary_change + address_change + vehicle_change + payment_frequency_change) + previous_state JSONB snapshot + new_state JSONB snapshot + premium_delta calculation (Sprint 40 PremiumService reuse) + Sprint 10 amendment document signature 43-20 + Sprint 11 premium adjustment payment (additional charge OR refund prorate) + Sprint 14 events emission, (3) **Cancellations workflows complete** -- cancellation_type (immediate + at_expiry + customer_requested + insurer_requested) + cancellation_reason categorized + effective_date validated + refund_amount calculation prorate (Sprint 11 PayoutService Sprint 19 reuse instant payout < 10k MAD foundation) + state machine transition active -> cancelled + Sprint 9 customer + broker notifications + Sprint 35 ACAPS reporting integration, (4) **Reinstatements lapsed policies recovery** -- grace period 30 jours apres expiration OR payment failure + reinstatement workflow (customer payment outstanding amount + reactivation acceptance + Sprint 34 insurer API reinstate call + Sprint 10 document confirmation + state transition cancelled/expired -> active) + reinstatement_payment Sprint 11 + Sprint 9 customer welcome back notifications, (5) **Activation 5 connecteurs compagnies restants** -- replication pattern Sprint 40 AssurMaghreb -> Atlas Insurance + MediAssur + Maghreb Mutuelle + Royale Assurance + Continental Insurance + chaque connecteur 4 methods (createPolicy + cancelPolicy + getPolicyStatus + listPoliciesByCustomer) + Sprint 35 circuit breaker patterns + Sprint 14 events + Sprint 9 broker_admin alerts + integration tests E2E per connecteur, (6) **Insurer comparison foundation** -- service compareInsurersForRenewal (query 6 insurers Sprint 34 stubs + premium quotes pour same coverages + delta calculation + recommendations broker) + foundation Sprint 45 comparaison multi-compagnies T8 complete + cross-tenant patterns Sprint 14 framework foundation, (7) **Sprint 28 admin-portal extensions lifecycle dashboards** -- 4 nouveaux tabs (renewals pipeline + endorsements history + cancellations analytics + reinstatements recovery + insurer comparison reports) + KPIs dashboards (renewal_rate + churn rate + endorsement_revenue + cancellation_reasons analytics + reinstatement_success_rate) + Sprint 13 MV integration, et (8) **Sprint 13 analytics MV lifecycle** -- 4 nouveaux MV (renewal_metrics_mv + endorsement_revenue_mv + cancellation_reasons_mv + reinstatement_success_mv) refresh daily 04h00 alimentant Sprint 28 admin-portal + Sprint 36 production_metrics_mv extension insurance section.

Le sprint produit **lifecycle insurance Morocco complete operational** + **multi-compagnies fully integrated** (6 connecteurs operationnels) + **foundation Sprint 42 souscription intelligente** + **foundation Sprint 45 comparaison multi-compagnies T8** + **foundation Sprint 46 renouvellement automatique advanced**. A la sortie de ce sprint, Skalean dispose d'**entites domain Lifecycle** etendant Sprint 40 :
- **`PolicyRenewal`** (id + original_policy_id FK Sprint 40 Policy + renewed_policy_id FK nullable + renewal_type enum manual/automatic + status enum scheduled/in_progress/completed/cancelled/refused + scheduled_at + completed_at nullable + premium_previous NUMERIC + premium_new NUMERIC + premium_delta NUMERIC computed + customer_response enum pending/accepted/refused/no_response + customer_response_at nullable + audit_trail) indexes (original_policy_id + status partial + scheduled_at)
- **`PolicyEndorsement`** (id + policy_id FK + endorsement_type enum coverage_addition/coverage_removal/sum_insured_change/deductible_change/beneficiary_change/address_change/vehicle_change/payment_frequency_change + previous_state JSONB snapshot + new_state JSONB snapshot + premium_delta NUMERIC + amendment_document_id Sprint 10 FK + payment_id Sprint 11 FK nullable + status enum draft/pending_signature/pending_payment/active/cancelled + effective_date + audit_trail) indexes (policy_id + endorsement_type + effective_date)
- **`PolicyCancellation`** (id + policy_id FK + cancellation_type enum immediate/at_expiry + requested_by enum customer/broker/insurer + cancellation_reason VARCHAR categorized + cancellation_reason_details TEXT + effective_date + refund_amount NUMERIC computed prorate + refund_payment_id Sprint 11 FK nullable + acaps_reference Sprint 35 + status enum pending/confirmed/refund_pending/completed + audit_trail) indexes (policy_id + requested_by + cancellation_reason)
- **`PolicyReinstatement`** (id + lapsed_policy_id FK + reinstated_at + outstanding_amount NUMERIC + reinstatement_payment_id Sprint 11 FK + reinstatement_reason TEXT + insurer_confirmation Sprint 34 + status enum pending/payment_received/insurer_confirmed/reinstated + audit_trail) indexes (lapsed_policy_id + reinstated_at)

Un **package `@insurtech/insurance-lifecycle`** v1.0.0 NestJS module + **5 services principaux** :

**PolicyRenewalService** :
- `scheduleRenewal(policy_id, renewal_type)` create PolicyRenewal scheduled J-30 + Sprint 9 customer notification + transition policy active -> renewal_pending
- `executeManualRenewal(renewal_id, customer_response)` if accepted -> create new Policy linked original + Sprint 34 insurer renew API + Sprint 11 recurring transition + transition renewal_pending -> renewed -> active new policy
- `executeAutomaticRenewal(renewal_id)` automated execution if no opt-out received + Sprint 14 events RenewalExecuted
- `refuseRenewal(renewal_id, reason)` customer or insurer refusal + transition renewal_pending -> expired

## CONTEXTE STRATEGIQUE -- POURQUOI LE SPRINT EST CRITIQUE

Sprint 41 est **lifecycle insurance complete operational** + **multi-compagnies 6/6 integrated** + **commercial depth value-add courtiers significatif** + **foundation Sprint 42 souscription intelligente**. Quatre dimensions strategiques majeures.

Premierement, **lifecycle insurance complete = product market fit courtiers**. Courtiers Morocco gerent quotidiennement renewals + endorsements + cancellations + reinstatements. Sprint 40 foundation seulement (subscription + active states) insuffisant pour value proposition compelling. Sprint 41 lifecycle complete = product market fit demonstrable.

Deuxiemement, **multi-compagnies 6/6 fully integrated = differentiation strategique Morocco market**. Courtiers Morocco travaillent multiples insurers simultaneous. Sprint 41 active 5 connecteurs restants -> 6/6 total operationnel = compelling differentiation vs competitors single-insurer platforms + foundation Sprint 45 comparaison multi-compagnies T8 strategique commercial.

Troisiemement, **commercial momentum post-Demo Day capitalization Sprint 37**. Demo Day Marrakech execute + commercial launch foundation + early adopters 10 garages + skalean.com/fr push. Sprint 41 lifecycle complete + multi-compagnies = compelling pitch courtiers Marrakech early adopters program insurance vertical complementing garage vertical.

Quatriemement, **foundation Sprints 42-50 progression Phase 10**. Sprint 41 establishes patterns reusables Sprints 42+ : endorsements -> modification contrat Sprint 47, renewals -> automatique Sprint 46, comparison -> Sprint 45, lifecycle -> embedded cross-sell Sprint 50. Sans Sprint 41 lifecycle complete, Sprints 42-50 manquent foundation.

## PIEGES TECHNIQUES GENERAUX

**Piege 1 : Renewal automatique without opt-in customer = compliance breach.** Auto-renewal sans consentement explicite customer = CNDP Loi 09-08 + ACAPS regulatory breach. Solution : opt-in customer Sprint 40 subscription explicit (boolean auto_renewal_enabled default false) + Sprint 9 J-30 notification with clear opt-out instructions + 14 jours window opt-out + audit comprehensive consent tracking + foundation Phase 11+ regulatory compliance audit.

**Piege 2 : Endorsement previous_state JSONB snapshot incompleteness.** Snapshot incomplet = audit trail broken + customer disputes impossible resolve. Solution : snapshot comprehensive entire Policy + Coverages + Beneficiaries + Premiums entities state at endorsement time + JSONB schema Zod strict + Sprint 7 audit complementary + retention permanente.

**Piege 3 : Cancellation refund prorate calculation errors.** Refund calculation wrong = customer disputes + regulatory complaints + financial loss. Solution : prorate calculation rule documented strict (premium * (days_remaining / total_days)) + edge cases tests comprehensive (mid-month + leap year + frequency variations) + Sprint 11 PayoutService Sprint 19 reuse instant < 10k MAD + audit trail comprehensive + manual override broker_admin workflow exceptions.

**Piege 4 : Reinstatement grace period race conditions.** Concurrent reinstatement requests + payment timing = inconsistent state. Solution : PostgreSQL SELECT FOR UPDATE + transaction isolation + Sprint 15 idempotency strict + grace period strict 30 jours measured from expiry_date (not cancellation_date) + Sprint 9 notifications timing accurate + reinstatement window closed atomic.

**Piege 5 : 5 connecteurs activation pattern Sprint 40 quality regression.** Replication pattern conduit a copy-paste sans adaptation per insurer specific = bugs + maintenance hard. Solution : pattern documentation Sprint 40 strict + 5 connecteurs review + tests integration per connecteur + Sprint 35 circuit breaker per connecteur + monitoring per connecteur Sprint 36 + foundation Phase 11+ refactoring abstraction commune.

**Piege 6 : Insurer comparison concurrent API calls overwhelming stubs.** compareInsurersForRenewal triggers 6 insurer API calls concurrent = stubs overwhelmed + timeouts. Solution : Sprint 35 circuit breakers per connecteur + Promise.allSettled handle partial failures + caching strategy 24h previous comparisons + rate limiting compareInsurers method + foundation Phase 11+ real APIs production capacity planning.

**Piege 7 : State machine extensions Sprint 40 inconsistent.** Lifecycle extensions add transitions but Sprint 40 state machine breaks if not careful. Solution : extend Sprint 40 state machine strict (add transitions only never remove) + tests scenarios comprehensive lifecycle full + Sprint 14 events backward compatible + foundation Phase 11+ state machine versioning.

**Piege 8 : Sprint 13 4 MV refresh performance.** 4 nouveaux MV + Sprint 40 2 MV = 6 MV refresh daily 04h00 = potentielle performance issue. Solution : MV creation order optimized + refresh CONCURRENTLY where supported + monitoring refresh duration Sprint 36 + foundation Phase 11+ incremental refresh patterns ClickHouse.

**Piege 9 : Sprint 28 5 nouveaux tabs UX overwhelming.** 5 nouveaux tabs ajoute a 4 Sprint 40 = 9 tabs insurance section admin-portal = navigation overwhelming. Solution : Sprint 28 admin-portal reorganization avec submenu insurance > lifecycle (renewals + endorsements + cancellations + reinstatements + comparison) + breadcrumbs + tests UX user feedback + foundation Phase 11+ navigation redesign comprehensive.

**Piege 10 : Endorsement payment timing premium adjustment.** Endorsement signed but payment delayed = ambiguous state policy. Solution : workflow strict (signature -> payment -> apply) + state pending_payment intermediate + timeout 7 jours auto-cancel endorsement if no payment + Sprint 9 customer reminders + Sprint 11 retry payment attempts + manual broker_admin intervention workflow.

---

## OBJECTIF GLOBAL DU SPRINT

Implementer le **framework Souscription Intelligente comprehensive** -- couche AI-driven rule-based foundation strategique etendant Sprint 40 QuoteService + Sprint 41 lifecycle vers underwriting intelligent + risk scoring composite + pre-fill data automatique + quote optimization recommendations + conversion optimization drop-off recovery + Sprint 33 garage AI patterns reuse adapted insurance customer retention. 14 events QuoteAutoApproved + Sprint 9 customer confirmation instant + Sprint 40 SubscriptionService trigger automatic; score 30-70 = standard processing Sprint 40 workflow nominal; score 70-100 = manual_review escalation broker_admin + Sprint 9 broker notification urgent + dashboard Sprint 28 review queue + 24h SLA review; score > 100 = declined automatic + Sprint 9 customer decline notification + reasons categorized + appeal workflow foundation), (2) **Risk Scoring composite engine** -- multi-factor scoring (driver_profile_score : age + driving_experience + licence_validity Sprint 34 + bonus_malus + previous_claims + cnie_verification_status; vehicle_score : age + category sedan/suv/4x4 + market_value + theft_risk_category + safety_features; claims_history_score : 5 ans Casablanca vs Rabat density + theft_rates + accidents_rates + Sprint 34 CNIE address verification) + composite_score weighted (driver 30% + vehicle 25% + claims 25% + bonus_malus 15% + geographic 5%) + risk_factors JSONB explanability comprehensive + Sprint 13 risk_scoring_metrics_mv analytics, (3) **Pre-fill intelligent** -- automated data pre-population reducing customer friction (CNIE Sprint 34 verification stub returns first_name + last_name + date_of_birth + address + nationality; previous_policies Sprint 40 query customer history + same insurer transfer data + cross-insurer aggregation; vehicle_data Sprint 34 NARSA stub returns make + model + year + chassis_number; telematics foundation Sprint 49 future preparation) + completion_percentage tracking + Sprint 27 PII masking strict + customer consent CNDP, (4) **Quote optimization AI recommendations** -- intelligent suggestions during quote generation (coverage_recommendations based driver profile + vehicle category + market_value + Morocco regulatory minimums; bundle_pricing multi-policy discount calculations + family_bundle + multi-vehicle_bundle; cross-sell suggestions related products foundation Sprint 50 health + home + life teasers; competitive_positioning vs Sprint 41 InsurerComparisonService 6 connecteurs rankings) + Sprint 14 events QuoteOptimizationGenerated + customer acceptance tracking + Sprint 13 conversion_uplift_mv, (5) **Conversion optimization drop-off recovery** -- funnel tracking (entered_quote -> coverage_selection -> beneficiary_capture -> signature_review -> payment_setup -> activated) + Sprint 14 events per stage + automated drop-off detection (24h inactive at stage) + recovery workflows Sprint 9 personalized email + WhatsApp + retargeting + abandoned cart pattern e-commerce adapted insurance + customer winback campaigns 7/14/30 jours, (6) **Nurture campaigns Sprint 9 sequences** -- multi-touch nurture sequences (new_customer_welcome 7 jours + renewal_anticipation 30 jours pre-expiry + claims_followup post-incident + loyalty_milestone anniversary + cross_sell_education quarterly + winback_recent_cancellation 30 jours) + Sprint 9 channels models, et (8) **Sprint 28 admin-portal extensions smart underwriting** -- 5 nouveaux tabs (underwriting_review_queue manual reviews pending + risk_scoring_dashboard scoring trends + conversion_funnel_analytics drop-off insights + nurture_campaigns_performance sequence analytics + churn_predictions_insurance customer retention).

A la sortie de ce sprint, Skalean dispose d'**entites domain Smart Underwriting** :
- **`UnderwritingDecision`** (id + quote_id FK Sprint 40 + tenant_id + auto_approval BOOLEAN + risk_score NUMERIC computed + decision enum approved/declined/manual_review/escalated + decision_rationale TEXT + manual_reviewer_user_id FK nullable + reviewed_at nullable + appeal_status enum none/requested/under_review/upheld/overturned nullable + decision_factors JSONB explanability + audit_trail) UNIQUE (quote_id) + indexes (decision partial + tenant_id + reviewed_at)
- **`RiskScore`** (id + customer_id FK + tenant_id + scoring_date + driver_profile_score NUMERIC(5,2) + vehicle_score NUMERIC(5,2) + claims_history_score NUMERIC(5,2) + bonus_malus_score NUMERIC(5,2) + geographic_score NUMERIC(5,2) + composite_score NUMERIC(5,2) computed weighted + risk_factors JSONB Zod schema strict + scoring_version VARCHAR (versioning algorithms) + valid_until + audit_trail) indexes (customer_id + scoring_date desc + composite_score + tenant_id)
- **`PreFillSession`** (id + customer_id FK + tenant_id + quote_id FK nullable + pre_fill_sources JSONB ({cnie: {requested: true, fulfilled: true, data_pulled: [...]}, previous_policies: {...}, narsa: {...}}) + completion_percentage NUMERIC(5,2) + consent_cnde BOOLEAN + consent_timestamp + masked_fields JSONB Sprint 27 + expired_at TIMESTAMP + audit_trail)
- **`QuoteOptimization`** (id + quote_id FK + tenant_id + recommendations JSONB ({coverage_suggestions: [...], bundles_offered: [...], cross_sell: [...], competitive_positioning: [...]}) + accepted_recommendations JSONB + uplift_amount NUMERIC computed + recommendation_acceptance_rate NUMERIC + audit_trail)
- **`ConversionFunnelEvent`** (id + quote_id FK + customer_id FK + tenant_id + funnel_stage enum entered_quote/coverage_selection/beneficiary_capture/signature_review/payment_setup/activated + event_type enum entered/progressed/abandoned/recovered/converted + event_timestamp + time_in_stage_seconds INTEGER + recovery_attempt_count INTEGER default 0 + recovery_method nullable enum email/whatsapp/sms/manual_broker + audit_trail) indexes (quote_id + funnel_stage + event_type + tenant_id)
- **`NurtureCampaign`** (id + customer_id FK + tenant_id + campaign_type enum new_customer_welcome/renewal_anticipation/claims_followup/loyalty_milestone/cross_sell_education/winback_recent_cancellation + status enum scheduled/in_progress/completed/cancelled/opted_out + scheduled_start_date + completed_at nullable + Sprint 9 notification_ids JSONB array + opt_out_at nullable + conversion_outcome enum no_response/engaged/converted/cancelled_subscription nullable + audit_trail) indexes (customer_id + campaign_type + status partial + tenant_id)

Un **package `@insurtech/insurance-smart-underwriting`** v1.0.0 NestJS module + **6 services principaux** :

**UnderwritingService** :
- `processQuoteForUnderwriting(quote_id)` orchestrate :
  1. RiskScoringService.calculateCompositeScore(customer_id)
  2. Apply thresholds (< 30 auto-approve + 30-70 standard + 70-100 manual_review + > 100 declined)
  3. Create UnderwritingDecision
  4. Sprint 14 event UnderwritingDecisionMade
  5. If auto-approved : trigger Sprint 40 SubscriptionService automatic
  6. If manual_review : Sprint 9 broker_admin notification + Sprint 28 review queue
  7. If declined : Sprint 9 customer notification + appeal workflow
- `manualReview(decision_id, reviewer_user_id, decision, rationale)` review workflow + audit comprehensive
- `appealDecision(decision_id, customer_appeal_data)` appeal foundation
- 24h SLA manual reviews + Sprint 9 escalation if SLA breached
- Sprint 35 ACAPS audit integration

**RiskScoringService** :
- `calculateCompositeScore(customer_id)` multi-factor composite :
  ```typescript
  async calculateCompositeScore(customerId: string): Promise<RiskScore> {
    const customer = await this.customerRepo.findOne(customerId);
    const previousClaims = await this.claimsRepo.find({ customer_id: customerId, 
      claim_date: MoreThan(subYears(new Date(), 5)) });
    
    const driverProfileScore = this.scoreDriverProfile(customer);
    const vehicleScore = this.scoreVehicle(customer.vehicles[0]);
    const claimsHistoryScore = this.scoreClaims(previousClaims);
    const bonusMalusScore = this.scoreBonusMalus(customer.bonus_malus_history);
    const geographicScore = this.scoreGeographic(customer.address);
    
    const compositeScore = 
      driverProfileScore * 0.30 +
      vehicleScore * 0.25 +
      claimsHistoryScore * 0.25 +
      bonusMalusScore * 0.15 +
      geographicScore * 0.05;
    
    const riskFactors = this.identifyRiskFactors({
      driverProfileScore, vehicleScore, claimsHistoryScore,
      bonusMalusScore, geographicScore
    });
    
    return this.riskScoreRepo.save({
      customer_id: customerId,
      scoring_date: new Date(),
      driver_profile_score: driverProfileScore,
      vehicle_score: vehicleScore,
      claims_history_score: claimsHistoryScore,
      bonus_malus_score: bonusMalusScore,
      geographic_score: geographicScore,
      composite_score: compositeScore,
      risk_factors: riskFactors,
      scoring_version: 'v1.0.0-foundation',
      valid_until: addDays(new Date(), 90)
    });
  }
  ```
- Rules externalisees JSONB configurable + version tracked
- Foundation Phase 11+ AI advanced Anthropic

Le sprint constitue **commercial conversion uplift significatif** (auto-approval immediate + recommendations + drop-off recovery) + **broker productivity multiplier** (50%+ reduction manual processing) + **customer experience enhancement compelling** + **foundation Phase 11+ Anthropic AI partnership** advanced ML models + **commercial differentiation strategique vs competitors basic platforms**.

## CONTEXTE STRATEGIQUE -- POURQUOI LE SPRINT EST CRITIQUE

Sprint 42 est **commercial conversion uplift significatif** + **broker productivity multiplier 50%+** + **customer experience enhancement compelling** + **foundation Phase 11+ Anthropic AI partnership**. Cinq dimensions strategiques majeures.

Premierement, **commercial conversion uplift quantitatif**. Sprints 40-41 foundation Policy lifecycle complete mais conversion quotes -> subscriptions limited par manual processing + customer friction. Sprint 42 auto-approval (50% quotes immediate) + pre-fill (reduce form completion time 70%) + drop-off recovery (recapture 20%+ abandoned quotes) + nurture campaigns (re-engage cold leads) = conversion uplift demonstrable + commercial impact direct revenue Phase 10+.

Deuxiemement, **broker productivity multiplier 50%+ manual processing reduction**. Brokers Morocco currently process every quote manually (review + validate + approve + activate). Sprint 42 auto-approval threshold-based = 50%+ quotes processed automatic without broker intervention = broker time freed sales + customer relationships + complex cases attention quality. Compelling B2B SaaS value proposition.

Troisiemement, **customer experience enhancement compelling differentiation**. Customers Morocco accustomed legacy insurance processes (paper-heavy + slow + opaque). Sprint 42 pre-fill (CNIE + NARSA + previous policies auto-populated) + auto-approval (immediate confirmation) + intelligent recommendations (coverage + bundles + cross-sell) = customer experience step-change vs competitors basic forms platforms.

Quatriemement, **foundation Phase 11+ Anthropic AI partnership advanced**. Sprint 42 rule-based foundation establishes infrastructure data + workflows + Sprint 13 analytics + customer signals. Phase 11+ Anthropic AI partnership replaces rule-based with advanced ML models (Claude API + custom models + feature store + real-time inference + cross-tenant patterns). Sprint 42 = essential preparation Phase 11+ AI transformation.

Cinquiemement, **commercial differentiation strategique vs competitors basic platforms**. Morocco insurance brokers tooling fragmented + manual + dated. Sprint 42 smart underwriting + AI recommendations + conversion optimization = compelling differentiation winning enterprise broker customers + commercial scaling Phase 11+ Morocco market + cross-country expansion foundation.

## PIEGES TECHNIQUES GENERAUX

**Piege 1 : Risk scoring algorithms bias unfair discrimination.** Composite scoring weighted factors may produce biased outcomes discriminating young drivers + specific neighborhoods + minority groups = regulatory complaints CNDP + brand damage + ACAPS sanctions. Solution : algorithms transparent explanability JSONB risk_factors comprehensive + audit comprehensive + ACAPS Sprint 35 reporting + bias testing comprehensive + bias monitoring Sprint 36 dashboards + foundation Phase 11+ fairness ML practices.

**Piege 2 : Auto-approval thresholds too aggressive financial loss.** Aggressive auto-approval thresholds (< 30 score) may approve risky customers = increased claims + financial losses + insurer relationships damaged. Solution : conservative initial thresholds + monitoring claims_ratio per decision_type + tunable thresholds Sprint 36 production gradual optimization + manual review queue safety net + foundation Phase 11+ AI optimization.

**Piege 3 : Pre-fill data quality stub Sprint 34 unrealistic.** Sprint 34 CNIE + NARSA stubs return perfect data = production failure when stubs replaced real APIs Phase 11+ partial data + errors + verification failures. Solution : Sprint 34 stubs simulate realistic failures (10% incomplete + 5% errors + variable latency) + Sprint 42 graceful degradation + manual override workflow broker_admin + foundation Phase 11+ real APIs error handling comprehensive.

**Piege 4 : Conversion funnel events double-counting drop-off detection.** Multiple events same stage same quote = drop-off detection false positives. Solution : event deduplication idempotency Sprint 15 + funnel_stage transitions strict (no skipping) + Sprint 14 events idempotent + worker detection logic robust + tests scenarios comprehensive funnel edge cases.

**Piege 5 : Nurture campaigns opt-out compliance CNDP breach.** Nurture sequences continue after opt-out = CNDP Loi 09-08 sanctions + regulatory complaints + customer trust damage. Solution : opt-out propagation immediate all channels + Sprint 9 verification opt-out before send + audit comprehensive consent tracking + foundation Phase 11+ preference center customer self-management + bi-annual compliance audit.

**Piege 6 : Recommendation engine cross-sell premature inappropriate.** Cross-sell suggestions Sprint 50 foundation but premature recommendations during initial quote = customer overwhelm + decline original product. Solution : cross-sell suggestions gated after initial product activated (Phase 2 customer lifecycle) + foundation Sprint 50 dedicated cross-sell timing + customer behavior signals readiness + tests A/B foundation Phase 11+.

**Piege 7 : Risk score caching stale 90 days inaccurate.** Risk scores cached 90 days valid_until may become inaccurate customer life changes (new claims + address change + new vehicle). Solution : event-driven invalidation Sprint 14 (customer.address.changed + customer.claim.filed + customer.vehicle.changed trigger re-scoring) + manual refresh broker_admin workflow + valid_until reasonable foundation + foundation Phase 11+ real-time scoring AI.

**Piege 8 : Sprint 33 ChurnPredictionService insurance customers data model mismatch.** Sprint 33 garage customers churn signals (payment frequency + service usage) different insurance customers signals (policy renewals + claims history + premium increases). Solution : adaptation Sprint 33 architecture mirror but signals insurance-specific + tests comprehensive + foundation Phase 11+ refactoring shared churn framework cross-vertical.

**Piege 9 : Manual review SLA 24h breach broker workload.** Manual review queue grows fast + brokers overwhelmed = SLA breaches + Sprint 9 escalations spam = degraded service. Solution : workload monitoring Sprint 28 dashboards + assignment algorithms round-robin + escalation broker_admin if reviewer SLA breached + auto-approval threshold tuning reduce manual queue + foundation Phase 11+ AI-assisted manual review.

**Piege 10 : Sprint 13 5 MV refresh performance cumulative.** Sprint 13 11 MV total insurance (Sprint 40 + 41 + 42) refresh daily 04h00-04h30 window = potential overlap + performance degradation. Solution : MV refresh staggered (Sprint 40 04h00 + Sprint 41 04h15 + Sprint 42 04h30) + monitoring Sprint 36 refresh durations + foundation Phase 11+ incremental refresh ClickHouse Materialized Views Replicated patterns.

- `DROP_OFF_DETECTION_CRON=0 * * * *` (hourly)
- `RECOVERY_CAMPAIGNS_CRON=0 14 * * *` (daily 14h00 MA)
- `NURTURE_CAMPAIGNS_CRON=30 10 * * *` (daily 10h30 MA)
- `NURTURE_CAMPAIGN_TYPES=new_customer_welcome,renewal_anticipation,claims_followup,loyalty_milestone,cross_sell_education,winback_recent_cancellation`
- `WINBACK_GRACE_PERIOD_DAYS=30`
- `CHURN_PREDICTION_PREMIUM_INCREASE_THRESHOLD_PERCENT=10`
- `CHURN_PREDICTION_PAYMENT_FAILURES_THRESHOLD=2`
- `CHURN_PREDICTION_ENGAGEMENT_DECLINE_DAYS=60`

Pre-requis Sprint 42 : Sprint 1-37 + Sprint 40 + Sprint 41 complete + Phase 1-9 + Phase 10 Sprints 1-2 CLOTURE.

Sprint 42 **smart underwriting comprehensive + foundation Phase 11+ AI partnership**.

**PHASE 10 SPRINT 3 -- INSURANCE SOUSCRIPTION INTELLIGENTE COMPLETE.**

## CONTEXTE STRATEGIQUE -- POURQUOI LE SPRINT EST CRITIQUE

Sprint 43 est **commercial conversion uplift quantitatif majeur** + **customer experience step-change vs Morocco legacy insurance** + **broker productivity enhancement** + **foundation Phase 11+ commercial scaling**. Cinq dimensions strategiques majeures.

Premierement, **commercial conversion uplift quantitatif < 30s end-to-end**. Sprints 40-41 manual processing + Sprint 42 smart underwriting foundation mais customer experience still 5-15 minutes wizard. Sprint 43 < 30s end-to-end (wizard < 90s + auto-approval < 5s + signature + payment + insurer + activation < 25s) = 5x faster vs current = compelling commercial conversion uplift demonstrable + commercial differentiation strategic Morocco market.

Deuxiemement, **mobile-first PWA 70%+ Morocco traffic mobile**. Morocco mobile traffic dominant insurance research + comparison (Google Trends Morocco 2026 data). Sprint 43 mobile-first PWA + touch-optimized + offline-first + sharing native mobile = capture mobile traffic dominant + customer acquisition cost reduction + viral coefficient sharing.

Troisiemement, **broker productivity enhancement focus complex cases**. Sprints 40-42 automated 50%+ quotes but brokers still handle wizard processing. Sprint 43 auto-pre-fill (broker initiates + customer fills < 90s) + auto-approval = brokers freed wizard processing 100% + focus complex cases (high-risk + manual_review + B2B fleet Sprint 48 + cross-sell Sprint 50) + relationship building + commercial selling.

Quatriemement, **foundation Phase 11+ Anthropic AI commercial scaling**. Sprint 43 establishes UX infrastructure + analytics + A/B testing + offline + viral. Phase 11+ Anthropic AI partnership adds personalization (ML recommendations per customer behavior) + voice input (natural language quote generation) + biometric (WebAuthn production) + collaborative (real-time broker-customer co-creation). Sprint 43 = essential preparation Phase 11+ AI transformation.

Cinquiemement, **commercial differentiation strategique vs Morocco competitors**. Morocco insurance market dominated legacy players + brokers tooling fragmented + customer experience poor (paperwork + multi-day + opaque). Sprint 43 Quote Express compelling differentiation vs all competitors = winning enterprise broker customers + commercial scaling Morocco market + cross-country expansion foundation (Tunisia + Algeria + Egypt Phase 11+ MENA roadmap).

### Decision-042 -- Insurance Quote Express + < 30s + PWA Mobile-First

**Justification** :
- (a) Commercial conversion uplift quantitatif < 30s end-to-end (5x faster)
- (b) Mobile-first PWA capture Morocco 70%+ mobile traffic
- (c) Broker productivity enhancement focus complex cases
- (d) Foundation Phase 11+ commercial scaling (AI + voice + biometric + collaborative)
- (e) Commercial differentiation strategique vs Morocco competitors

**Architecture** :
- 5 entites + RLS + indexes performance
- 5 services + 1 worker
- Customer-portal Sprint 18 PWA extension
- Sprint 42 integration ultra-rapid + auto-approval < 30s
- Sprint 28/13/9 integration extensive
- Foundation Phase 11+

## PIEGES TECHNIQUES GENERAUX

**Piege 1 : Sub-30s SLA achievable production-realistic.** Promise < 30s end-to-end aspiratif mais production realistic accounts variable latency network + Stripe + insurer APIs + signature processing. Solution : monitoring Sprint 36 latency p95 + alerts on degradation + graceful degradation strategies + customer communication clear (estimated time displayed + actual time tracked + fallback workflow if exceeds 60s) + Sprint 36 production benchmarks gradual optimization + foundation Phase 11+ edge computing acceleration.

**Piege 2 : Wizard state management complex multi-step navigation.** Multi-step navigation back/forward + save_draft + resume_later creates complex state management + bugs + customer frustration. Solution : wizard state machine strict + Sprint 14 events per transition + IndexedDB local + PostgreSQL durable + reconciliation strategies + tests scenarios comprehensive navigation flows + Sprint 9 customer notifications resume_later guidance.

**Piege 3 : Pre-fill data outdated customer override workflow.** Sprint 42 pre-fill returns stale data (address changed + new vehicle + recent claims not in stub) = customer confusion + incorrect quote. Solution : customer override workflow per field + visual indicator pre-filled vs customer-edited + Sprint 14 events tracking overrides + audit comprehensive + foundation Phase 11+ real-time data sources verification.

**Piege 4 : Sharing token security exposed quote details.** share_token UUID exposed quote_id details + customer PII = privacy breach CNDP. Solution : share_token UUID secure cryptographic random + share access requires customer authentication OR limited preview only (premium amount + product type + no PII) + expiry 72h default + revocation immediate possible + audit comprehensive accesses + Sprint 27 PII masking strict displayed.

**Piege 5 : PWA service worker conflicts existing customer-portal.** Sprint 18 customer-portal existing service worker + Sprint 43 PWA extension service worker = conflicts + bugs + offline broken. Solution : service worker unified single + Sprint 43 extension routes addition + tests comprehensive Sprint 18 existing functionality preserved + caching strategies coordinated + foundation Phase 11+ service worker refactoring strategy.

**Piege 6 : A/B testing variants performance fairness.** Variants traffic_percentage allocation customers may bias outcomes + statistical significance challenges small N. Solution : sticky assignment per customer (same customer always same variant) + traffic_percentage strict respected + sample size requirements documented minimum N + statistical significance foundation Sprint 13 + foundation Phase 11+ advanced ML experimentation Bayesian methods.

**Piege 7 : Offline sync conflicts last_write_wins data loss.** Customer edits offline + concurrent broker edits online = sync conflict + last_write_wins data loss. Solution : conflict_resolution_data JSONB tracks both versions + Sprint 9 customer + broker notifications on conflicts + manual broker_admin override workflow + audit comprehensive + foundation Phase 11+ CRDT collaborative editing patterns.

**Piege 8 : IndexedDB encryption draft_data sensitive.** draft_data JSONB contains customer PII (CNIE + addresses + vehicle data + driver profile) = privacy risk if device compromised. Solution : IndexedDB encryption AES-256 + key derivation customer-specific + Sprint 27 PII masking strict + expiry IndexedDB 72h auto-clear + sync to encrypted PostgreSQL backend + Sprint 35 security hardening review + foundation Phase 11+ enclave + WebCrypto API advanced.

**Piege 9 : Mobile virtual keyboard UX field type misconfiguration.** Wrong virtual keyboard type per field (numeric keyboard for text + email for date) = customer frustration + abandonment. Solution : input type strict per field (type="tel" for phone + type="email" + type="date" + inputmode="numeric" for chassis) + tests devices Android + iOS comprehensive + foundation Phase 11+ accessibility advanced features.

**Piege 10 : Wizard abandon detection 24h threshold customer fatigue.** Wizard abandon detection cron threshold 24h may be too aggressive + customer not yet decided OR too lenient + lost recovery opportunity. Solution : threshold tunable env-configurable + monitoring Sprint 36 abandon rates + Sprint 42 ConversionOptimization recovery workflows + Sprint 9 customer notification optimized timing (J+1 + J+3 + J+7 escalation) + foundation Phase 11+ AI abandonment prediction + Sprint 13 abandon analytics granular.

---

**Version** : v3.0 (Phase 10 Sprint 5 -- Insurance Broker Vertical)

## OBJECTIF GLOBAL DU SPRINT

Implementer le **framework Portage Portefeuille T7 comprehensive** -- couche regulatory critique ACAPS Programme Emergence + cross-broker transfers + Sprint 14 cross-tenant patterns reuse + commission reconciliation + portfolio analytics + commercial differentiation strategique Morocco market. Le sprint construit **8 categories portage T7** : (1) **PortfolioTransfer workflows comprehensive** -- transfert portefeuille customer broker_A vers broker_B (T7 ACAPS Form regulatory mandatory Morocco insurance brokers cessation activity + acquisition portefeuille + retirement broker) avec workflow saga complete (initiation broker_A OR broker_B selon scenario + verification customer consent CNDP obligatoire + ACAPS notification mandatory pre-transfer + Sprint 34 insurers notifications policies migration + Sprint 14 cross-tenant data migration policies + commissions reconciliation broker_A carryover + broker_B new + audit comprehensive Sprint 7 + Sprint 35 ACAPS reporting post-transfer + transfer_status enum draft/consent_pending/acaps_notified/insurers_notified/in_progress/commissions_pending/completed/cancelled) + idempotency Sprint 15 strict + compensations per-step failure rollback, (2) **TransferConsent CNDP customer workflow** -- consent collection mandatory CNDP Loi 09-08 strict + consent_methods email/whatsapp/in_person + consent_token UUID cryptographic + consent_expires_at 7 jours + consent_evidence JSONB comprehensive (timestamp + IP + device + acknowledgments + signature digital optional Sprint 10) + Sprint 9 customer notification automated + escalation if not received within 5 jours + ACAPS audit comprehensive + foundation Phase 11+ CNDP advanced consent management platform, (3) **Sprint 14 cross-tenant framework extension portage** -- Sprint 14 cross-tenant patterns reuse (existing framework from Sprint 25-26 Sprint 14 events cross-tenant + Sprint 6 RLS multi-tenant) + extension Sprint 44 portage-specific (data migration policies + customers + audit_trails + Sprint 27 PII handling cross-tenant + Sprint 35 audit comprehensive cross-tenant access) + tenant_id transitions atomic transactions PostgreSQL SELECT FOR UPDATE strict + rollback patterns + foundation Phase 11+ cross-tenant federation advanced, (4) **Commission reconciliation broker_A carryover + broker_B new** -- commissions tracking comprehensive (broker_A historical commissions earned + broker_B new commissions earning + reconciliation logic strict per ACAPS regulatory + Sprint 11 PayoutService Sprint 19 reuse instant payout < 10k MAD + standard 5 jours otherwise + tax considerations Morocco foundation + audit comprehensive + foundation Phase 11+ advanced commission models complex + tiered + performance-based), (5) **BrokerPortfolioAnalytics snapshots + insights** -- portfolio composition tracking historical (total_policies + total_premium + customer_count + portfolio_composition JSONB par product_type/insurer/region + monthly_revenue_estimate + churn_predictions Sprint 42 reuse + insights broker valuation foundation Phase 11+) + snapshots daily refresh Sprint 13 broker_portfolio_metrics_mv + Sprint 28 admin-portal valuation dashboards + foundation Phase 11+ M&A broker portfolio valuation services, (6) **Sprint 35 ACAPS reporting portage T7 compliance** -- T7 Form ACAPS regulatory pre-transfer notification mandatory + ComplianceAuditService Sprint 35 integration portage + acaps_reference systematic per PortfolioTransfer + Sprint 28 admin-portal compliance section + foundation Phase 11+ ACAPS automated submissions post-licensing + retention permanente, (7) **Sprint 28 admin-portal extensions** **3 nouveaux tabs portage** -- portfolio_dashboard broker portfolio overview + valuation + composition + analytics + transfers_pipeline transfers in_progress + completed + history + audit + portability_compliance ACAPS reporting + T7 forms + retention archives + Sprint 13 4 MV integration, et (8) **Sprint 13 analytics MV portage T7** -- broker_portfolio_metrics_mv + portfolio_transfers_mv + commission_reconciliation_mv + portability_compliance_mv refresh daily 05h00 (apres Sprint 43 04h45) + Sprint 28
