Le sprint produit **regulatory compliance ACAPS Programme Emergence comprehensive** + **commercial differentiation strategique Morocco** (T7 portage unique value proposition vs competitors) + **broker valuation foundation M&A market** + **foundation Phase 11+ advanced portfolio management** + **Sprint 45 Comparaison Multi-Compagnies T8 readiness**. Le sprint introduit **decision-043 ratification** Insurance Portfolio Portability T7 + cross-broker transfers + Sprint 14 cross-tenant patterns extension + commission reconciliation + portfolio analytics + ACAPS compliance comprehensive.

A la sortie de ce sprint, Skalean dispose d'**entites domain Portage T7** :
- **`PortfolioTransfer`** (id + source_broker_tenant_id UUID NOT NULL + target_broker_tenant_id UUID NOT NULL + customer_id UUID NOT NULL + initiated_by enum source_broker/target_broker/customer/acaps_directed + transfer_status enum draft/consent_pending/acaps_notified/insurers_notified/in_progress/commissions_pending/completed/cancelled + initiated_at + completed_at nullable + acaps_reference VARCHAR Sprint 35 + acaps_notification_date + transfer_reason enum cessation_activity/acquisition_portefeuille/retirement_broker/customer_request/other + transfer_reason_details TEXT + audit_trail JSONB comprehensive) UNIQUE (acaps_reference) + indexes (source_broker_tenant_id + target_broker_tenant_id + transfer_status partial + initiated_at)
- **`PortfolioTransferPolicy`** (id + transfer_id FK + policy_id FK Sprint 40 + tenant_id_at_transfer UUID (source) + transfer_status enum pending/migrated/failed + commission_carryover NUMERIC(10,2) + commission_new NUMERIC(10,2) + commission_reconciled BOOLEAN + audit_trail) indexes (transfer_id + policy_id)
- **`TransferConsentRequest`** (id + transfer_id FK + customer_id + tenant_id (target_broker for visibility) + consent_method enum email/whatsapp/in_person/digital_signature + consent_status enum pending/granted/refused/expired + consent_token UUID UNIQUE cryptographic + consent_expires_at + consent_evidence JSONB ({timestamp, ip, device, acknowledgments, signature_43_20_id optional}) + sent_at + responded_at nullable + audit_trail) UNIQUE (consent_token) + indexes (transfer_id + customer_id + consent_status partial)
- **`BrokerPortfolioSnapshot`** (id + tenant_id UUID NOT NULL + snapshot_date DATE + total_policies INTEGER + total_premium NUMERIC(12,2) + customer_count INTEGER + portfolio_composition JSONB ({by_product_type, by_insurer, by_region, by_age_group}) + monthly_revenue_estimate NUMERIC(10,2) + average_premium_per_policy NUMERIC(10,2) + churn_risk_high_count INTEGER (Sprint 42 reuse) + valuation_estimate NUMERIC(12,2) foundation + audit_trail) indexes (tenant_id + snapshot_date desc) - portfolio analytics historical
- **`CommissionReconciliation`** (id + transfer_id FK + broker_tenant_id UUID + commission_type enum carryover/new + amount NUMERIC(10,2) + reconciliation_status enum pending/reconciled/disputed/completed + payment_id Sprint 11 FK nullable + reconciled_at nullable + dispute_reason TEXT nullable + audit_trail) indexes (transfer_id + broker_tenant_id + reconciliation_status partial)

Un **package `@insurtech/insurance-portability`** v1.0.0 NestJS module + **5 services principaux** :

**PortfolioTransferService** :
- `initiateTransfer(source_broker_tenant_id, target_broker_tenant_id, customer_id, transfer_data)` orchestrate saga :
  1. Validate brokers active + customer policies belong source broker
  2. Create PortfolioTransfer state=draft
  3. Trigger TransferConsentService.requestConsent
  4. Sprint 14 events PortfolioTransferInitiated
  5. Sprint 9 customer notification consent request
  6. Sprint 9 broker_a + broker_b notifications
- `notifyACAPS(transfer_id)` Sprint 35 ACAPS T7 form submission foundation + acaps_reference generation + state=acaps_notified
- `notifyInsurers(transfer_id)` Sprint 34 6 connecteurs notifications policies migration concurrent Promise.allSettled + state=insurers_notified
- `executeTransfer(transfer_id)` Sprint 14 cross-tenant migration policies + customers data + audit_trails + tenant_id transitions atomic SELECT FOR UPDATE + state=in_progress
- `reconcileCommissions(transfer_id)` CommissionReconciliationService trigger + state=commissions_pending
- `completeTransfer(transfer_id)` final validation + state=completed + Sprint 14 events PortfolioTransferCompleted + Sprint 35 ACAPS post-transfer reporting
- `cancelTransfer(transfer_id, reason)` compensations rollback + state=cancelled + Sprint 9 notifications
- Idempotency Sprint 15 strict
- Saga compensations per-step failure
- Sprint 35 audit comprehensive cross-tenant access

**TransferConsentService** :
- `requestConsent(transfer_id, consent_method)` create TransferConsentRequest + consent_token UUID cryptographic + Sprint 9 dispatch customer (email + WhatsApp + in_person workflow)
- `grantConsent(consent_token, consent_evidence)` validate token + capture evidence comprehensive (timestamp + IP + device + acknowledgments + signature_43_20_id optional Sprint 10) + state=granted + audit Sprint 7
- `refuseConsent(consent_token, reason)` state=refused + Sprint 9 brokers notifications + transfer cancellation cascade
- Cron `consent-expiration-cron.worker.ts` daily 16h00 MA expire 7 jours consent_expires_at + escalation Sprint 9 broker_admin
- Sprint 9 reminder J-5 + J-3 + J-1 customers
- Sprint 35 ACAPS audit consent comprehensive
- Foundation Phase 11+ CNDP advanced consent management platform

**Sprint14CrossTenantFrameworkExtension** :
- Sprint 14 patterns reuse (cross-tenant data access framework + Sprint 6 RLS extensions)
- Methods : migratePoliciesAcrossTenants + migrateCustomerDataAcrossTenants + auditCrossTenantAccess
- PostgreSQL SELECT FOR UPDATE strict + transaction isolation REPEATABLE READ
- Rollback patterns per migration step
- Sprint 27 PII handling cross-tenant strict
- Sprint 35 audit comprehensive cross-tenant access
- Foundation Phase 11+ federation advanced

**BrokerPortfolioAnalyticsService** :
- `generateSnapshot(tenant_id, snapshot_date)` aggregate Sprint 40-41 Policies + customers data + portfolio_composition JSONB + churn_risk Sprint 42 reuse + valuation_estimate foundation
- `getPortfolioComposition(tenant_id, date_range)` aggregations by_product_type + by_insurer + by_region + by_age_group
- `getValuationEstimate(tenant_id)` valuation algorithm foundation (multiple monthly_revenue + churn_factor + portfolio_quality_score) + foundation Phase 11+ M&A advanced
- `getPortfolioInsights(tenant_id)` insights actionable (growth opportunities + retention focus + churn predictions Sprint 42 reuse)
- Worker `portfolio-snapshot-cron.worker.ts` daily 03h00 MA generate snapshots all tenants
- Sprint 13 broker_portfolio_metrics_mv

**CommissionReconciliationService** :
- `reconcileTransferCommissions(transfer_id)` calculate broker_A carryover (commissions earned on transferred policies) + broker_B new (commissions earning forward) + create CommissionReconciliation records
- `processCommissionPayment(reconciliation_id)` Sprint 11 PayoutService Sprint 19 reuse instant < 10k MAD OR standard 5 jours
- `disputeCommission(reconciliation_id, dispute_reason)` workflow + Sprint 9 broker_admin escalation
- `resolveDispute(reconciliation_id, resolution)` manual workflow + audit
- Foundation Phase 11+ advanced commission models complex

**PortabilityComplianceService** :
- `submitT7FormACAPS(transfer_id)` ACAPS T7 form data preparation + foundation Phase 11+ automated submission post-licensing partner
- `generateComplianceReport(date_range)` portage transactions report ACAPS audit + Sprint 28 admin-portal display
- `acapsReferenceGeneration()` ACAPS-PRT-{tenant_short}-{transfer_short} unique format
- Sprint 35 ComplianceAuditService integration
- Audit retention permanente

**Integration Sprint 14 cross-tenant framework** :
- Sprint 14 patterns reuse + extension Sprint 44 portage-specific
- Cross-tenant migration policies + customers + audit_trails
- tenant_id transitions atomic transactions

**Integration Sprint 28 admin-portal extensions** **3 nouveaux tabs portage** :
- `/insurance/portage/portfolio-dashboard/*` (broker portfolio overview + valuation + composition + analytics + monthly trends)
- `/insurance/portage/transfers-pipeline/*` (transfers in_progress + completed + history + audit drill-down + commission reconciliation status)
- `/insurance/portage/portability-compliance/*` (ACAPS reporting + T7 forms + retention archives + Sprint 35 compliance audit)

**Integration Sprint 13 analytics MV portage** :
- `broker_portfolio_metrics_mv` (snapshots aggregations + valuation trends + portfolio composition evolution) refresh daily 05h00 (apres Sprint 43 04h45)
- `portfolio_transfers_mv` (transfers monthly + by_reason + completion_time + success_rate) refresh daily 05h00
- `commission_reconciliation_mv` (commissions broker_A vs broker_B + dispute_rate + reconciliation_time) refresh daily 05h00
- `portability_compliance_mv` (ACAPS reporting cadence + audit_completion_rate + T7 submissions) refresh daily 05h00

**Integration Sprint 9 notifications portage** :

## CONTEXTE STRATEGIQUE -- POURQUOI LE SPRINT EST CRITIQUE

Sprint 44 est **regulatory compliance ACAPS Programme Emergence comprehensive** + **commercial differentiation strategique T7 unique** + **broker valuation foundation M&A** + **foundation Sprints 45-50 + Phase 11+ commercial scaling**. Cinq dimensions strategiques majeures.

Premierement, **regulatory compliance ACAPS Programme Emergence comprehensive**. T7 form ACAPS regulatory mandatory Morocco insurance brokers cessation activity + acquisition portefeuille + retirement broker = compliance critique pour activite legale courtiers. Sprint 44 implementation = compliance ACAPS Programme Emergence credibility renforcee + foundation Phase 11+ official audits sign-off + commercial scaling regulatory environment Morocco.

Deuxiemement, **commercial differentiation strategique T7 unique Morocco market**. Competitors Morocco insurance brokers tooling fragmente + manual processes T7 forms paperwork-heavy + ACAPS notifications manual + commissions reconciliation excel-based. Sprint 44 framework comprehensive automated = compelling differentiation strategique vs all competitors + winning enterprise broker customers + commercial scaling Morocco market + foundation cross-country expansion MENA Phase 11+ (Tunisia + Algeria + Egypt + GCC).

Troisiemement, **broker valuation foundation M&A market**. Morocco insurance broker market consolidation active (M&A acquisitions + cessations + retirements) requires broker valuation tooling. Sprint 44 BrokerPortfolioAnalytics + snapshots + valuation_estimate foundation = enabler M&A market participation + foundation Phase 11+ advanced M&A services + financial models advanced + Skalean potentielle position M&A advisory broker market Morocco.

Quatriemement, **Sprint 14 cross-tenant framework operational validation**. Sprint 25-26 Sprint 14 cross-tenant patterns foundation but never operational complex production scenario. Sprint 44 portage T7 = first production complex cross-tenant operational scenario + validation framework robustness + foundation Phase 11+ cross-tenant federation advanced + multi-region deployments cross-tenant.

Cinquiemement, **foundation Sprints 45-50 + Phase 11+ commercial scaling**. Sprint 44 establishes portfolio analytics + broker valuation + cross-tenant patterns + ACAPS compliance. Sprint 45 Comparaison T8 reuses InsurerComparison Sprint 41 + portfolio context Sprint 44. Sprint 46 Renouvellement automatique reuses portfolio analytics Sprint 44. Sprints 48-50 commercial features build on portfolio analytics foundation. Phase 11+ commercial scaling MENA expansion requires portage T7 operational base.

## PIEGES TECHNIQUES GENERAUX

**Piege 1 : Cross-tenant data migration atomicity failures.** Sprint 14 cross-tenant migration policies + customers + audit_trails complex multi-step = partial failures conduit a inconsistent state cross-tenant. Solution : PostgreSQL SELECT FOR UPDATE strict transactions + saga compensations per-step rollback comprehensive + Sprint 14 event sourcing audit + tests scenarios extensive partial failures + Sprint 35 cross-tenant audit comprehensive + foundation Phase 11+ distributed transactions advanced.

**Piege 2 : CNDP consent token security cryptographic.** Consent_token UUID exposed customer access transfer details + PII = privacy breach CNDP Loi 09-08 sanctions. Solution : consent_token UUID cryptographic crypto.randomUUID + customer authentication check on consent access + Sprint 27 PII masking strict + consent_expires_at 7 jours + revocation immediate possible + audit comprehensive accesses Sprint 7 + Sprint 35 CNDP audit comprehensive.

**Piege 3 : ACAPS T7 form regulatory format inaccuracy.** T7 form ACAPS regulatory format precise + submission errors = rejection + delays + customer frustration + regulatory sanctions. Solution : T7 form template ACAPS validation Sprint 35 strict + foundation Phase 11+ ACAPS API integration post-licensing + manual fallback workflow broker_admin review + acaps_reference systematic tracking + audit comprehensive submissions + Sprint 35 ComplianceAuditService integration.

**Piege 4 : Commission reconciliation disputes broker_A vs broker_B.** Commissions calculations contested between brokers transferring = disputes legal + payment delays + customer service issues + regulatory complaints. Solution : reconciliation logic transparent + audit comprehensive Sprint 7 + dispute workflow CommissionReconciliationService + Sprint 9 broker_admin escalation + manual override workflow + Sprint 35 audit comprehensive disputes + foundation Phase 11+ AI-assisted dispute resolution.

**Piege 5 : Portfolio valuation_estimate algorithm bias inaccuracies.** Valuation_estimate algorithm foundation may produce biased valuations (small brokers undervalued + niche specializations) = trust damage + M&A market dysfunctions. Solution : algorithm transparency + multiple factors (revenue + churn + portfolio quality + customer lifetime_value) + version tracking + foundation Phase 11+ professional M&A advisors validation + manual override broker_admin review + audit comprehensive.

**Piege 6 : Customer consent timing 7 jours expiration aggressive.** Consent expires 7 jours too aggressive customer may not have decided + abandon transfer + frustration. Solution : consent_expires_at 7 jours configurable env + Sprint 9 reminders J-5 + J-3 + J-1 + manual extension workflow broker_admin + Sprint 9 customer-friendly notifications + foundation Phase 11+ adaptive consent timing based customer behavior.

**Piege 7 : Sprint 14 cross-tenant framework Sprint 25-26 operational gaps.** Sprint 25-26 foundation framework but never operational complex production scenario = gaps reveals + bugs production. Solution : Sprint 14 framework extension Sprint 44 comprehensive tests + Sprint 36 monitoring cross-tenant operations + alerts on anomalies + Sprint 35 audit comprehensive + foundation Phase 11+ refactoring framework based learnings.

**Piege 8 : Sprint 34 6 connecteurs notifications insurers migration concurrent overwhelm.** Notification all 6 insurers concurrent policies migration = stubs overwhelm + timeouts + partial failures. Solution : Promise.allSettled handle partial failures + Sprint 35 circuit breakers per connecteur + retry exponential backoff + Sprint 9 broker_admin alerts + foundation Phase 11+ real APIs capacity planning + rate limiting per insurer.

**Piege 9 : Portfolio snapshots daily 03h00 MA performance large tenants.** Portfolio_snapshot_cron daily 03h00 MA all tenants generate snapshots = potentially heavy aggregations + database load + monitoring critical. Solution : batched per tenant + monitoring duration Sprint 36 + alerts on > 10 min + foundation Phase 11+ incremental snapshots + ClickHouse Materialized Views Replicated + tests staging scenarios scale.

**Piege 10 : Permissions acaps_reviewer extended role security.** New role acaps_reviewer Sprint 7.5a extension may expose sensitive cross-tenant data inadvertently = privacy breach + regulatory complaints. Solution : permissions granular per resource + Sprint 7 audit comprehensive role access + Sprint 35 pentest verification + foundation Phase 11+ RBAC advanced + zero-trust patterns + tests negative comprehensive (acaps_reviewer cannot access unauthorized data).

---

A la sortie de ce sprint, Skalean dispose d'**entites domain Comparaison T8** :
- **`ComparisonRequest`** (id + tenant_id + customer_id + quote_id FK nullable + initiated_by enum customer/broker/automated + comparison_criteria JSONB ({coverage_priorities, budget_range, vehicle_data, driver_profile}) + insurers_queried INTEGER + completed_at TIMESTAMP nullable + completion_time_seconds INTEGER + cache_hit BOOLEAN default false + acaps_reference VARCHAR T8 + variant_id FK nullable Sprint 43 + audit_trail JSONB) UNIQUE (acaps_reference) + indexes (tenant_id + customer_id + initiated_by + completed_at desc)
- **`ComparisonResult`** (id + comparison_request_id FK + insurer_id FK Sprint 34 + insurer_name VARCHAR + premium_amount NUMERIC(10,2) + premium_currency + coverage_summary JSONB ({coverage_types_included, deductibles, exclusions, additional_benefits}) + claims_payout_score NUMERIC(5,2) + customer_satisfaction_score NUMERIC(5,2) + financial_strength_score NUMERIC(5,2) + transparency_score NUMERIC(5,2) + composite_score NUMERIC(5,2) computed + ranking INTEGER + status enum quoted/failed/cached + audit_trail) indexes (comparison_request_id + insurer_id + ranking + composite_score desc)
- **`ComparisonRecommendation`** (id + comparison_request_id FK + recommended_insurer_id FK + recommendation_rank INTEGER (1-3 top-3) + recommendation_reasoning JSONB ({factors_weighted, customer_profile_match, value_proposition}) + recommendation_acceptance enum pending/accepted/rejected/no_response + acceptance_at TIMESTAMP nullable + acceptance_reason TEXT nullable + audit_trail) UNIQUE (comparison_request_id, recommendation_rank) + indexes (comparison_request_id + recommended_insurer_id + recommendation_acceptance partial)
- **`T8DisclosureDocument`** (id + comparison_request_id FK + tenant_id + s3_key VARCHAR Sprint 10 encrypted + signature_43_20_id FK nullable broker certification + acaps_reference VARCHAR T8 + customer_acknowledgments JSONB + generated_at TIMESTAMP + retained_until TIMESTAMP (retention permanente CNDP foundation) + audit_trail) indexes (comparison_request_id + acaps_reference + retained_until)
- **`ComparisonBenchmarkSnapshot`** (id + tenant_id + benchmark_date DATE + insurer_performance JSONB ({avg_premium_per_insurer, recommendation_frequency_per_insurer, acceptance_rate_per_insurer, customer_satisfaction_trends}) + market_position_insurer_id_top FK + statistical_variance NUMERIC + bias_alerts_count INTEGER + audit_trail) indexes (tenant_id + benchmark_date desc) - bias monitoring foundation

## CONTEXTE STRATEGIQUE -- POURQUOI LE SPRINT EST CRITIQUE

Sprint 45 est **regulatory compliance ACAPS T8 transparency comprehensive** + **commercial differentiation customer trust strategique** + **broker analytics depth** + **foundation Sprints 46-50 + Phase 11+ ML fairness Anthropic**. Cinq dimensions strategiques majeures.

Premierement, **regulatory compliance ACAPS T8 transparency mandatory**. ACAPS Programme Emergence T8 form regulatory mandatory transparency comparison disclosures Morocco insurance brokers presenting multiple insurers to customers = compliance critique pour activite legale + reputation + commercial growth. Sprint 45 implementation comprehensive = compliance ACAPS T8 credibility renforcee + foundation Phase 11+ official audits sign-off + commercial scaling regulatory environment Morocco renforce.

Deuxiemement, **commercial differentiation customer trust compelling vs Morocco competitors**. Morocco insurance brokers traditionally opaque processes customers don't see multi-insurer comparisons + trust deficit chronic + brokers reputation challenged. Sprint 45 transparency comparaison + customer-facing UI + recommendations explainable = compelling differentiation customer trust + winning customer relationships + commercial scaling Morocco market + foundation cross-country expansion MENA Phase 11+ where transparency demand growing.

Troisiemement, **broker analytics depth value-add commercial proposition**. Brokers Morocco currently lack analytics depth insurer performance + customer behavior + revenue impact comparison. Sprint 45 analytics dashboards comprehensive + bias monitoring + revenue tracking + insurer trends = compelling B2B SaaS value proposition winning enterprise broker customers + commercial scaling Sprints 46-50 features building on analytics foundation Sprint 45.

Quatriemement, **foundation Phase 11+ ML fairness Anthropic partnership**. Sprint 45 bias monitoring rule-based foundation establishes infrastructure data + algorithms + audit + alerts. Phase 11+ Anthropic AI partnership advanced ML fairness comprehensive (bias detection ML models + fair recommendations + transparency reporting comprehensive + customer-facing explainable AI). Sprint 45 = essential preparation Phase 11+ AI fairness transformation.

Cinquiemement, **Sprint 41 InsurerComparison validation operational complete + foundation Sprints 46-50**. Sprint 41 InsurerComparisonService foundation but never customer-facing full operational. Sprint 45 = first customer-facing comprehensive comparaison operational + validation framework + foundation Sprints 46-50 + Phase 11+ commercial scaling. Sprint 46 Renouvellement automatique reuses Sprint 45 comparison patterns at renewal events. Sprint 50 Embedded cross-sell reuses Sprint 45 recommendations engine.

## PIEGES TECHNIQUES GENERAUX

**Piege 1 : Bias monitoring algorithms unfair detection insufficient.** Bias detection algorithms basic foundation may miss subtle biases (algorithmic discrimination + insurer favoritism + customer profile penalties) = regulatory ACAPS sanctions + customer trust damage. Solution : multiple bias detection algorithms (statistical variance + recommendation frequency + acceptance disparity) + Sprint 9 broker_admin alerts + Sprint 35 ACAPS bias audit + foundation Phase 11+ ML fairness comprehensive Anthropic partnership.

**Piege 2 : Composite scoring weights manipulation insurers.** Composite scoring weights configurable broker-level may be manipulated favoring specific insurers = trust damage + ACAPS investigation. Solution : default weights ACAPS recommendations + manipulation tracking audit comprehensive + Sprint 35 ACAPS audit + transparency reporting customer-facing + foundation Phase 11+ fair weights ML.

**Piege 3 : Sprint 41 InsurerComparisonService extension performance degradation.** Sprint 45 comprehensive criteria + Sprint 41 reuse may degrade performance < 10s target. Solution : caching 24h Redis aggressive + Sprint 35 circuit breakers per insurer + Promise.allSettled handle partial failures + Sprint 36 monitoring < 10s SLA + foundation Phase 11+ edge computing acceleration.

**Piege 4 : Customer satisfaction score data unreliable stub.** Sprint 45 customer_satisfaction_score stub foundation Phase 11+ real data = scoring biased + customer confusion + commercial reputation damage. Solution : explanability JSONB customer-facing strict + Phase 11+ real surveys + NPS + reviews integration + transparency reporting + manual override broker_admin disputes + foundation Phase 11+ multi-source real data aggregation.

**Piege 5 : T8 ACAPS Form regulatory format inaccuracy.** T8 form ACAPS format precise different from T7 + submission errors = ACAPS rejection + customer service issues. Solution : T8 form template ACAPS validation strict + Sprint 35 ComplianceAuditService + manual fallback broker_admin review + acaps_reference T8 systematic ACAPS-CMP-{} + retention permanente + foundation Phase 11+ ACAPS API automated.

**Piege 6 : Recommendation explanability JSONB customer comprehension.** JSONB explanability technical + customers don't understand = trust damage + decisions uninformed. Solution : explanability layers (technical JSONB + customer-friendly text + visual + interactive) + Sprint 27 localization fr-MA + ar-MA + en + customer comprehension testing + foundation Phase 11+ voice + interactive AI explanations.

**Piege 7 : A/B testing variants Sprint 43 reuse comparison-specific.** Sprint 43 A/B testing variants wizard generic + Sprint 45 comparison-specific variants needed = reuse complications. Solution : Sprint 43 WizardABTestingService extension Sprint 45 variants comparison-specific + sticky assignment per customer maintained + statistical significance Sprint 13 + foundation Phase 11+ Bayesian advanced.

**Piege 8 : Cache invalidation insurer data changes 24h.** Caching 24h Redis aggressive may serve stale data when insurer changes prices + coverage + policies mid-day = customer confusion + comparison inaccurate. Solution : event-driven invalidation Sprint 14 (insurer.data.changed events trigger cache invalidation) + manual refresh broker_admin workflow + valid_until 24h reasonable + foundation Phase 11+ real-time insurer integration post-licensing.

**Piege 9 : Customer comparison wizard UX 3 steps tight.** 3-step wizard comparaison criteria + results + choice may be too aggressive vs customer needs detailed exploration = frustration + abandonment. Solution : 3 steps default + foundation expandable detailed view + Sprint 43 mobile-first + WCAG 2.1 AA + Sprint 13 funnel analytics + foundation Phase 11+ adaptive UX customer behavior signals.

**Piege 10 : Sprint 13 4 MV refresh 05h15 cumulative performance.** Sprint 13 23 MV total insurance (Sprint 40-45 cumulative) refresh staggered window 04h00-05h15 = potential performance degradation. Solution : MV refresh staggered (Sprint 40 04h00 + Sprint 41 04h15 + Sprint 42 04h30 + Sprint 43 04h45 + Sprint 44 05h00 + Sprint 45 05h15) + monitoring Sprint 36 + foundation Phase 11+ incremental refresh + ClickHouse Materialized Views Replicated patterns.

## OBJECTIF GLOBAL DU SPRINT

granular per-policy + customer-level OR coverage-level + worker daily 04h00 MA processing 30-jours-ahead renewals queue + per-policy idempotency Sprint 15 strict + per-policy compensations rollback on insurer API failures + Sprint 14 events RenewalAutomaticInitiated + RenewalAutomaticCompleted + multi-policy bulk renewals same customer atomic transaction + scale 1000+ renewals daily) avec performance monitoring Sprint 36 + alerts on degradation + foundation Phase 11+ horizontal scaling, (2) **Sprint 42 churn integration renewal incentives** -- Sprint 42 InsuranceChurnPredictionService reuse + churn_score retrieval at renewal_pending state + churn_threshold tunable (0.7+ high risk) trigger incentives + ChurnBasedRenewalService logic (high_churn = discount 10%+ + coverage_upgrade + multi_policy_bundle + manual broker outreach + low_churn = standard renewal + medium_churn = soft incentives discount 5%) + Sprint 14 events ChurnIncentiveApplied + Sprint 13 churn_prevention_metrics_mv + Sprint 9 customer + broker notifications + foundation Phase 11+ Anthropic AI advanced churn-personalized incentives, (3) **Sprint 45 comparison-triggered renewals** -- ComparisonTriggeredRenewalService leverage Sprint 45 InsurerComparisonEngine at renewal trigger (option customer pre-renewal comparison alternative insurers + premium check vs market + automatic comparison if churn_score high + customer choice retain current insurer OR transfer Sprint 44 portage T7 patterns) + Sprint 14 events ComparisonTriggeredAtRenewal + Sprint 35 ACAPS T8 disclosure mandatory + foundation Phase 11+ ML personalization comparison-based, (4) **DynamicPricingService market-based adjustments** -- premium adjustments dynamic (base_premium from Sprint 40 PremiumService + dynamic_factors JSONB market_position + churn_risk + loyalty_score + claims_history_5_years + Morocco market trends foundation + insurer competitive_pressure) + adjustment_reasoning transparent customer + Sprint 35 ACAPS audit + bias monitoring strict + foundation Phase 11+ AI advanced ML pricing models Anthropic + Sprint 13 dynamic_pricing_metrics_mv, (5) **RenewalIncentive acceptance tracking** -- incentive_types (discount + coverage_upgrade + multi_policy_bundle + loyalty_reward + premium_lock_in next_year) + acceptance_status enum offered/accepted/rejected/expired + applied_at TIMESTAMP + impact tracking Sprint 13 revenue analytics + Sprint 14 events IncentiveOffered + IncentiveAccepted + foundation Phase 11+ personalization, (6) **RenewalCampaignService broker-initiated campaigns** -- broker-initiated bulk campaigns (customer_segment_criteria JSONB filtering by churn_score + product_type + insurer + region + premium_range) + scheduled_for_renewal_window + churn_threshold + comparison_enabled toggle + Sprint 9 multi-channel orchestration (email + WhatsApp + SMS critical) + Sprint 42 NurtureCampaignService reuse extension + Sprint 13 campaign_performance_mv + opt-out CNDP strict, (7) **Sprint 28 admin-portal renewal dashboards** -- 3 nouveaux tabs renewal (renewals_pipeline automatic + manual + comparison-triggered statuses + renewal_analytics broker performance + dynamic_pricing insights + churn_prevention_dashboard incentives acceptance + revenue impact) + KPIs Recharts comprehensive + Sprint 13 4 MV integration + permissions broker_admin/super_admin/acaps_reviewer, et (8) **RenewalAnalytics comprehensive** -- Sprint 13 MV multi-dimensions (renewal_automation_metrics_mv + churn_prevention_metrics_mv + dynamic_pricing_metrics_mv + renewal_campaign_performance_mv) refresh daily 05h30 (apres Sprint 45 05h15) + Sprint 36 monitoring + broker insights commercial + revenue analytics + foundation Phase 11+ ML insights advanced Anthropic partnership.

Le sprint produit **commercial retention uplift quantitatif** (auto-renewal 70%+ + churn prevention 20%+ + revenue per customer LTV +15%) + **broker productivity multiplier** (campaigns automated + analytics depth) + **customer experience enhancement** (personalized incentives + transparency dynamic pricing) + **foundation Phase 11+ Anthropic AI ML personalization** + **regulatory compliance ACAPS dynamic pricing transparency**. Le sprint introduit **decision-045 ratification** Insurance Automatic Renewal Advanced + Sprint 41/42/45 integration extensive + dynamic pricing market-based + incentives retention + broker campaigns + analytics comprehensive Sprint 28/13.

A la sortie de ce sprint, Skalean dispose d'**entites domain Renewal Advanced** :
- **`RenewalPolicy`** (id + original_policy_id FK Sprint 40 + renewed_policy_id FK nullable + tenant_id + customer_id + renewal_type enum automatic/manual/comparison_triggered/campaign_triggered + auto_renewal_enabled BOOLEAN + opt_in_at TIMESTAMP nullable + opt_out_at TIMESTAMP nullable + dynamic_pricing_applied BOOLEAN + premium_previous NUMERIC(10,2) + premium_adjusted NUMERIC(10,2) + premium_adjustment_percent NUMERIC(5,2) computed + churn_score_at_renewal NUMERIC(5,2) Sprint 42 reuse + incentive_applied_id FK nullable + comparison_request_id FK nullable Sprint 45 + status enum scheduled/in_progress/completed/cancelled/abandoned + scheduled_for TIMESTAMP + completed_at TIMESTAMP nullable + audit_trail JSONB) UNIQUE (original_policy_id) + indexes (customer_id + status partial + scheduled_for + churn_score_at_renewal)
- **`RenewalCampaign`** (id + tenant_id + campaign_name VARCHAR + campaign_description TEXT + scheduled_for_renewal_window_start DATE + scheduled_for_renewal_window_end DATE + customer_segment_criteria JSONB ({churn_score_min, churn_score_max, product_types, insurers, regions, premium_min, premium_max}) + churn_threshold NUMERIC(5,2) + comparison_enabled BOOLEAN + incentives_config JSONB + status enum draft/scheduled/in_progress/completed/cancelled + created_by_user_id FK + audit_trail) indexes (tenant_id + status partial + scheduled_for_renewal_window_start)
- **`DynamicPricingDecision`** (id + renewal_policy_id FK + pricing_factors JSONB ({market_position, churn_risk, loyalty_score, claims_history_score, competitive_pressure, regional_factor}) + base_premium NUMERIC(10,2) + adjusted_premium NUMERIC(10,2) + adjustment_percent NUMERIC(5,2) + adjustment_reasoning TEXT customer-facing + algorithm_version VARCHAR + bias_check_passed BOOLEAN + audit_trail) indexes (renewal_policy_id + adjustment_percent)
- **`RenewalIncentive`** (id + renewal_policy_id FK + tenant_id + incentive_type enum discount/coverage_upgrade/multi_policy_bundle/loyalty_reward/premium_lock_in + incentive_value NUMERIC(10,2) + incentive_description TEXT customer-facing + offered_at TIMESTAMP + acceptance_status enum offered/accepted/rejected/expired/applied + responded_at TIMESTAMP nullable + applied_at TIMESTAMP nullable + audit_trail) indexes (renewal_policy_id + acceptance_status partial)
- **`RenewalAnalyticsSnapshot`** (id + tenant_id + snapshot_date DATE + total_renewals_processed INTEGER + auto_renewals_count INTEGER + auto_renewals_rate NUMERIC(5,2) + manual_renewals_count INTEGER + comparison_triggered_count INTEGER + churn_prevented_count INTEGER + dynamic_pricing_revenue_impact NUMERIC(12,2) + average_incentive_acceptance_rate NUMERIC(5,2) + audit_trail) indexes (tenant_id + snapshot_date desc)

Un **package `@insurtech/insurance-renewal-advanced`** v1.0.0 NestJS module + **5 services principaux** :

**AutomaticRenewalService** (Sprint 41 extension) :
- `processScheduledRenewals(date_window)` worker batch :
  1. Query renewals scheduled within 30 days
  2. For each policy : check auto_renewal_enabled + churn_score Sprint 42 + dynamic_pricing eligibility
  3. Generate RenewalPolicy + DynamicPricingDecision
  4. Trigger Sprint 41 PolicyRenewalService for actual renewal execution
  5. Sprint 14 events RenewalAutomaticInitiated + RenewalAutomaticCompleted
  6. Sprint 9 customer notification (J-30 + reminders)
- `updateRenewalPreference(policy_id, auto_renewal_enabled)` customer opt-in/opt-out + audit + Sprint 9 confirmation
- `cancelAutomaticRenewal(renewal_id, reason)` compensations + Sprint 41 PolicyRenewalService cancel + Sprint 9 customer notification
- `processBulkRenewalsForCustomer(customer_id)` multi-policy bulk renewals same customer atomic
- Worker `automatic-renewal-cron.worker.ts` daily 04h00 MA batch processing
- Performance Sprint 36 monitoring + alerts

**ChurnBasedRenewalService** :
- `evaluateChurnAtRenewal(policy_id)` Sprint 42 InsuranceChurnPredictionService reuse + churn_score retrieval at renewal_pending state
- `applyChurnIncentives(renewal_id, churn_score)` if churn_score > threshold : apply incentives (discount + coverage_upgrade + multi_policy_bundle + manual outreach broker_admin)
- `trackIncentiveEffectiveness(renewal_id)` Sprint 13 analytics + acceptance tracking

## CONTEXTE STRATEGIQUE -- POURQUOI LE SPRINT EST CRITIQUE

Sprint 46 est **commercial retention uplift quantitatif** + **broker productivity multiplier** + **customer experience compelling** + **foundation Phase 11+ Anthropic AI ML personalization**. Cinq dimensions strategiques majeures.

Premierement, **commercial retention uplift quantitatif strategique**. Sprints 40-45 foundation policies + comparison mais retention chronique problem Morocco insurance broker market (churn rates 15-25% annual). Sprint 46 auto-renewal 70%+ + churn-based incentives + dynamic pricing personalisation = retention uplift quantitatif (LTV +15%) demonstrable + commercial impact direct revenue Phase 10+ + commercial scaling differentiation strategique.

Deuxiemement, **broker productivity multiplier campaigns automation analytics**. Brokers Morocco currently manage renewals individually + manual processes + analytics absent. Sprint 46 RenewalCampaignService bulk + analytics dashboards comprehensive + dynamic pricing recommendations = broker time freed customer relationships + complex cases + commercial selling + B2B SaaS value proposition compelling.

Troisiemement, **customer experience enhancement personnalisation compelling differentiation Morocco market**. Customers Morocco accustomed legacy renewals (no transparency + no personalization + no comparison). Sprint 46 personalized incentives (Sprint 42 churn-based) + dynamic pricing transparency + comparison option Sprint 45 + welcome notifications = customer experience step-change vs competitors + customer trust + retention strategique.

Quatriemement, **Sprint 41/42/45 integrations validation operational comprehensive**. Sprint 41 PolicyRenewalService foundation + Sprint 42 ChurnPrediction foundation + Sprint 45 InsurerComparison foundation but never integrated operationally. Sprint 46 = first comprehensive integration operational + validation framework + foundation Phase 11+ commercial scaling MENA expansion.

Cinquiemement, **foundation Phase 11+ Anthropic AI ML personalization commercial scaling**. Sprint 46 rule-based foundation establishes infrastructure data + workflows + analytics + integration patterns. Phase 11+ Anthropic AI partnership advanced ML personalization (churn-personalized incentives ML + dynamic pricing AI + customer-personalized comparisons ML + voice AI customer interactions). Sprint 46 = essential preparation Phase 11+ AI transformation.

---

### Decision-045 -- Insurance Automatic Renewal Advanced + Churn + Comparison Integration

**Justification** :
- (a) Commercial retention uplift quantitatif (LTV +15% + churn -20%)
- (b) Broker productivity multiplier campaigns + analytics
- (c) Customer experience compelling differentiation
- (d) Sprint 41/42/45 integrations operational validation
- (e) Foundation Phase 11+ Anthropic AI ML personalization

**Architecture** :
- 5 entites + RLS + indexes
- 6 services + 3 workers
- Pricing engine 6 modules + Incentive engine 4 modules
- Sprint 41/42/45 integrations extensive
- Sprint 28/13/9/27/34/35 integration
- Foundation Phase 11+ AI

---

Justification : (a) Retention uplift quantitatif, (b) Broker productivity multiplier, (c) Customer experience differentiation, (d) Sprint 41/42/45 validation, (e) Foundation Phase 11+ AI. Architecture : 5 entites + 6 services + 3 workers + pricing/incentive engines + Sprint 41/42/45 integration extensive.

---

## PIEGES TECHNIQUES GENERAUX

**Piege 1 : Auto-renewal batch processing scale daily 1000+ policies performance.** Daily batch processing 1000+ renewals + per-policy operations (churn + pricing + insurer API) = potential performance degradation + missed renewal windows = customer service impact + revenue loss. Solution : batched parallel processing (Promise.allSettled + BullMQ concurrency tuning) + Sprint 36 monitoring per-policy latency + alerts on degradation + foundation Phase 11+ horizontal scaling + per-tenant batching strategies.

**Piege 2 : Churn-based incentives bias unfair customer treatment.** Churn-based incentives algorithms may discriminate customers (high-value retained + low-value abandoned) = regulatory ACAPS + brand damage. Solution : bias monitoring strict + ACAPS Sprint 35 audit + customer-friendly explanation rationale + transparency reporting + foundation Phase 11+ ML fairness Anthropic + manual broker_admin override workflow.

**Piege 3 : Dynamic pricing transparency customer comprehension.** Dynamic pricing factors complex JSONB = customers don't understand adjustments + trust damage. Solution : adjustment_reasoning TEXT customer-facing simple language + visual breakdown factors + Sprint 9 personalized explanation + transparency reporting + foundation Phase 11+ voice AI + interactive AI explanations.

**Piege 4 : Sprint 41 PolicyRenewalService state machine extensions conflicts.** Sprint 46 substates extensions (churn_evaluation + dynamic_pricing + comparison_triggered) added Sprint 41 state machine = potential backward compatibility breaks. Solution : Sprint 41 state machine extensions strict (add only never remove) + tests comprehensive Sprint 41 existing flows + Sprint 14 events backward compatible + foundation Phase 11+ state machine versioning.

**Piege 5 : Comparison-triggered renewals customer confusion overwhelming.** Customer renewal moment + comparison option may overwhelm = frustration + abandonment + churn paradoxically increased. Solution : comparison triggered ONLY if churn_score high + customer-friendly framing ("optional comparison") + Sprint 9 personalized explanation + clear default "retain current" + foundation Phase 11+ ML personalization timing optimal.

**Piege 6 : Sprint 42 churn_score cache staleness at renewal trigger.** Sprint 42 churn predictions cached but may be stale at renewal trigger weeks/months later = incorrect incentives. Solution : Sprint 42 cache event-driven invalidation Sprint 14 + force refresh at renewal_pending state + tests scenarios + Sprint 36 monitoring stale predictions + foundation Phase 11+ real-time churn ML Anthropic.

**Piege 7 : Multi-policy bulk renewals same customer atomic transactions.** Customer with multiple policies renewing same time atomic transaction = complex + potential failures partial rollbacks. Solution : per-policy transactions + saga compensations + Sprint 15 idempotency strict + Sprint 9 customer notification per-policy + atomic only same insurer same date + manual broker_admin override partial failures.

**Piege 8 : Dynamic pricing weights configuration broker manipulation.** Pricing weights broker-configurable = manipulation favoring revenue over customer fairness = ACAPS regulatory + customer trust. Solution : default weights ACAPS recommendations + manipulation tracking audit comprehensive + Sprint 35 ACAPS audit + transparency reporting + foundation Phase 11+ fair weights ML monitored + customer disputes workflow.

**Piege 9 : Campaign opt-out CNDP propagation cross-channels.** Customer opt-out one channel (email) but other channels (WhatsApp + SMS) continue = CNDP Loi 09-08 sanctions. Solution : opt-out propagation immediate all channels Sprint 42 NurtureCampaignService patterns + Sprint 9 verification before send + audit comprehensive + foundation Phase 11+ preference center customer self-management.

**Piege 10 : Sprint 13 27 MV total refresh cumulative performance (Sprints 40-46).** Sprint 46 4 MV + Sprints 40-45 23 MV = 27 MV insurance total refresh window 04h00-05h30 = potential performance degradation cumulative. Solution : refresh staggered (Sprint 40 04h00 + Sprint 41 04h15 + Sprint 42 04h30 + Sprint 43 04h45 + Sprint 44 05h00 + Sprint 45 05h15 + Sprint 46 05h30) + monitoring Sprint 36 + foundation Phase 11+ incremental refresh + ClickHouse Replicated.

coverage_change_extension/coverage_change_reduction/named_drivers_addition/named_drivers_removal/vehicle_change/address_change/payment_frequency_change/beneficiary_change_personal_lines/premium_adjustment_voluntary + initiated_by enum customer/broker/automated + scheduled_effective_date + impact_summary JSONB premium impact + coverage_impact + regulatory_impact + Sprint 41 endorsements foundation extension + state machine 7 etats requested/under_broker_review/customer_signature_pending/insurer_submission_pending/insurer_approved/effective/cancelled) avec idempotency Sprint 15 strict + Sprint 7 audit comprehensive + retention 5 ans, (2) **ModificationApprovalWorkflowService multi-step** -- multi-step approval workflow (step 1 broker review professional opinion + premium impact assessment + risk evaluation Sprint 42 reuse + step 2 customer signature 43-20 mandatory Sprint 10 + step 3 insurer endorsement submission Sprint 34 + step 4 customer confirmation effective_date + step 5 policy document regeneration + step 6 ACAPS audit logging Sprint 35) + state machine transitions controlled + Sprint 14 events ModificationApprovalStep* + Sprint 9 stakeholder notifications matrix + foundation Phase 11+ parallel approval workflows optimisation, (3) **ModificationPremiumAdjustmentService Sprint 46 dynamic pricing reuse** -- Sprint 46 DynamicPricingService reuse + Sprint 46 6 pricing factors leveraged + premium_adjustment calculation transparent + customer-facing reasoning + bias monitoring Sprint 46 + Sprint 35 ACAPS audit + Sprint 13 modification_premium_impact_mv + foundation Phase 11+ Anthropic AI premium modeling, (4) **Sprint 10 signature 43-20 mandatory per modification** -- Sprint 10 signature 43-20 mandatory all modifications customer-initiated OR broker-initiated significant + signature_43_20_id retention permanente CNDP + Sprint 27 PII strict signature data + Sprint 35 audit comprehensive signature compliance + foundation Phase 11+ biometric authentication WebAuthn complement, (5) **Sprint 34 insurer endorsements API submission** -- Sprint 34 6 connecteurs stubs reuse + endorsement_submission_data JSONB + concurrent submission Promise.allSettled if multi-insurer scenarios + Sprint 35 circuit breakers + acknowledgment tracking insurer_acknowledgment_reference + foundation Phase 11+ real APIs post-licensing + monitoring Sprint 36 latency + manual fallback broker_admin workflow, (6) **Sprint 35 ACAPS Modification Audit comprehensive** -- ACAPS regulatory audit modifications + acaps_modification_reference systematic ACAPS-MOD-{tenant_short}-{modification_short} + Sprint 35 ComplianceAuditService integration + retention permanente CNDP + foundation Phase 11+ ACAPS automated submissions post-licensing + audit trails comprehensive, (7) **Sprint 18 customer-portal modification request UI** -- Sprint 18 PWA extension dedie modifications + Sprint 43 Quote Express + Sprint 45 Comparison patterns reuse (3-step wizard) + customer-initiated modification request creation + impact preview transparent + signature 43-20 inline + Sprint 27 PII strict + Sprint 9 personalized notifications + mobile-first WCAG 2.1 AA + foundation Phase 11+ voice + biometric modification flows, et (8) **Sprint 28 admin-portal 3 tabs modifications** -- modifications_pipeline (statuses + multi-step progress + broker review queues) + modifications_analytics (volume + approval rates + processing times + reasons + impact analysis) + modifications_compliance (ACAPS audit + retention + signature verification) + KPIs Recharts comprehensive + permissions broker_admin/super_admin/acaps_reviewer Sprint 7.5a + Sprint 13 4 MV integration + foundation Phase 11+ ML insights advanced.

Le sprint produit **operationnel modification efficiency demonstrable** (broker_admin processing time -50% + customer modification satisfaction +30% + ACAPS compliance comprehensive + audit trails permanent) + **commercial differentiation strategique customer experience transparency vs Morocco legacy** + **broker productivity enhancement** + **foundation Phase 11+ Anthropic AI ML modifications insights** + **Sprint 41 endorsements validation operational complete** + **Sprint 46 dynamic pricing + Sprint 10 signature + Sprint 34/35 integration validated**. A la sortie de ce sprint, Skalean dispose d'**entites domain Modification Contrat** :
- **`ContractModification`** (id + policy_id FK Sprint 40 + tenant_id + customer_id + modification_type enum (8 types) + modification_status enum requested/under_broker_review/customer_signature_pending/insurer_submission_pending/insurer_approved/effective/cancelled + initiated_by enum customer/broker/automated + scheduled_effective_date + completed_at TIMESTAMP nullable + impact_summary JSONB ({premium_change_amount, premium_change_percent, coverage_changes, regulatory_changes, customer_acknowledgments}) + cancellation_reason TEXT nullable + acaps_modification_reference VARCHAR + audit_trail JSONB) UNIQUE (acaps_modification_reference) + indexes (policy_id + customer_id + modification_status partial + initiated_at desc)
- **`ModificationApprovalStep`** (id + modification_id FK + step_number INTEGER 1-6 + step_name VARCHAR + approver_role enum broker/customer/insurer/acaps_reviewer + approval_status enum pending/approved/rejected/timed_out + approved_at TIMESTAMP nullable + rejected_at TIMESTAMP nullable + approver_user_id FK nullable + comments TEXT + impact_assessment JSONB + audit_trail) UNIQUE (modification_id, step_number) + indexes (modification_id + approval_status partial + step_number)
- **`ModificationPremiumImpact`** (id + modification_id FK + previous_premium NUMERIC(10,2) + new_premium NUMERIC(10,2) + adjustment_amount NUMERIC(10,2) computed + adjustment_percent NUMERIC(5,2) computed + adjustment_reasoning TEXT customer-facing + dynamic_pricing_decision_id FK Sprint 46 nullable + sprint46_factors_applied JSONB + bias_check_passed BOOLEAN + audit_trail) indexes (modification_id + adjustment_percent)
- **`ModificationDocument`** (id + modification_id FK + tenant_id + document_type enum modification_request/impact_summary/customer_acknowledgment/policy_update_pdf/insurer_endorsement_acknowledgment + s3_key VARCHAR Sprint 10 encrypted + signature_43_20_id FK nullable Sprint 10 + acaps_reference VARCHAR + generated_at TIMESTAMP + retained_until TIMESTAMP permanente + audit_trail) indexes (modification_id + document_type + acaps_reference)
- **`ModificationAnalyticsSnapshot`** (id + tenant_id + snapshot_date DATE + total_modifications_processed INTEGER + approved_count INTEGER + rejected_count INTEGER + average_processing_time_hours NUMERIC(5,2) + modification_types_distribution JSONB + premium_impact_aggregated NUMERIC(12,2) + audit_trail) indexes (tenant_id + snapshot_date desc)

Un **package `@insurtech/insurance-contract-modification`** v1.0.0 NestJS module + customer-portal Sprint 18 extension + **6 services principaux** :

**ContractModificationService** (Sprint 41 endorsements extension) :
- `requestModification(policy_id, modification_data, initiated_by)` orchestrate :
  1. Validate policy active + modification feasibility
  2. Create ContractModification state=requested
  3. Sprint 46 DynamicPricingService.calculateDynamicPremium impact assessment
  4. Create ModificationPremiumImpact
  5. Trigger ModificationApprovalWorkflowService.initiateApprovalWorkflow
  6. Sprint 14 event ContractModificationRequested
  7. Sprint 9 customer + broker notifications
- `getModificationStatus(modification_id)` retrieve + permissions check + audit
- `cancelModification(modification_id, reason)` compensations + state=cancelled + Sprint 14 events + Sprint 9 notifications
- `listModifications(filters)` admin-portal + customer-portal pagination
- Idempotency Sprint 15 strict
- Sprint 7 audit comprehensive
- Sprint 41 endorsements foundation extension

**ModificationApprovalWorkflowService** :
- `initiateApprovalWorkflow(modification_id)` create 6 ModificationApprovalStep records sequential + step 1=broker_review pending
- `submitBrokerReview(step_id, approval_decision, comments)` step 1 broker professional opinion + risk evaluation Sprint 42 reuse + transition step 2
- `submitCustomerSignature(step_id, signature_data)` step 2 Sprint 10 signature 43-20 mandatory + transition step 3
- `submitInsurerEndorsement(step_id)` step 3 Sprint 34 6 connecteurs API submission + transition step 4 on acknowledgment
- `confirmEffectiveDate(step_id)` step 4 customer confirmation + transition step 5
- `regeneratePolicyDocument(step_id)` step 5 Sprint 40 policy document regeneration + Sprint 10 signature
- `logACAPSCompliance(step_id)` step 6 Sprint 35 audit comprehensive + ACAPS reference
- State machine 7 etats transitions controlled

## CONTEXTE STRATEGIQUE -- POURQUOI LE SPRINT EST CRITIQUE

Sprint 47 est **operationnel modification efficiency demonstrable** + **commercial differentiation customer experience transparency** + **broker productivity enhancement** + **foundation Phase 11+ Anthropic AI ML insights modifications + commercial scaling**. Cinq dimensions strategiques majeures.

Premierement, **operationnel modification efficiency demonstrable broker workflows**. Sprints 40-46 foundation policies + renewals + comparison mais modifications still complex manual processes broker_admin. Sprint 47 multi-step workflow automated + Sprint 46 dynamic pricing reuse + Sprint 10 signature inline + Sprint 34 insurer notifications automated = broker_admin processing time -50% demonstrable + commercial productivity uplift + operational efficiency Morocco market unique vs competitors fragmented.

Deuxiemement, **commercial differentiation customer experience transparency modifications**. Morocco insurance customers traditionally face opaque modifications processes (forms paperwork + days/weeks delays + no transparency premium impact + signature manual). Sprint 47 customer-portal modification request UI + transparent impact preview + signature 43-20 inline + Sprint 9 notifications proactive = customer experience step-change vs Morocco legacy + customer trust + retention strategique + commercial differentiation competitors.

Troisiemement, **broker productivity enhancement multi-step automated**. Brokers Morocco currently manage modifications individually + manual coordination customer + insurer + ACAPS + signature paperwork. Sprint 47 ModificationApprovalWorkflowService multi-step automated + Sprint 28 admin-portal dashboards real-time + Sprint 9 notifications stakeholders matrix = broker time freed customer relationships + complex cases + commercial selling + B2B SaaS value proposition compelling.

Quatriemement, **Sprint 41/46/10/34/35 integrations operational validation comprehensive**. Sprint 41 endorsements foundation + Sprint 46 dynamic pricing + Sprint 10 signature + Sprint 34 connecteurs + Sprint 35 ACAPS validated separately mais never operationally integrated complex production scenario. Sprint 47 = comprehensive integration operational validation + foundation Phase 11+ commercial scaling MENA expansion + production-readiness validation.

Cinquiemement, **foundation Phase 11+ Anthropic AI ML insights modifications**. Sprint 47 rule-based foundation establishes infrastructure data + workflows + analytics + audit trails. Phase 11+ Anthropic AI partnership advanced ML modifications insights (modification reason ML categorization + impact prediction ML + customer-personalized modification suggestions + voice AI modification flows + biometric inline signature complement). Sprint 47 = essential preparation Phase 11+ AI transformation modifications domain.

## PIEGES TECHNIQUES GENERAUX

**Piege 1 : Multi-step workflow state machine complex 7 etats transitions.** State machine 7 etats + 6-step approval = complex transitions + potential bugs + stuck modifications. Solution : state machine strict transitions controlled + tests scenarios comprehensive each step + Sprint 14 events per transition + reconciliation runbook stuck modifications + Sprint 36 monitoring transitions + foundation Phase 11+ workflow engine BPMN.

**Piege 2 : Sprint 10 signature 43-20 inline customer-portal UX complexity.** Inline signature 43-20 customer-portal mobile UX complex + customer abandonment + frustration. Solution : Sprint 43 Quote Express patterns reuse + mobile-first WCAG 2.1 AA + clear instructions + Sprint 9 reminders if abandoned + foundation Phase 11+ biometric authentication complement easier.

**Piege 3 : Sprint 34 insurer endorsements rejection workflow rollback complex.** Insurer rejects endorsement post customer signature = rollback complex modifications state machine + customer service issues + signature already collected. Solution : insurer pre-validation step optional + rollback workflow comprehensive + customer notification + Sprint 35 audit + manual broker_admin override workflow + Sprint 9 escalations + foundation Phase 11+ insurer real-time validation pre-signature.

**Piege 4 : Sprint 46 dynamic pricing factors customer comprehension during modification.** Sprint 46 6 factors complex JSONB at modification time = customer confusion premium impact + trust damage + abandonment. Solution : adjustment_reasoning TEXT customer-facing simple language + visual breakdown factors + Sprint 9 personalized explanation + foundation Phase 11+ voice AI + interactive explanations + transparency reporting comprehensive.

**Piege 5 : ACAPS-MOD- regulatory format submission errors.** ACAPS modifications format precise + retention permanente + submission errors = ACAPS rejection + customer service issues + regulatory sanctions. Solution : ACAPS-MOD- template validation strict + Sprint 35 ComplianceAuditService + manual fallback broker_admin review + retention permanente CNDP + foundation Phase 11+ automated ACAPS API + monitoring submissions.

**Piege 6 : Sequential vs parallel approval workflows performance bottlenecks.** Sequential 6 steps may bottleneck modifications throughput + broker_admin productivity + customer satisfaction. Solution : sequential foundation Sprint 47 + monitoring Sprint 36 SLA per step + alerts on delays + foundation Phase 11+ parallel approval workflows optimisation where applicable (broker review + customer signature parallel possible) + load balancing broker_admin workload.

**Piege 7 : Customer-initiated vs broker-initiated workflows differences UX.** Customer-initiated workflows (customer-portal) differ broker-initiated (admin-portal) UX + permissions + signature flows = complex workflow management + bugs. Solution : initiated_by enum strict + workflows differentiation documented + tests scenarios each path comprehensive + Sprint 14 events differentiated + Sprint 9 notifications per initiator + foundation Phase 11+ unified workflow framework.

**Piege 8 : Cascading modifications same policy concurrent management.** Multiple modifications same policy concurrent (customer + broker simultaneous) = conflicts + state machine inconsistencies. Solution : SELECT FOR UPDATE strict per modification + max 1 active modification per policy enforcement + Sprint 9 customer + broker notification on conflict + manual broker_admin resolution workflow + foundation Phase 11+ collaborative modifications real-time CRDT.

**Piege 9 : Sprint 13 31 MV total refresh cumulative performance window 04h00-05h45.** Sprint 47 4 MV + Sprints 40-46 27 MV = 31 MV total refresh window = cumulative performance degradation potential. Solution : refresh staggered (Sprint 40-46 04h00-05h30 + Sprint 47 05h45) + monitoring Sprint 36 + foundation Phase 11+ incremental refresh + ClickHouse Replicated.

**Piege 10 : Permissions acaps_reviewer modification audit access scope creep.** acaps_reviewer permissions may scope creep into modification details beyond regulatory audit = privacy concerns. Solution : permissions granular per resource modification + Sprint 7 audit comprehensive role access + Sprint 35 pentest verification + foundation Phase 11+ RBAC advanced + zero-trust + tests negative comprehensive (acaps_reviewer scope strict).

A la sortie de ce sprint, Skalean dispose d'**entites domain Fleet B2B** :
- **`CorporateCustomer`** (id + tenant_id + company_name VARCHAR + ice_number VARCHAR UNIQUE Morocco corporate ID + tax_id VARCHAR + headquarters_address JSONB + procurement_contact JSONB ({name, email, phone}) + billing_contact JSONB ({name, email, phone}) + sla_tier enum bronze/silver/gold/platinum + corporate_size enum small/medium/large/enterprise + industry_sector VARCHAR + total_employees_estimated INTEGER + audit_trail JSONB) UNIQUE (ice_number) + indexes (tenant_id + company_name + sla_tier)
- **`FleetPolicy`** (id + corporate_customer_id FK + tenant_id + fleet_name VARCHAR + total_vehicles_covered INTEGER + premium_aggregated NUMERIC(15,2) + acaps_c6_reference VARCHAR UNIQUE + master_policy_status enum draft/active/suspended/expired/cancelled + sla_tier enum inherited + effective_from DATE + effective_until DATE + billing_frequency enum monthly/quarterly/annual + audit_trail JSONB) UNIQUE (acaps_c6_reference) + indexes (corporate_customer_id + master_policy_status partial + effective_until)
- **`FleetVehicle`** (id + fleet_policy_id FK + tenant_id + vehicle_data JSONB ({license_plate UNIQUE, make, model, year, chassis_number UNIQUE, usage_type, value_estimated}) + assigned_driver_id FK Sprint 40 nullable + bulk_renewal_eligible BOOLEAN + status enum active/transferred_out/sold/decommissioned + added_at + removed_at nullable + audit_trail JSONB) UNIQUE (fleet_policy_id, license_plate) + indexes (fleet_policy_id + status partial + assigned_driver_id)
- **`FleetBulkOperation`** (id + fleet_policy_id FK + tenant_id + operation_type enum bulk_renewal_fleet/bulk_modification_drivers/bulk_modification_coverage/bulk_claim_multiple_vehicles + status enum pending/in_progress/completed/partially_failed/failed + affected_vehicles_count INTEGER + success_count INTEGER + failure_count INTEGER + saga_state_machine_id VARCHAR + initiated_by_user_id FK + completed_at TIMESTAMP nullable + error_log JSONB + audit_trail) indexes (fleet_policy_id + status partial + operation_type)
- **`FleetBillingCycle`** (id + fleet_policy_id FK + tenant_id + billing_period_start DATE + billing_period_end DATE + total_amount NUMERIC(15,2) + invoiced_at TIMESTAMP nullable + invoice_id FK Sprint 12 nullable + paid_at TIMESTAMP nullable + procurement_po VARCHAR + payment_terms enum net_30/net_60/net_90 + late_fees NUMERIC(10,2) default 0 + audit_trail) indexes (fleet_policy_id + billing_period_start + invoiced_at desc)
- **`FleetSLATracking`** (id + fleet_policy_id FK + sla_tier enum + sla_metrics JSONB ({response_time_avg_seconds, resolution_time_avg_hours, satisfaction_score, dedicated_contact_engagement}) + breach_count_monthly INTEGER + last_review_date DATE + audit_trail) indexes (fleet_policy_id + sla_tier)
- **`FleetAnalyticsSnapshot`** (id + tenant_id + snapshot_date DATE + fleet_metrics JSONB ({total_fleets, total_vehicles_aggregated, total_premium_aggregated, avg_fleet_size, bulk_operations_count, sla_compliance_rate}) + audit_trail) indexes (tenant_id + snapshot_date desc)

## CONTEXTE STRATEGIQUE -- POURQUOI LE SPRINT EST CRITIQUE

Sprint 48 est **commercial expansion enterprise B2B strategique** + **operational efficiency -70%** + **commercial differentiation Morocco market B2B underserved** + **foundation Phase 11+ Anthropic AI + ERP enterprise + commercial scaling MENA**. Cinq dimensions strategiques majeures.

Premierement, **commercial expansion enterprise B2B strategique Morocco market**. Sprints 40-47 foundation individual customers but Morocco B2B insurance market significantly underserved (large corporates + government entities + parastatals + foundations) = significant addressable market untapped. Sprint 48 fleet B2B foundation comprehensive = unlock enterprise segment Morocco market addressable + revenue uplift +30%+ projected + commercial scaling strategic Phase 11+ MENA expansion B2B segment.

Deuxiemement, **commercial differentiation strategique Morocco B2B insurance brokers**. Morocco B2B insurance brokers tooling fragmented + manual processes + no centralized fleet management + paperwork-heavy. Sprint 48 framework comprehensive automated fleet management + bulk operations + B2B billing centralized + enterprise SLA tiers = compelling differentiation strategic vs Morocco competitors fragmented + winning enterprise broker customers + market positioning leader B2B segment + foundation Phase 11+ commercial scaling.

Troisiemement, **operational efficiency -70% demonstrable bulk operations**. Individual customers Sprints 40-47 manage policies individually + brokers process individually. Sprint 48 bulk operations fleet-wide (bulk_renewal + bulk_modification + bulk_claim) = -70% time vs individual processing demonstrable + commercial productivity uplift + broker_admin time freed strategic accounts management + B2B SaaS value proposition compelling for enterprise customers + commercial scaling Sprint 48+.

Quatriemement, **foundation Phase 11+ Anthropic AI enterprise + ERP integration commercial scaling**. Sprint 48 rule-based foundation establishes infrastructure data + workflows + analytics + integration patterns. Phase 11+ Anthropic AI partnership advanced enterprise (AI risk scoring corporate + AI claims fraud detection fleet + AI predictive maintenance vehicles + ERP integration SAP + Oracle + Sage advanced + dedicated customer success platform). Sprint 48 = essential preparation Phase 11+ enterprise transformation.

Cinquiemement, **C6 ACAPS regulatory compliance Programme Emergence + foundation Sprints 49-50**. C6 ACAPS Form regulatory mandatory fleet policies Morocco insurance brokers = compliance critique pour activite legale + reputation + commercial growth. Sprint 48 implementation comprehensive = compliance ACAPS Programme Emergence credibility renforcee + Sprint 49 Telematics PHYD foundation FleetVehicle + Sprint 50 Embedded cross-sell foundation corporate customers + foundation Phase 11+ commercial scaling regulatory environment Morocco renforce.

## PIEGES TECHNIQUES GENERAUX

**Piege 1 : ICE number Morocco corporate registry validation foundation manual.** ICE number validation manual broker_admin entry = data quality issues + corporate identity verification weak. Solution : ICE validation format checks Sprint 47 + foundation Phase 11+ TOLO HZMA Morocco corporate registries automated integration + manual broker_admin override workflow + Sprint 9 customer verification flows.

**Piege 2 : Fleet bulk operations atomic vs partial failures complexity.** Bulk operations 100+ vehicles concurrent = partial failures complex management + customer service issues + saga compensations fleet-level complex. Solution : per-vehicle atomic + fleet-level saga compensations + partial_failures workflow + Sprint 9 corporate_customer notifications progressive + manual broker_admin resolution workflow + foundation Phase 11+ distributed transactions fleet.

**Piege 3 : Sprint 40 PolicyService extension multi-vehicle backward compatibility.** Sprint 40 PolicyService extended multi-vehicle may break individual customer flows = regression bugs. Solution : Sprint 40 extension strict additive only + individual_customer_flow preserved + tests comprehensive Sprint 40 existing + master_policy vs individual_policy distinction + foundation Phase 11+ refactoring PolicyService unified.

**Piege 4 : B2B billing centralized vs individual customer billing differentiation.** B2B billing centralized differs Sprint 11/12 individual = workflows + permissions + UX differences = complexity. Solution : billing_type enum b2b/individual strict + workflows differentiated + Sprint 11/12 extensions backward compatible + Sprint 28 admin-portal differentiated views + foundation Phase 11+ unified billing framework.

**Piege 5 : SLA tiers enterprise commitments business impact.** SLA enterprise tiers (platinum 15min response) = business commitments + breach financial penalties + operational stress broker_admin team. Solution : SLA tiers realistic gradual rollout + Sprint 9 escalation workflows automated + breach financial penalties documented + foundation Phase 11+ SOC enterprise dedicated team + monitoring Sprint 36 SLA real-time + customer satisfaction tracking.

**Piege 6 : C6 ACAPS Form regulatory format precision fleet specifics.** C6 fleet form ACAPS format precise + fleet-specific data + submission errors = ACAPS rejection + customer service issues. Solution : C6 form template ACAPS validation strict + Sprint 35 ComplianceAuditService + manual fallback broker_admin review + acaps_c6_reference systematic + retention permanente CNDP + foundation Phase 11+ automated ACAPS API post-licensing.

**Piege 7 : Corporate customer permissions multi-user enterprise scenarios.** Corporate_customer single user vs multi-user enterprise (procurement_contact + billing_contact + fleet_manager + legal) = permissions complex management. Solution : permissions_role enum per contact strict + Sprint 7.5a extension corporate-level + audit comprehensive + foundation Phase 11+ enterprise SSO SAML + permission management advanced.

**Piege 8 : Fleet vehicle bulk add license_plate UNIQUE conflicts.** Bulk add vehicles with license_plate conflicts (vehicle already in another fleet or individual policy) = errors + customer confusion. Solution : UNIQUE (fleet_policy_id, license_plate) + license_plate cross-fleets validation + Sprint 9 corporate_customer notification on conflicts + manual broker_admin resolution workflow + Sprint 14 audit comprehensive.

**Piege 9 : Sprint 46/47 fleet-wide extensions performance scale 100+ vehicles.** Sprint 46 AutomaticRenewal + Sprint 47 ModificationApprovalWorkflow extended fleet-wide 100+ vehicles = performance scale challenges. Solution : Sprint 46/47 fleet-wide batched processing + per-vehicle parallelism + Sprint 36 monitoring scale + alerts on degradation + foundation Phase 11+ horizontal scaling fleet operations + ClickHouse Materialized Views fleet-aware.

**Piege 10 : Sprint 13 35 MV total refresh window 04h00-06h00 cumulative.** Sprint 48 4 MV + Sprints 40-47 31 MV = 35 MV total refresh window 04h00-06h00 = cumulative performance degradation potential. Solution : refresh staggered (Sprint 40-47 04h00-05h45 + Sprint 48 06h00) + monitoring Sprint 36 + foundation Phase 11+ incremental refresh + ClickHouse Replicated + alerts on > 30 min total window.

## LISTE DES 12 TACHES -- SCOPE DETAILLE

### Tache 10.9.1 -- Architecture + Decision-047 + Design Doc

**6h | P0 | 140-180 KB**

# B-49 -- META-PROMPT SPRINT 49 : INSURANCE TELEMATICS PHYD

**Version** : v3.0 (Phase 10 Sprint 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical)

## OBJECTIF GLOBAL DU SPRINT

Le sprint construit **8 categories telematics PHYD** : (1) **TelematicsDevice IoT integration foundation** -- devices pairing comprehensive (OBD-II port hardware Bluetooth + mobile_app smartphone-based + foundation Phase 11+ embedded vehicle OEM integration) + device_identifier UNIQUE cryptographic + paired_at TIMESTAMP + status enum active/disconnected/maintenance/decommissioned + Sprint 48 FleetVehicle foundation integration (B2B fleet vehicles ready IoT) + Sprint 40 individual vehicle support also + multi-device per vehicle scenarios + audit comprehensive Sprint 7 + Sprint 35 security hardening pairing, (2) **TelematicsIngestion high-throughput data pipeline** -- ingestion data points massive scale (speed_kmh + acceleration_ms2 + braking_force + cornering_intensity + mileage_km + location_coords + timestamp + raw_data JSONB sensor-specific) + TimescaleDB partitioning by day strict + Kafka ingestion event-driven Sprint 14 + Sprint 36 monitoring throughput + scalable per-tenant + data retention 1 an actif + archive Phase 11+ S3 cold storage + GDPR + CNDP compliance customer consent strict + foundation Phase 11+ real-time streaming ML, (3) **DriverBehaviorScoring algorithm transparent + bias monitoring** -- driver scoring rigorous (composite_score 0-100 weighted multi-criteria + sub_scores JSONB transparent : speed_compliance + acceleration_smoothness + braking_safety + cornering_safety + night_driving + highway_vs_urban + total_mileage_factor + days_active) + algorithm versioning + Sprint 35 ACAPS audit bias + bias monitoring strict per driver demographics + foundation Phase 11+ Anthropic AI advanced ML + transparency customer-facing strict + ACAPS regulatory PHYD oversight Programme Emergence, (4) **PHYDPremiumAdjustment Sprint 46 DynamicPricing extension** -- premium adjustments behavioral (Sprint 46 DynamicPricingService extension + behavioral_factor JSONB driver_behavior_score weighted + scoring_period monthly/quarterly/annual + premium_adjustment range -25% safe driver to +30% risky driver + adjustment_reasoning customer-facing transparent + Sprint 35 audit + bias check passed + foundation Phase 11+ AI advanced ML pricing models Anthropic) + customer opt-in/opt-out PHYD strict + ACAPS regulatory compliance, (5) **DrivingTripSession analysis insights** -- per-trip analysis (trip_start + trip_end + total_distance_km + average_speed_kmh + max_speed + behavior_score per trip + Sprint 13 driving_trips_mv analytics + customer insights Sprint 18 compelling + foundation Phase 11+ ML predictive maintenance vehicles + accident prediction) + privacy strict location data Sprint 27 PII + customer access controls strict, (6) **TelematicsBiasMonitoring rigorous + ACAPS PHYD audit** -- bias monitoring per scoring decisions + statistical analysis variance + demographic disparities detection (age + gender + region + corporate vs individual) + Sprint 9 broker_admin alerts on bias + Sprint 35 ACAPS PHYD audit comprehensive + bias check_passed flag per adjustment + foundation Phase 11+ ML fairness Anthropic + customer disputes workflow, (7) **Sprint 18 customer-portal driving insights compelling** -- Sprint 18 PWA extension dedie telematics (driving_dashboard with composite_score + trends + sub_scores breakdown + driving_tips personalized + premium_impact tracking + opt-in/opt-out PHYD self-service + privacy controls comprehensive Sprint 27) + mobile-first WCAG 2.1 AA + Sprint 43 patterns reuse + foundation Phase 11+ voice insights + gamification PHYD, et (8) **Sprint 28 admin-portal 3 tabs telematics + Sprint 13 analytics** -- telematics_devices_management + driver_scoring_dashboard + phyd_adjustments_analytics + KPIs Recharts comprehensive + Sprint 13 4 MV telematics + permissions broker_admin/super_admin/acaps_reviewer + foundation Phase 11+ advanced telematics analytics ML insights Anthropic.

Le sprint produit **commercial differentiation strategique innovation PHYD Morocco** + **revenue uplift premium adjustments behavioral (avg +5% safe drivers + commercial expansion behavioral segment underserved)** + **customer engagement compelling driving insights compelling differentiation vs Morocco competitors traditional** + **foundation Phase 11+ Anthropic AI ML predictive maintenance + accident prediction + advanced behavioral analytics + commercial scaling MENA** + **regulatory ACAPS PHYD audit comprehensive Programme Emergence** + **Sprint 48 FleetVehicle foundation IoT validation operational complete**. Le sprint introduit **decision-048 ratification** Insurance Telematics PHYD comprehensive + IoT integration + behavioral analytics + driver scoring + Sprint 46 extension + bias monitoring + Sprint 35 ACAPS PHYD + Sprint 18 customer-portal + Sprint 28 3 tabs + Sprint 13 4 MV + foundation Phase 11+ commercial scaling innovation Morocco.

A la sortie de ce sprint, Skalean dispose d'**entites domain Telematics PHYD** :
- **`TelematicsDevice`** (id + fleet_vehicle_id FK Sprint 48 nullable + individual_vehicle_id FK Sprint 40 nullable + tenant_id + device_type enum obd_ii/mobile_app/embedded_oem_phase11 + device_identifier VARCHAR UNIQUE cryptographic + paired_at TIMESTAMP + status enum active/disconnected/maintenance/decommissioned + last_data_received TIMESTAMP + device_manufacturer VARCHAR + firmware_version VARCHAR + audit_trail JSONB) UNIQUE (device_identifier) + indexes (fleet_vehicle_id + individual_vehicle_id + status partial + last_data_received desc)
- **`TelematicsDataPoint`** (id + telematics_device_id FK + tenant_id + timestamp TIMESTAMP NOT NULL + data_type enum speed/acceleration/braking/cornering/mileage/location + raw_data JSONB sensor-specific + location_coords POINT (lat, lng) + processing_status enum raw/processed/aggregated + audit_trail JSONB) **TimescaleDB hypertable** partitioned by day + indexes (telematics_device_id + timestamp desc + data_type)
- **`DriverBehaviorScore`** (id + driver_id FK Sprint 40 + tenant_id + scoring_period_start DATE + scoring_period_end DATE + composite_score NUMERIC(5,2) range 0-100 + sub_scores JSONB ({speed_compliance, acceleration_smoothness, braking_safety, cornering_safety, night_driving, highway_vs_urban, total_mileage_factor, days_active}) + algorithm_version VARCHAR + bias_check_passed BOOLEAN + total_trips_count INTEGER + total_mileage_km NUMERIC(10,2) + audit_trail JSONB) UNIQUE (driver_id, scoring_period_start) + indexes (driver_id + composite_score desc + scoring_period_start desc)
- **`PHYDPremiumAdjustment`** (id + policy_id FK Sprint 40 + driver_behavior_score_id FK + tenant_id + scoring_period_start DATE + base_premium NUMERIC(10,2) + behavioral_factor NUMERIC(5,4) range -0.25 to +0.30 + adjusted_premium NUMERIC(10,2) computed + adjustment_reasoning TEXT customer-facing + bias_check_passed BOOLEAN + sprint46_dynamic_pricing_decision_id FK nullable + applied_at TIMESTAMP + audit_trail JSONB) indexes (policy_id + scoring_period_start desc + behavioral_factor)
- **`DrivingTripSession`** (id + telematics_device_id FK + driver_id FK + tenant_id + trip_start TIMESTAMP NOT NULL + trip_end TIMESTAMP NOT NULL + total_distance_km NUMERIC(8,2) + average_speed_kmh NUMERIC(5,2) + max_speed_kmh NUMERIC(5,2) + behavior_score_trip NUMERIC(5,2) + violations_count INTEGER + start_location POINT + end_location POINT + audit_trail) indexes (driver_id + trip_start desc + behavior_score_trip)
- **`TelematicsBiasMonitoringSnapshot`** (id + tenant_id + snapshot_date DATE + bias_analysis JSONB ({age_group_variance, region_variance, gender_variance, corporate_vs_individual_variance}) + breach_count INTEGER + Sprint 35 audit reference + audit_trail) indexes (tenant_id + snapshot_date desc)
- **`TelematicsAnalyticsSnapshot`** (id + tenant_id + snapshot_date DATE + telematics_metrics JSONB ({active_devices_count, total_data_points_ingested, avg_driver_behavior_score, phyd_adjustments_distribution, opt_in_rate}) + audit_trail) indexes (tenant_id + snapshot_date desc)
